78 const PROPOSAL_STAGGER_MS: u64 = 250;
79 const PEER_SYNC_INTERVAL_SECS: u64 = 1;
80 const MAX_CLIENT_CLOCK_SKEW_SECS: i64 = 300;
81 const CLIENT_NONCE_RETENTION_SECS: i64 = 86_400;
82
83 type FinalizedRecords = (
84 Vec<FinalizedHealthCheck>,
85 Vec<FinalizedBrowserCheck>,
86 Vec<FinalizedComputeJob>,
87 );

89 #[derive(Debug, Clone)]
90 pub struct NodeConfig {
91 pub bind_addr: SocketAddr,
92 pub wallet_path: PathBuf,
93 pub genesis_path: PathBuf,
94 pub state_dir: PathBuf,
95 pub peers: Vec<String>,
96 pub swap_config_path: Option<PathBuf>,
97 pub notification_policies_path: Option<PathBuf>,
98 pub probe_agents_path: Option<PathBuf>,
99 pub browser_runner_program: Option<PathBuf>,
100 pub browser_runner_args: Vec<String>,
101 pub browser_cache_dir: Option<PathBuf>,
102 pub browser_secret_store_path: Option<PathBuf>,
103 pub control_api_token: Option<String>,
104 pub gossip_api_token: Option<String>,
105 pub wallet_passphrase: Option<String>,
106 }
107
108 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
109 struct PersistedNodeState {
110 pub chain: ChainState,
111 #[serde(skip_serializing, default)]
112 pub finalized_blocks: BTreeMap<u64, SignedBlock>,
113 #[serde(default)]
114 pub mempool: BTreeMap<String, SignedTransaction>,
115 #[serde(default)]
116 pub receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>>,
117 #[serde(default)]
118 pub browser_receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>>,
119 #[serde(default)]
120 pub compute_receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>>,
121 #[serde(default)]
122 pub storage_proof_receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedStorageProofReceipt>>,
123 #[serde(default)]
124 pub heartbeat_observations: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>>,
125 #[serde(default)]
126 pub heartbeat_client_nonces: BTreeMap<String, DateTime<Utc>>,
127 #[serde(default)]
128 pub block_approvals: BTreeMap<String, SignedBlockApproval>,
129 #[serde(default)]
130 pub delivered_alerts: BTreeMap<String, DateTime<Utc>>,
131 #[serde(default)]
132 pub active_view: u64,
133 #[serde(default = "default_view_started_at")]
134 pub view_started_at: DateTime<Utc>,
135 }
136
137 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
138 #[serde(tag = "event", rename_all = "snake_case")]
139 enum PersistedJournalEvent {
140 TransactionAccepted {
141 tx: SignedTransaction,
142 },
143 ReceiptAccepted {
144 receipt: SignedHealthReceipt,
145 },
146 BrowserReceiptAccepted {
147 receipt: SignedBrowserReceipt,
148 },
149 ComputeReceiptAccepted {
150 receipt: SignedComputeReceipt,
151 },
152 StorageProofReceiptAccepted {
153 receipt: SignedStorageProofReceipt,
154 },
155 HeartbeatObservationAccepted {
156 observation: SignedHeartbeatObservation,
157 },
158 ApprovalStored {
159 approval: SignedBlockApproval,
160 },
161 ViewAdvanced {
162 active_view: u64,
163 view_started_at: DateTime<Utc>,
164 },
165 BlockAccepted {
166 block: SignedBlock,
167 },
168 }
169
170 #[derive(Debug)]
171 struct RuntimeState {
172 chain: ChainState,
173 mempool: BTreeMap<String, SignedTransaction>,
174 receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>>,
175 browser_receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>>,
176 compute_receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>>,
177 storage_proof_receipts: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedStorageProofReceipt>>,
178 heartbeat_observations: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>>,
179 heartbeat_client_nonces: BTreeMap<String, DateTime<Utc>>,
180 block_approvals: BTreeMap<String, SignedBlockApproval>,
181 delivered_alerts: BTreeMap<String, DateTime<Utc>>,
182 active_view: u64,
183 view_started_at: DateTime<Utc>,
184 seen_txs: BTreeSet<String>,
185 seen_receipts: BTreeSet<String>,
186 seen_browser_receipts: BTreeSet<String>,
187 seen_compute_receipts: BTreeSet<String>,
188 seen_storage_proof_receipts: BTreeSet<String>,
189 seen_heartbeat_observations: BTreeSet<String>,
190 seen_blocks: BTreeSet<String>,
191 }

339 url: String,
340 #[serde(default)]
341 headers: BTreeMap<String, String>,

362 struct NodeStatusResponse {

367 last_block_hash: String,
368 validator: bool,
369 validator_count: usize,
370 active_view: u64,

374 block_time_secs: u64,

376 pending_receipt_count: usize,

378 storage_contracts: usize,

381 pending_storage_proof_receipts: usize,

383 finalized_browser_checks: usize,
384 finalized_compute_jobs: usize,
385 control_api_auth_enabled: bool,
386 gossip_api_auth_enabled: bool,
387 peers: Vec<String>,
388 }
389
390 impl NodeRuntime {
391 pub async fn from_config(config: NodeConfig) -> Result<Self> {
392 fs::create_dir_all(&config.state_dir).await?;
393 fs::create_dir_all(block_archive_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
394 fs::create_dir_all(health_check_archive_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
395 fs::create_dir_all(browser_check_archive_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
396 fs::create_dir_all(compute_job_archive_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
397 fs::create_dir_all(browser_artifact_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
398 fs::create_dir_all(compute_artifact_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
399 fs::create_dir_all(compute_sandbox_dir(&config.state_dir)).await?;
400 fs::create_dir_all(
401 config
402 .browser_cache_dir
403 .clone()
404 .unwrap_or_else(|| config.state_dir.join("browser_cache")),
405 )
406 .await?;
407
408 let wallet = Wallet::from_file(&config.wallet_path, config.wallet_passphrase.as_deref())?;
409 let genesis = load_genesis(&config.genesis_path).await?;
410 let persisted = load_state(config.state_dir.join("state.json"), &genesis).await?;
411 let journal_events = load_journal_events(&config.state_dir).await?;
412 let migrated_finalized_blocks = persisted.finalized_blocks.clone();
413 let migrated_finalized_health_checks = persisted.chain.finalized_health_checks.clone();
414 let migrated_finalized_browser_checks = persisted.chain.finalized_browser_checks.clone();
415 let migrated_finalized_compute_jobs = persisted.chain.finalized_compute_jobs.clone();
416 migrate_legacy_archives(
417 &config.state_dir,
418 &migrated_finalized_blocks,
419 &migrated_finalized_health_checks,
420 &migrated_finalized_browser_checks,
421 &migrated_finalized_compute_jobs,
422 )
423 .await?;
424 let swap_registry = Arc::new(SwapRegistry::from_optional_file(
425 config.swap_config_path.as_deref(),
426 )?);
427 let state = RuntimeState {
428 seen_txs: persisted.mempool.keys().cloned().collect(),
429 seen_receipts: persisted
430 .receipts
431 .values()
432 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
433 .collect(),
434 seen_browser_receipts: persisted
435 .browser_receipts
436 .values()
437 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
438 .collect(),
439 seen_compute_receipts: persisted
440 .compute_receipts
441 .values()
442 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
443 .collect(),
444 seen_storage_proof_receipts: persisted
445 .storage_proof_receipts
446 .values()
447 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
448 .collect(),
449 seen_heartbeat_observations: persisted
450 .heartbeat_observations
451 .values()
452 .flat_map(|items| items.iter().map(|item| item.id.clone()))
453 .collect(),
454 seen_blocks: persisted
455 .chain
456 .block_history
457 .iter()
458 .cloned()
459 .chain(std::iter::once(persisted.chain.last_block_hash.clone()))
460 .collect(),
461 chain: persisted.chain,
462 mempool: persisted.mempool,
463 receipts: persisted.receipts,
464 browser_receipts: persisted.browser_receipts,
465 compute_receipts: persisted.compute_receipts,
466 storage_proof_receipts: persisted.storage_proof_receipts,
467 heartbeat_observations: persisted.heartbeat_observations,
468 heartbeat_client_nonces: persisted.heartbeat_client_nonces,
469 block_approvals: persisted.block_approvals,
470 delivered_alerts: persisted.delivered_alerts,
471 active_view: persisted.active_view,
472 view_started_at: persisted.view_started_at,
473 };
474
475 let runtime = Self {
476 config,
477 wallet,
478 http_client: reqwest::Client::new(),
479 swap_registry,
480 persist_lock: Arc::new(Mutex::new(())),
481 state: Arc::new(RwLock::new(state)),
482 };
483 runtime.replay_journal_events(journal_events).await?;
484 {
485 let mut state = runtime.state.write().await;
486 prune_pending_state(&mut state);
487 }
488 runtime.snapshot_and_compact_journal().await?;
489 runtime.schedule_pending_check_executions().await;
490 Ok(runtime)
491 }
492
493 pub fn address(&self) -> Address {
494 self.wallet.address()
495 }
496
497 fn require_control_auth(&self, headers: &HeaderMap) -> Result<()> {
498 require_bearer_token(
499 headers,
500 self.config.control_api_token.as_deref(),
501 "control API",
502 )
503 }
504
505 fn require_gossip_auth(&self, headers: &HeaderMap) -> Result<()> {
506 require_bearer_token(
507 headers,
508 self.config.gossip_api_token.as_deref(),
509 "gossip API",
510 )
511 }
512
513 pub async fn run(self) -> Result<()> {
514 let runtime = Arc::new(self);
515 let block_runtime = runtime.clone();
516 tokio::spawn(async move {
517 if let Err(error) = block_runtime.block_producer_loop().await {
518 error!(?error, "block producer loop exited");
519 }
520 });
521 let sync_runtime = runtime.clone();
522 tokio::spawn(async move {
523 if let Err(error) = sync_runtime.sync_loop().await {
524 error!(?error, "peer sync loop exited");
525 }
526 });
527
528 let app = Router::new()
529 .route("/v1/control/status", get(get_status))
530 .route("/v1/control/account/:address", get(get_account))
531 .route("/v1/control/ledger", get(get_ledger))
532 .route("/v1/control/jobs/:tx_hash", get(get_job))
533 .route(
534 "/v1/control/monitors",
535 get(list_monitors).post(create_monitor),
536 )
537 .route(
538 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id",
539 get(get_monitor).put(update_monitor).delete(delete_monitor),
540 )
541 .route(
542 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id/pause",
543 post(pause_monitor),
544 )
545 .route(
546 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id/resume",
547 post(resume_monitor),
548 )
549 .route(
550 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id/topup",
551 post(topup_monitor),
552 )
553 .route(
554 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id/rotate-token",
555 post(rotate_monitor_token),
556 )
557 .route(
558 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id/slots",
559 get(get_monitor_slots),
560 )
561 .route(
562 "/v1/control/monitors/:monitor_id/alerts",
563 get(get_monitor_alerts),
564 )
565 .route("/v1/control/swaps/:quote_id", get(get_swap_lock))
566 .route(
567 "/v1/control/storage/:contract_id",
568 get(get_storage_contract),
569 )
570 .route(
571 "/v1/control/compute-artifacts/:tx_hash/:shard_id/*path",
572 get(get_compute_artifact),
573 )
574 .route("/v1/control/domain-route/:host", get(get_domain_route))
575 .route("/v1/control/adapters", get(get_adapters))
576 .route("/v1/control/submit", post(submit_transaction))
577 .route("/v1/control/swap/quote", post(quote_swap))
578 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id/:token", get(ping_success_get))
579 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id/:token", post(ping_success_post))
580 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id/:token/start", get(ping_start_get))
581 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id/:token/start", post(ping_start_post))
582 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id/:token/fail", get(ping_fail_get))
583 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id/:token/fail", post(ping_fail_post))
584 .route("/v1/ping/:monitor_id", post(ping_signed_post))
585 .route("/v1/internal/tx", post(gossip_transaction))
586 .route("/v1/internal/receipt", post(gossip_receipt))
587 .route("/v1/internal/browser-receipt", post(gossip_browser_receipt))
588 .route("/v1/internal/compute-receipt", post(gossip_compute_receipt))
589 .route(
590 "/v1/internal/storage-proof",
591 post(gossip_storage_proof_receipt),
592 )
593 .route("/v1/internal/heartbeat", post(gossip_heartbeat_observation))
594 .route(
595 "/v1/internal/monitor/confirm",
596 post(run_monitor_confirmation),
597 )
598 .route("/v1/internal/block/approve", post(approve_block))
599 .route("/v1/internal/block/:height", get(get_internal_block))
600 .route("/v1/internal/block", post(gossip_block))
601 .with_state(runtime.clone());
602
603 let listener = tokio::net::TcpListener::bind(runtime.config.bind_addr).await?;
604 info!(
605 address = %runtime.address(),
606 bind = %runtime.config.bind_addr,
607 peers = runtime.config.peers.len(),
608 "gossip_protocol node listening"
609 );
610 axum::serve(listener, app).await?;
611 Ok(())
612 }
613
614 async fn block_producer_loop(self: Arc<Self>) -> Result<()> {
615 let block_time_secs = {
616 let state = self.state.read().await;
617 state.chain.block_time_secs
618 };
619 let mut ticker = interval(Duration::from_secs(block_time_secs.max(1)));
620 loop {
621 ticker.tick().await;
622 self.advance_view_if_stale().await?;
623 if let Err(error) = self.maybe_produce_block().await {
624 warn!(?error, "block production attempt failed");
625 }
626 }
627 }
628
629 async fn sync_loop(self: Arc<Self>) -> Result<()> {
630 let mut ticker = interval(Duration::from_secs(PEER_SYNC_INTERVAL_SECS));
631 loop {
632 ticker.tick().await;
633 if let Err(error) = self.sync_with_peers().await {
634 warn!(?error, "peer sync attempt failed");
635 }
636 }
637 }
638
639 async fn advance_view_if_stale(&self) -> Result<()> {
640 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
641 let view_event = {
642 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
643 if state.mempool.is_empty() && state.storage_proof_receipts.is_empty() {
644 None
645 } else {
646 let elapsed = Utc::now() - state.view_started_at;
647 let timeout = chrono::Duration::seconds(state.chain.block_time_secs.max(1) as i64);
648 if elapsed < timeout {
649 None
650 } else {
651 state.active_view += 1;
652 state.view_started_at = Utc::now();
653 retain_current_block_approval_slot(&mut state);
654 Some(PersistedJournalEvent::ViewAdvanced {
655 active_view: state.active_view,
656 view_started_at: state.view_started_at,
657 })
658 }
659 }
660 };
661 if let Some(view_event) = view_event {
662 self.append_journal_event_locked(&view_event).await?;
663 }
664 Ok(())
665 }
666
667 async fn sync_with_peers(&self) -> Result<()> {
668 if self.config.peers.is_empty() {
669 return Ok(());
670 }
671
672 let local_status = self.status_response().await;
673 let mut highest_peer_height = local_status.height;
674 let peer_statuses = join_all(self.config.peers.iter().map(|peer| async move {
675 let url = format!("{}/v1/control/status", peer.trim_end_matches('/'));
676 match self.http_client.get(url).send().await {
677 Ok(response) if response.status().is_success() => {
678 match response.json::<NodeStatusResponse>().await {
679 Ok(status) => Some((peer.clone(), status)),
680 Err(error) => {
681 warn!(?error, peer, "peer returned unreadable status");
682 None
683 }
684 }
685 }
686 Ok(response) => {
687 warn!(status = ?response.status(), peer, "peer rejected status request");
688 None
689 }
690 Err(error) => {
691 warn!(?error, peer, "failed to fetch peer status");
692 None
693 }
694 }
695 }))
696 .await;
697
698 let mut candidates = Vec::new();
699 for (peer, status) in peer_statuses.into_iter().flatten() {
700 if status.chain_id != local_status.chain_id {
701 continue;
702 }
703 highest_peer_height = highest_peer_height.max(status.height);
704 if status.height > local_status.height {
705 candidates.push((peer, status));
706 } else if status.height == local_status.height
707 && status.last_block_hash != local_status.last_block_hash
708 {
709 warn!(
710 peer,
711 local_height = local_status.height,
712 local_hash = %local_status.last_block_hash,
713 peer_hash = %status.last_block_hash,
714 "peer is on a different chain head at the same height"
715 );
716 }
717 }
718
719 candidates.sort_by(|left, right| right.1.height.cmp(&left.1.height));
720 for (peer, status) in candidates {
721 let current_height = {
722 let state = self.state.read().await;
723 state.chain.height
724 };
725 if current_height >= highest_peer_height {
726 break;
727 }
728 if let Err(error) = self.catch_up_from_peer(&peer, status.height).await {
729 warn!(
730 ?error,
731 peer,
732 target_height = status.height,
733 "failed to catch up from peer"
734 );
735 }
736 }
737
738 Ok(())
739 }
740
741 async fn catch_up_from_peer(&self, peer: &str, target_height: u64) -> Result<()> {
742 loop {
743 let next_height = {
744 let state = self.state.read().await;
745 if state.chain.height >= target_height {
746 break;
747 }
748 state.chain.height + 1
749 };
750
751 let Some(block) = self.fetch_block_from_peer(peer, next_height).await? else {
752 bail!("peer did not provide block {next_height}");
753 };
754
755 let accepted = self.accept_block(block.clone(), false).await?;
756 if !accepted {
757 let state = self.state.read().await;
758 if state.chain.height >= next_height {
759 continue;
760 }
761 bail!("peer block {next_height} was not accepted locally");
762 }
763 info!(
764 peer,
765 height = block.body.height,
766 hash = %block.hash,
767 "caught up missing block from peer"
768 );
769 }
770 Ok(())
771 }
772
773 async fn fetch_block_from_peer(&self, peer: &str, height: u64) -> Result<Option<SignedBlock>> {
774 let url = format!(
775 "{}/v1/internal/block/{}",
776 peer.trim_end_matches('/'),
777 height
778 );
779 let mut request = self.http_client.get(url);
780 if let Some(token) = self.config.gossip_api_token.as_deref() {
781 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
782 }
783 let response = request.send().await?;
784 if response.status() == StatusCode::NOT_FOUND {
785 return Ok(None);
786 }
787 if !response.status().is_success() {
788 bail!("peer returned {}", response.status());
789 }
790 Ok(Some(response.json::<SignedBlock>().await?))
791 }
792
793 async fn maybe_produce_block(&self) -> Result<()> {
794 let (start_height, start_hash, start_view, has_pending_work) = {
795 let state = self.state.read().await;
796 let has_due_monitor_work = monitor_due_work_exists(
797 &state.chain,
798 &state.browser_receipts,
799 &state.heartbeat_observations,
800 Utc::now(),
801 )
802 .unwrap_or(false);
803 (
804 state.chain.height,
805 state.chain.last_block_hash.clone(),
806 state.active_view,
807 !state.mempool.is_empty()
808 || !state.heartbeat_observations.is_empty()
809 || !state.storage_proof_receipts.is_empty()
810 || !state.compute_receipts.is_empty()
811 || has_due_monitor_work,
812 )
813 };
814 if !has_pending_work {
815 return Ok(());
816 }
817 let priority_index = {
818 let state = self.state.read().await;
819 state
820 .chain
821 .validators
822 .iter()
823 .position(|validator| validator == &self.address())
824 };
825 let Some(priority_index) = priority_index else {
826 return Ok(());
827 };
828 sleep(Duration::from_millis(
829 priority_index as u64 * PROPOSAL_STAGGER_MS,
830 ))
831 .await;
832
833 let (
834 chain,
835 mempool,
836 receipts,
837 browser_receipts,
838 compute_receipts,
839 storage_proof_receipts,
840 heartbeat_observations,
841 active_view,
842 ) = {
843 let state = self.state.read().await;
844 if state.chain.height != start_height
845 || state.chain.last_block_hash != start_hash
846 || state.active_view != start_view
847 {
848 return Ok(());
849 }
850 let has_due_monitor_work = monitor_due_work_exists(
851 &state.chain,
852 &state.browser_receipts,
853 &state.heartbeat_observations,
854 Utc::now(),
855 )
856 .unwrap_or(false);
857 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&self.address())
858 || (state.mempool.is_empty()
859 && state.heartbeat_observations.is_empty()
860 && state.storage_proof_receipts.is_empty()
861 && state.compute_receipts.is_empty()
862 && !has_due_monitor_work)
863 {
864 return Ok(());
865 }
866 (
867 state.chain.clone(),
868 state.mempool.clone(),
869 state.receipts.clone(),
870 state.browser_receipts.clone(),
871 state.compute_receipts.clone(),
872 state.storage_proof_receipts.clone(),
873 state.heartbeat_observations.clone(),
874 state.active_view,
875 )
876 };
877
878 let next_height = chain.height + 1;
879 if chain.scheduled_proposer_for_view(next_height, active_view) != &self.address() {
880 return Ok(());
881 }
882 let mut candidate_txs: Vec<SignedTransaction> = mempool.into_values().collect();
883 candidate_txs.sort_by(|left, right| {
884 left.body
885 .nonce
886 .cmp(&right.body.nonce)
887 .then_with(|| left.body.created_at.cmp(&right.body.created_at))
888 });
889
890 let mut simulated = chain.clone();
891 let mut selected = Vec::new();
892 let mut health_batches = Vec::new();
893 let mut browser_batches = Vec::new();
894 let mut compute_batches = Vec::new();
895 let mut storage_proof_batches = Vec::new();
896 let proposed_at = Utc::now();
897 let (heartbeat_items, monitor_evaluations, monitor_browser_batches, confirmation_batches) =
898 self.prepare_monitor_work(
899 &chain,
900 &browser_receipts,
901 &heartbeat_observations,
902 proposed_at,
903 )
904 .await?;
905
906 for tx in candidate_txs {
907 if selected.len() >= MAX_BLOCK_TRANSACTIONS {
908 break;
909 }
910 if simulated.validate_transaction_basic(&tx).is_err() {
911 continue;
912 }
913 if simulated.account(&tx.signer).nonce + 1 != tx.body.nonce {
914 continue;
915 }
916
917 match &tx.body.kind {
918 TransactionKind::Transfer { amount, .. } => {
919 if simulated.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < *amount {
920 continue;
921 }
922 let block = BlockBody {
923 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
924 height: simulated.height + 1,
925 view: active_view,
926 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
927 proposer: self.address(),
928 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
929 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
930 health_batches: Vec::new(),
931 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
932 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
933 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
934 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
935 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
936 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
937 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
938 };
939 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
940 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
941 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
942 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
943 &chain.chain_id,
944 next_height,
945 active_view,
946 &chain.last_block_hash,
947 &self.address(),
948 &next_selected,
949 &health_batches,
950 &browser_batches,
951 &compute_batches,
952 &monitor_browser_batches,
953 &heartbeat_items,
954 &monitor_evaluations,
955 &confirmation_batches,
956 &storage_proof_batches,
957 )? {
958 break;
959 }
960 simulated = next_state;
961 selected = next_selected;
962 }
963 }
964 TransactionKind::StorageTransfer { amount, .. } => {
965 if simulated.account(&tx.signer).storage_balance < *amount {
966 continue;
967 }
968 let block = BlockBody {
969 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
970 height: simulated.height + 1,
971 view: active_view,
972 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
973 proposer: self.address(),
974 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
975 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
976 health_batches: Vec::new(),
977 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
978 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
979 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
980 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
981 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
982 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
983 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
984 };
985 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
986 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
987 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
988 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
989 &chain.chain_id,
990 next_height,
991 active_view,
992 &chain.last_block_hash,
993 &self.address(),
994 &next_selected,
995 &health_batches,
996 &browser_batches,
997 &compute_batches,
998 &monitor_browser_batches,
999 &heartbeat_items,
1000 &monitor_evaluations,
1001 &confirmation_batches,
1002 &storage_proof_batches,
1003 )? {
1004 break;
1005 }
1006 simulated = next_state;
1007 selected = next_selected;
1008 }
1009 }
1010 TransactionKind::ComputeTransfer { amount, .. } => {
1011 if simulated.account(&tx.signer).compute_balance < *amount {
1012 continue;
1013 }
1014 let block = BlockBody {
1015 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1016 height: simulated.height + 1,
1017 view: active_view,
1018 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1019 proposer: self.address(),
1020 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
1021 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
1022 health_batches: Vec::new(),
1023 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1024 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
1025 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1026 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1027 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1028 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1029 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
1030 };
1031 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
1032 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
1033 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
1034 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1035 &chain.chain_id,
1036 next_height,
1037 active_view,
1038 &chain.last_block_hash,
1039 &self.address(),
1040 &next_selected,
1041 &health_batches,
1042 &browser_batches,
1043 &compute_batches,
1044 &monitor_browser_batches,
1045 &heartbeat_items,
1046 &monitor_evaluations,
1047 &confirmation_batches,
1048 &storage_proof_batches,
1049 )? {
1050 break;
1051 }
1052 simulated = next_state;
1053 selected = next_selected;
1054 }
1055 }
1056 TransactionKind::DnsTransfer { amount, .. } => {
1057 if simulated.account(&tx.signer).dns_balance < *amount {
1058 continue;
1059 }
1060 let block = BlockBody {
1061 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1062 height: simulated.height + 1,
1063 view: active_view,
1064 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1065 proposer: self.address(),
1066 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
1067 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
1068 health_batches: Vec::new(),
1069 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1070 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
1071 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1072 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1073 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1074 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1075 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
1076 };
1077 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
1078 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
1079 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
1080 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1081 &chain.chain_id,
1082 next_height,
1083 active_view,
1084 &chain.last_block_hash,
1085 &self.address(),
1086 &next_selected,
1087 &health_batches,
1088 &browser_batches,
1089 &compute_batches,
1090 &monitor_browser_batches,
1091 &heartbeat_items,
1092 &monitor_evaluations,
1093 &confirmation_batches,
1094 &storage_proof_batches,
1095 )? {
1096 break;
1097 }
1098 simulated = next_state;
1099 selected = next_selected;
1100 }
1101 }
1102 TransactionKind::SwapLock { .. }
1103 | TransactionKind::SwapCancel { .. }
1104 | TransactionKind::SwapSettle { .. }
1105 | TransactionKind::MonitorCreate { .. }
1106 | TransactionKind::MonitorUpdate { .. }
1107 | TransactionKind::MonitorPause { .. }
1108 | TransactionKind::MonitorResume { .. }
1109 | TransactionKind::MonitorTopUp { .. }
1110 | TransactionKind::MonitorDelete { .. }
1111 | TransactionKind::StorageCreate { .. }
1112 | TransactionKind::StorageTopUp { .. }
1113 | TransactionKind::StorageCancel { .. }
1114 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingCreate { .. }
1115 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingPause { .. }
1116 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingResume { .. }
1117 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingRetire { .. }
1118 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCreate { .. }
1119 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseRenew { .. }
1120 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseBind { .. }
1121 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCancel { .. } => {
1122 let block = BlockBody {
1123 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1124 height: simulated.height + 1,
1125 view: active_view,
1126 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1127 proposer: self.address(),
1128 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
1129 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
1130 health_batches: Vec::new(),
1131 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1132 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
1133 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1134 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1135 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1136 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1137 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
1138 };
1139 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
1140 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
1141 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
1142 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1143 &chain.chain_id,
1144 next_height,
1145 active_view,
1146 &chain.last_block_hash,
1147 &self.address(),
1148 &next_selected,
1149 &health_batches,
1150 &browser_batches,
1151 &compute_batches,
1152 &monitor_browser_batches,
1153 &heartbeat_items,
1154 &monitor_evaluations,
1155 &confirmation_batches,
1156 &storage_proof_batches,
1157 )? {
1158 break;
1159 }
1160 simulated = next_state;
1161 selected = next_selected;
1162 }
1163 }
1164 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. } => {
1165 let Some(job_receipts) = receipts.get(&tx.hash) else {
1166 continue;
1167 };
1168 let Ok(batch) = simulated.summarize_receipts_for_tx(&tx, job_receipts) else {
1169 continue;
1170 };
1171 if batch.receipts.len() < simulated.min_health_receipts {
1172 continue;
1173 }
1174 let block = BlockBody {
1175 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1176 height: simulated.height + 1,
1177 view: active_view,
1178 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1179 proposer: self.address(),
1180 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
1181 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
1182 health_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
1183 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1184 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
1185 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1186 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1187 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1188 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1189 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
1190 };
1191 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
1192 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
1193 let mut next_batches = health_batches.clone();
1194 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
1195 next_batches.push(batch.clone());
1196 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1197 &chain.chain_id,
1198 next_height,
1199 active_view,
1200 &chain.last_block_hash,
1201 &self.address(),
1202 &next_selected,
1203 &next_batches,
1204 &browser_batches,
1205 &compute_batches,
1206 &monitor_browser_batches,
1207 &heartbeat_items,
1208 &monitor_evaluations,
1209 &confirmation_batches,
1210 &storage_proof_batches,
1211 )? {
1212 break;
1213 }
1214 simulated = next_state;
1215 selected = next_selected;
1216 health_batches = next_batches;
1217 }
1218 }
1219 TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. } => {
1220 let Some(job_receipts) = browser_receipts.get(&tx.hash) else {
1221 continue;
1222 };
1223 let Ok(batch) = simulated.summarize_browser_receipts_for_tx(&tx, job_receipts)
1224 else {
1225 continue;
1226 };
1227 if batch.receipts.len() < simulated.min_health_receipts {
1228 continue;
1229 }
1230 let block = BlockBody {
1231 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1232 height: simulated.height + 1,
1233 view: active_view,
1234 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1235 proposer: self.address(),
1236 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
1237 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
1238 health_batches: Vec::new(),
1239 browser_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
1240 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
1241 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1242 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1243 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1244 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1245 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
1246 };
1247 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
1248 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
1249 let mut next_batches = browser_batches.clone();
1250 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
1251 next_batches.push(batch.clone());
1252 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1253 &chain.chain_id,
1254 next_height,
1255 active_view,
1256 &chain.last_block_hash,
1257 &self.address(),
1258 &next_selected,
1259 &health_batches,
1260 &next_batches,
1261 &compute_batches,
1262 &monitor_browser_batches,
1263 &heartbeat_items,
1264 &monitor_evaluations,
1265 &confirmation_batches,
1266 &storage_proof_batches,
1267 )? {
1268 break;
1269 }
1270 simulated = next_state;
1271 selected = next_selected;
1272 browser_batches = next_batches;
1273 }
1274 }
1275 TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec } => {
1276 let Some(job_receipts) = compute_receipts.get(&tx.hash) else {
1277 continue;
1278 };
1279 let Ok(batch) = simulated.summarize_compute_receipts_for_tx(&tx, job_receipts)
1280 else {
1281 continue;
1282 };
1283 let required = usize::from(spec.replication)
1284 .max(simulated.min_health_receipts)
1285 .min(simulated.validators.len());
1286 if batch.receipts.len() < required {
1287 continue;
1288 }
1289 let block = BlockBody {
1290 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1291 height: simulated.height + 1,
1292 view: active_view,
1293 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1294 proposer: self.address(),
1295 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
1296 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
1297 health_batches: Vec::new(),
1298 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1299 compute_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
1300 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1301 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1302 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1303 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1304 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
1305 };
1306 if let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&block) {
1307 let mut next_selected = selected.clone();
1308 let mut next_batches = compute_batches.clone();
1309 next_selected.push(tx.clone());
1310 next_batches.push(batch.clone());
1311 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1312 &chain.chain_id,
1313 next_height,
1314 active_view,
1315 &chain.last_block_hash,
1316 &self.address(),
1317 &next_selected,
1318 &health_batches,
1319 &browser_batches,
1320 &next_batches,
1321 &monitor_browser_batches,
1322 &heartbeat_items,
1323 &monitor_evaluations,
1324 &confirmation_batches,
1325 &storage_proof_batches,
1326 )? {
1327 break;
1328 }
1329 simulated = next_state;
1330 selected = next_selected;
1331 compute_batches = next_batches;
1332 }
1333 }
1334 }
1335 }
1336
1337 let mut seen_storage_contracts = BTreeSet::new();
1338 for receipts in storage_proof_receipts.values() {
1339 let Some(first) = receipts.first() else {
1340 continue;
1341 };
1342 if !seen_storage_contracts.insert(first.body.contract_id.clone()) {
1343 continue;
1344 }
1345 let Ok(batch) = simulated.summarize_storage_proof_batch(
1346 &first.body.contract_id,
1347 receipts,
1348 &chain.last_block_hash,
1349 proposed_at,
1350 ) else {
1351 continue;
1352 };
1353 let proof_block = BlockBody {
1354 chain_id: simulated.chain_id.clone(),
1355 height: simulated.height + 1,
1356 view: active_view,
1357 previous_hash: simulated.last_block_hash.clone(),
1358 proposer: self.address(),
1359 proposed_at,
1360 transactions: Vec::new(),
1361 health_batches: Vec::new(),
1362 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1363 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
1364 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
1365 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
1366 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
1367 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
1368 storage_proof_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
1369 };
1370 let Ok(next_state) = simulated.simulate_apply(&proof_block) else {
1371 continue;
1372 };
1373 let mut next_storage_batches = storage_proof_batches.clone();
1374 next_storage_batches.push(batch.clone());
1375 if !candidate_block_fits_limits(
1376 &chain.chain_id,
1377 next_height,
1378 active_view,
1379 &chain.last_block_hash,
1380 &self.address(),
1381 &selected,
1382 &health_batches,
1383 &browser_batches,
1384 &compute_batches,
1385 &monitor_browser_batches,
1386 &heartbeat_items,
1387 &monitor_evaluations,
1388 &confirmation_batches,
1389 &next_storage_batches,
1390 )? {
1391 break;
1392 }
1393 simulated = next_state;
1394 storage_proof_batches = next_storage_batches;
1395 }
1396
1397 if selected.is_empty()
1398 && health_batches.is_empty()
1399 && browser_batches.is_empty()
1400 && compute_batches.is_empty()
1401 && monitor_browser_batches.is_empty()
1402 && heartbeat_items.is_empty()
1403 && monitor_evaluations.is_empty()
1404 && confirmation_batches.is_empty()
1405 && storage_proof_batches.is_empty()
1406 {
1407 return Ok(());
1408 }
1409
1410 let mut block = self.wallet.sign_block(SignedBlock {
1411 hash: String::new(),
1412 body: BlockBody {
1413 chain_id: chain.chain_id.clone(),
1414 height: next_height,
1415 view: active_view,
1416 previous_hash: chain.last_block_hash.clone(),
1417 proposer: String::new(),
1418 proposed_at,
1419 transactions: selected,
1420 health_batches,
1421 browser_batches,
1422 compute_batches,
1423 monitor_browser_batches,
1424 heartbeat_observations: heartbeat_items,
1425 monitor_evaluations,
1426 confirmation_batches,
1427 storage_proof_batches,
1428 },
1429 signature: String::new(),
1430 approvals: Vec::new(),
1431 })?;
1432 let mut approval_map = BTreeMap::new();
1433 let local_approval = self.approve_block_proposal(&block).await?;
1434 approval_map.insert(local_approval.body.approver.clone(), local_approval);
1435 for approval in self.request_block_approvals(&block).await {
1436 approval_map
1437 .entry(approval.body.approver.clone())
1438 .or_insert(approval);
1439 }
1440 block.approvals = approval_map.into_values().collect();
1441 if block.approvals.len() < chain.required_block_approvals() {
1442 warn!(
1443 height = block.body.height,
1444 view = block.body.view,
1445 approvals = block.approvals.len(),
1446 required = chain.required_block_approvals(),
1447 "insufficient validator approvals for block proposal"
1448 );
1449 return Ok(());
1450 }
1451
1452 let accepted = self.accept_block(block.clone(), true).await?;
1453 if accepted {
1454 info!(
1455 height = block.body.height,
1456 view = block.body.view,
1457 hash = %block.hash,
1458 approvals = block.approvals.len(),
1459 "produced block"
1460 );
1461 }
1462 Ok(())
1463 }
1464
1465 pub async fn accept_transaction(&self, tx: SignedTransaction, broadcast: bool) -> Result<bool> {
1466 let should_execute = {
1467 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1468 let outcome = {
1469 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1470 apply_transaction_to_state(&mut state, &self.address(), tx.clone())?
1471 };
1472 if !outcome.accepted {
1473 return Ok(false);
1474 }
1475 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::TransactionAccepted {
1476 tx: tx.clone(),
1477 })
1478 .await?;
1479 outcome.should_execute
1480 };
1481
1482 if broadcast {
1483 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/tx", &tx).await;
1484 }
1485 if should_execute {
1486 match tx.body.kind {
1487 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. } => self.spawn_health_execution(tx).await,
1488 TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. } => self.spawn_browser_execution(tx).await,
1489 TransactionKind::ComputeJob { .. } => self.spawn_compute_execution(tx).await,
1490 _ => {}
1491 }
1492 }
1493 Ok(true)
1494 }
1495
1496 pub async fn accept_receipt(
1497 &self,
1498 receipt: SignedHealthReceipt,
1499 broadcast: bool,
1500 ) -> Result<bool> {
1501 {
1502 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1503 let accepted = {
1504 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1505 apply_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt.clone())?
1506 };
1507 if !accepted {
1508 return Ok(false);
1509 }
1510 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::ReceiptAccepted {
1511 receipt: receipt.clone(),
1512 })
1513 .await?;
1514 }
1515 if broadcast {
1516 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/receipt", &receipt).await;
1517 }
1518 Ok(true)
1519 }
1520
1521 pub async fn accept_compute_receipt(
1522 &self,
1523 receipt: SignedComputeReceipt,
1524 broadcast: bool,
1525 ) -> Result<bool> {
1526 {
1527 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1528 let accepted = {
1529 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1530 apply_compute_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt.clone())?
1531 };
1532 if !accepted {
1533 return Ok(false);
1534 }
1535 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::ComputeReceiptAccepted {
1536 receipt: receipt.clone(),
1537 })
1538 .await?;
1539 }
1540 if broadcast {
1541 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/compute-receipt", &receipt)
1542 .await;
1543 }
1544 Ok(true)
1545 }
1546
1547 pub async fn accept_browser_receipt(
1548 &self,
1549 receipt: SignedBrowserReceipt,
1550 broadcast: bool,
1551 ) -> Result<bool> {
1552 {
1553 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1554 let accepted = {
1555 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1556 apply_browser_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt.clone())?
1557 };
1558 if !accepted {
1559 return Ok(false);
1560 }
1561 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::BrowserReceiptAccepted {
1562 receipt: receipt.clone(),
1563 })
1564 .await?;
1565 }
1566 if broadcast {
1567 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/browser-receipt", &receipt)
1568 .await;
1569 }
1570 Ok(true)
1571 }
1572
1573 pub async fn accept_storage_proof_receipt(
1574 &self,
1575 receipt: SignedStorageProofReceipt,
1576 broadcast: bool,
1577 ) -> Result<bool> {
1578 {
1579 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1580 let accepted = {
1581 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1582 apply_storage_proof_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt.clone())?
1583 };
1584 if !accepted {
1585 return Ok(false);
1586 }
1587 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::StorageProofReceiptAccepted {
1588 receipt: receipt.clone(),
1589 })
1590 .await?;
1591 }
1592 if broadcast {
1593 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/storage-proof", &receipt).await;
1594 }
1595 Ok(true)
1596 }
1597
1598 pub async fn accept_heartbeat_observation(
1599 &self,
1600 observation: SignedHeartbeatObservation,
1601 broadcast: bool,
1602 ) -> Result<bool> {
1603 {
1604 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1605 let accepted = {
1606 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1607 apply_heartbeat_observation_to_state(&mut state, observation.clone())?
1608 };
1609 if !accepted {
1610 return Ok(false);
1611 }
1612 self.append_journal_event_locked(
1613 &PersistedJournalEvent::HeartbeatObservationAccepted {
1614 observation: observation.clone(),
1615 },
1616 )
1617 .await?;
1618 }
1619 if broadcast {
1620 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/heartbeat", &observation).await;
1621 }
1622 Ok(true)
1623 }
1624
1625 pub async fn accept_block(&self, block: SignedBlock, broadcast: bool) -> Result<bool> {
1626 {
1627 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1628 let Some((
1629 finalized_health_records,
1630 finalized_browser_records,
1631 finalized_compute_records,
1632 )) = ({
1633 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1634 apply_block_to_state(&mut state, block.clone())?
1635 })
1636 else {
1637 return Ok(false);
1638 };
1639 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::BlockAccepted {
1640 block: block.clone(),
1641 })
1642 .await?;
1643 archive_block(&self.config.state_dir, &block).await?;
1644 for record in &finalized_health_records {
1645 archive_finalized_health_check(&self.config.state_dir, record).await?;
1646 }
1647 for record in &finalized_browser_records {
1648 archive_finalized_browser_check(&self.config.state_dir, record).await?;
1649 }
1650 for record in &finalized_compute_records {
1651 archive_finalized_compute_job(&self.config.state_dir, record).await?;
1652 }
1653 self.snapshot_and_compact_journal_locked().await?;
1654 }
1655 self.spawn_alert_delivery(block.clone()).await;
1656 self.schedule_pending_check_executions().await;
1657 if broadcast {
1658 self.broadcast("/v1/internal/block", &block).await;
1659 }
1660 Ok(true)
1661 }
1662
1663 async fn approve_block_proposal(&self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Result<SignedBlockApproval> {
1664 let approval = {
1665 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
1666 let (approval, should_persist) = {
1667 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
1668 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&self.address()) {
1669 bail!("node is not part of the validator set");
1670 }
1671 state.chain.validate_block_proposal(block)?;
1672 let slot_key = block_approval_slot_key(
1673 block.body.height,
1674 block.body.view,
1675 &block.body.previous_hash,
1676 );
1677 if let Some(existing) = state.block_approvals.get(&slot_key) {
1678 if existing.body.block_hash != block.hash {
1679 bail!(
1680 "validator already approved a different block for this height and view"
1681 );
1682 }
1683 (existing.clone(), false)
1684 } else {
1685 let approval = self.wallet.sign_block_approval(SignedBlockApproval {
1686 id: String::new(),
1687 body: BlockApprovalBody {
1688 chain_id: state.chain.chain_id.clone(),
1689 height: block.body.height,
1690 view: block.body.view,
1691 previous_hash: block.body.previous_hash.clone(),
1692 block_hash: block.hash.clone(),
1693 approver: String::new(),
1694 approved_at: Utc::now(),
1695 },
1696 signature: String::new(),
1697 })?;
1698 state.block_approvals.insert(slot_key, approval.clone());
1699 (approval, true)
1700 }
1701 };
1702 if should_persist {
1703 self.append_journal_event_locked(&PersistedJournalEvent::ApprovalStored {
1704 approval: approval.clone(),
1705 })
1706 .await?;
1707 }
1708 approval
1709 };
1710
1711 Ok(approval)
1712 }
1713
1714 async fn request_block_approvals(&self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Vec<SignedBlockApproval> {
1715 let futures = self.config.peers.iter().map(|peer| async move {
1716 let url = format!("{}/v1/internal/block/approve", peer.trim_end_matches('/'));
1717 let mut request = self.http_client.post(url);
1718 if let Some(token) = self.config.gossip_api_token.as_deref() {
1719 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
1720 }
1721 match request.json(block).send().await {
1722 Ok(response) if response.status().is_success() => {
1723 match response.json::<SignedBlockApproval>().await {
1724 Ok(approval) => Some(approval),
1725 Err(error) => {
1726 warn!(?error, peer, "peer returned an unreadable block approval");
1727 None
1728 }
1729 }
1730 }
1731 Ok(response) => {
1732 warn!(status = ?response.status(), peer, "peer rejected block approval request");
1733 None
1734 }
1735 Err(error) => {
1736 warn!(?error, peer, "failed to request block approval");
1737 None
1738 }
1739 }
1740 });
1741 join_all(futures).await.into_iter().flatten().collect()
1742 }
1743
1744 async fn resolve_peer_directory(&self) -> BTreeMap<Address, String> {
1745 let futures = self.config.peers.iter().map(|peer| async move {
1746 let url = format!("{}/v1/control/status", peer.trim_end_matches('/'));
1747 match self.http_client.get(url).send().await {
1748 Ok(response) if response.status().is_success() => response
1749 .json::<NodeStatusResponse>()
1750 .await
1751 .ok()
1752 .map(|status| (status.node_address, peer.clone())),
1753 _ => None,
1754 }
1755 });
1756 join_all(futures).await.into_iter().flatten().collect()
1757 }
1758
1759 async fn schedule_pending_check_executions(&self) {
1760 let (pending, scheduled_browser_tasks) = {
1761 let state = self.state.read().await;
1762 let pending = state
1763 .mempool
1764 .values()
1765 .filter(|tx| {
1766 matches!(
1767 tx.body.kind,
1768 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. }
1769 | TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. }
1770 | TransactionKind::ComputeJob { .. }
1771 )
1772 })
1773 .cloned()
1774 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1775 let scheduled_browser_tasks =
1776 pending_monitor_browser_tasks(&state.chain, Utc::now()).unwrap_or_default();
1777 (pending, scheduled_browser_tasks)
1778 };
1779 for tx in pending {
1780 match tx.body.kind {
1781 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. } => self.spawn_health_execution(tx).await,
1782 TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. } => self.spawn_browser_execution(tx).await,
1783 TransactionKind::ComputeJob { .. } => self.spawn_compute_execution(tx).await,
1784 _ => {}
1785 }
1786 }
1787 for task in scheduled_browser_tasks {
1788 self.spawn_monitor_browser_execution(task).await;
1789 }
1790 }
1791
1792 fn pending_check_plan(
1793 &self,
1794 chain: &ChainState,
1795 mempool: &BTreeMap<String, SignedTransaction>,
1796 ) -> Result<Option<(RoundRobinPlan, BTreeMap<String, usize>)>> {
1797 let mut health_checks = mempool
1798 .values()
1799 .filter(|tx| {
1800 matches!(
1801 tx.body.kind,
1802 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. } | TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. }
1803 )
1804 })
1805 .cloned()
1806 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1807 if health_checks.is_empty() {
1808 return Ok(None);
1809 }
1810 health_checks.sort_by(|left, right| {
1811 left.body
1812 .created_at
1813 .cmp(&right.body.created_at)
1814 .then_with(|| left.signer.cmp(&right.signer))
1815 .then_with(|| left.body.nonce.cmp(&right.body.nonce))
1816 .then_with(|| left.hash.cmp(&right.hash))
1817 });
1818 let task_keys = health_checks
1819 .iter()
1820 .map(|tx| tx.hash.clone())
1821 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1822 let index_by_tx_hash = health_checks
1823 .iter()
1824 .enumerate()
1825 .map(|(index, tx)| (tx.hash.clone(), index))
1826 .collect::<BTreeMap<_, _>>();
1827 let epoch_nonce = format!("health:{}:{}", chain.height + 1, chain.last_block_hash);
1828 let plan = RoundRobinPlan::build(
1829 RoundRobinDomain::HealthCheck,
1830 &chain.chain_id,
1831 &epoch_nonce,
1832 &chain.validators,
1833 &task_keys,
1834 chain.min_health_receipts,
1835 chain.validators.len() > chain.min_health_receipts,
1836 )?;
1837 Ok(Some((plan, index_by_tx_hash)))
1838 }
1839
1840 fn pending_monitor_browser_plan(
1841 &self,
1842 chain: &ChainState,
1843 tasks: &[ScheduledBrowserTask],
1844 ) -> Result<Option<(RoundRobinPlan, BTreeMap<String, usize>)>> {
1845 if tasks.is_empty() {
1846 return Ok(None);
1847 }
1848 let task_keys = tasks
1849 .iter()
1850 .map(|task| format!("{}:{}", task.monitor.monitor_id, task.slot_key))
1851 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1852 let index_by_task = task_keys
1853 .iter()
1854 .enumerate()
1855 .map(|(index, key)| (key.clone(), index))
1856 .collect::<BTreeMap<_, _>>();
1857 let epoch_nonce = format!(
1858 "monitor-browser:{}:{}:{}",
1859 chain.height + 1,
1860 chain.last_block_hash,
1861 task_keys.len()
1862 );
1863 let plan = RoundRobinPlan::build(
1864 RoundRobinDomain::MonitorBrowser,
1865 &chain.chain_id,
1866 &epoch_nonce,
1867 &chain.validators,
1868 &task_keys,
1869 chain.min_health_receipts,
1870 chain.validators.len() > chain.min_health_receipts,
1871 )?;
1872 Ok(Some((plan, index_by_task)))
1873 }
1874
1875 async fn prepare_monitor_work(
1876 &self,
1877 chain: &ChainState,
1878 pending_browser_receipts: &BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>>,
1879 pending_observations: &BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>>,
1880 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
1881 ) -> Result<(
1882 Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>,
1883 Vec<MonitorEvaluation>,
1884 Vec<MonitorBrowserBatch>,
1885 Vec<MonitorConfirmationBatch>,
1886 )> {
1887 let heartbeat_items = pending_observations
1888 .values()
1889 .flat_map(|items| items.iter().cloned())
1890 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1891 let mut evaluation_seen = BTreeSet::new();
1892 let mut evaluations = Vec::new();
1893 let mut monitor_browser_batches = Vec::new();
1894 let mut confirmation_targets = Vec::new();
1895
1896 for observation in &heartbeat_items {
1897 if observation.body.signal != HeartbeatSignal::Success {
1898 continue;
1899 }
1900 let existing_status = chain
1901 .monitor_slot_history
1902 .get(&observation.body.monitor_id)
1903 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&observation.body.slot_key))
1904 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
1905 let kind = if matches!(
1906 existing_status,
1907 Some(
1908 MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
1909 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
1910 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
1911 | MonitorSlotStatus::FailedExplicit
1912 )
1913 ) {
1914 MonitorEvaluationKind::Recovered
1915 } else {
1916 MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotSatisfied
1917 };
1918 if evaluation_seen.insert((
1919 observation.body.monitor_id.clone(),
1920 observation.body.slot_key.clone(),
1921 kind.clone(),
1922 )) {
1923 evaluations.push(MonitorEvaluation {
1924 monitor_id: observation.body.monitor_id.clone(),
1925 slot_key: observation.body.slot_key.clone(),
1926 kind,
1927 observed_at: proposed_at,
1928 });
1929 }
1930 }
1931
1932 for monitor in chain.monitors.values() {
1933 let due_slots = due_monitor_slot_starts(chain, monitor, proposed_at)?;
1934 let minimum_balance = monitor_minimum_slot_balance(&monitor.spec)?;
1935 if !monitor.paused && monitor.budget_balance < minimum_balance {
1936 let slot_key = due_slots
1937 .first()
1938 .map(DateTime::<Utc>::to_rfc3339)
1939 .or_else(|| monitor.next_slot_hint.clone())
1940 .unwrap_or_else(|| proposed_at.to_rfc3339());
1941 if evaluation_seen.insert((
1942 monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
1943 slot_key.clone(),
1944 MonitorEvaluationKind::InsufficientFunds,
1945 )) {
1946 evaluations.push(MonitorEvaluation {
1947 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
1948 slot_key,
1949 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::InsufficientFunds,
1950 observed_at: proposed_at,
1951 });
1952 }
1953 }
1954
1955 for slot_started_at in due_slots {
1956 let slot_key = slot_started_at.to_rfc3339();
1957 let existing_status = chain
1958 .monitor_slot_history
1959 .get(&monitor.monitor_id)
1960 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_key))
1961 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
1962
1963 let terminal = matches!(
1964 existing_status,
1965 Some(
1966 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
1967 | MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
1968 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
1969 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
1970 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
1971 | MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds
1972 )
1973 );
1974 if let Some(heartbeat) = monitor.spec.heartbeat_config() {
1975 let pending_key = heartbeat_slot_key(&monitor.monitor_id, &slot_key);
1976 let slot_pending = pending_observations.get(&pending_key);
1977 let has_success_pending = slot_pending
1978 .map(|items| {
1979 items
1980 .iter()
1981 .any(|item| item.body.signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success)
1982 })
1983 .unwrap_or(false);
1984 let deadline_at = monitor_effective_deadline(
1985 chain,
1986 monitor,
1987 slot_started_at,
1988 slot_pending.map(Vec::as_slice),
1989 )?;
1990 if monitor.paused
1991 || terminal
1992 || has_success_pending
1993 || proposed_at <= deadline_at
1994 {
1995 continue;
1996 }
1997 if evaluation_seen.insert((
1998 monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
1999 slot_key.clone(),
2000 MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
2001 )) {
2002 evaluations.push(MonitorEvaluation {
2003 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2004 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
2005 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
2006 observed_at: proposed_at,
2007 });
2008 }
2009 if matches!(
2010 heartbeat.miss_policy,
2011 MissPolicy::ConfirmWithValidators { .. }
2012 | MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents { .. }
2013 ) && heartbeat.confirmation_probe.is_some()
2014 {
2015 confirmation_targets.push((monitor.clone(), slot_key));
2016 }
2017 continue;
2018 }
2019
2020 let deadline_at = slot_deadline(slot_started_at, monitor.spec.grace_secs);
2021 let synthetic_tx_hash = monitor_browser_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, &slot_key)?;
2022 if let Some(receipts) = pending_browser_receipts.get(&synthetic_tx_hash)
2023 && let Ok(batch) =
2024 chain.summarize_monitor_browser_batch(monitor, &slot_key, receipts)
2025 {
2026 monitor_browser_batches.push(batch);
2027 continue;
2028 }
2029 if monitor.paused || terminal || proposed_at <= deadline_at {
2030 continue;
2031 }
2032 if evaluation_seen.insert((
2033 monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2034 slot_key.clone(),
2035 MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
2036 )) {
2037 evaluations.push(MonitorEvaluation {
2038 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2039 slot_key,
2040 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
2041 observed_at: proposed_at,
2042 });
2043 }
2044 }
2045 }
2046
2047 let confirmation_batches = self
2048 .plan_confirmation_batches(&chain.chain_id, chain, confirmation_targets)
2049 .await?;
2050
2051 Ok((
2052 heartbeat_items,
2053 evaluations,
2054 monitor_browser_batches,
2055 confirmation_batches,
2056 ))
2057 }
2058
2059 async fn plan_confirmation_batches(
2060 &self,
2061 chain_id: &str,
2062 chain: &ChainState,
2063 targets: Vec<(MonitorRecord, String)>,
2064 ) -> Result<Vec<MonitorConfirmationBatch>> {
2065 if targets.is_empty() {
2066 return Ok(Vec::new());
2067 }
2068
2069 let epoch_nonce = format!(
2070 "confirm:{}:{}:{}",
2071 chain.height + 1,
2072 chain.last_block_hash,
2073 targets.len()
2074 );
2075 let peer_directory = self.resolve_peer_directory().await;
2076 let mut grouped_targets = BTreeMap::<usize, Vec<(MonitorRecord, String)>>::new();
2077 for (monitor, slot_key) in targets {
2078 let heartbeat = monitor.spec.heartbeat_config().ok_or_else(|| {
2079 anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id)
2080 })?;
2081 let required = required_monitor_confirmation_receipts(
2082 heartbeat.miss_policy,
2083 chain.validators.len(),
2084 );
2085 if required == 0 {
2086 continue;
2087 }
2088 grouped_targets
2089 .entry(required)
2090 .or_default()
2091 .push((monitor, slot_key));
2092 }
2093
2094 let mut confirmation_batches = Vec::new();
2095 for (required_replicas, targets) in grouped_targets {
2096 let task_keys = targets
2097 .iter()
2098 .map(|(monitor, slot_key)| format!("{}:{slot_key}", monitor.monitor_id))
2099 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2100 let plan = RoundRobinPlan::build(
2101 RoundRobinDomain::MonitorConfirmation,
2102 chain_id,
2103 &epoch_nonce,
2104 &chain.validators,
2105 &task_keys,
2106 required_replicas,
2107 false,
2108 )?;
2109 for (task_index, (monitor, slot_key)) in targets.into_iter().enumerate() {
2110 let heartbeat = monitor.spec.heartbeat_config().ok_or_else(|| {
2111 anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id)
2112 })?;
2113 let assignment = plan
2114 .assignment_for_task(task_index)
2115 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("missing confirmation assignment for {task_index}"))?;
2116 let batch = self
2117 .request_monitor_confirmation_batch(
2118 chain_id,
2119 &monitor,
2120 &slot_key,
2121 &assignment.mandatory_providers,
2122 &peer_directory,
2123 )
2124 .await?;
2125 let delegated_ok = match heartbeat.miss_policy {
2126 MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents {
2127 require_region_diversity,
2128 ..
2129 } => {
2130 let required_delegated = required_delegated_probe_receipts(
2131 heartbeat.miss_policy,
2132 assignment.mandatory_providers.len(),
2133 );
2134 let delegated_agents = batch
2135 .delegated_receipts
2136 .iter()
2137 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.agent_public_key.clone())
2138 .collect::<BTreeSet<_>>();
2139 let delegated_regions = batch
2140 .delegated_receipts
2141 .iter()
2142 .filter_map(|receipt| receipt.body.region.as_deref())
2143 .map(str::trim)
2144 .filter(|region| !region.is_empty())
2145 .map(str::to_string)
2146 .collect::<BTreeSet<_>>();
2147 delegated_agents.len() >= required_delegated
2148 && delegated_regions.len() >= *require_region_diversity
2149 }
2150 MissPolicy::RecordOnly | MissPolicy::ConfirmWithValidators { .. } => true,
2151 };
2152 if batch.validator_receipts.len() >= required_replicas && delegated_ok {
2153 confirmation_batches.push(batch);
2154 }
2155 }
2156 }
2157 Ok(confirmation_batches)
2158 }
2159
2160 async fn request_monitor_confirmation_batch(
2161 &self,
2162 chain_id: &str,
2163 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2164 slot_key: &str,
2165 assigned_validators: &[Address],
2166 peer_directory: &BTreeMap<Address, String>,
2167 ) -> Result<MonitorConfirmationBatch> {
2168 let mut validator_receipts = Vec::new();
2169 let mut delegated_receipts = Vec::new();
2170 let assigned_validator_count = assigned_validators.len();
2171 if assigned_validators
2172 .iter()
2173 .any(|validator| validator == &self.address())
2174 {
2175 let direct_probe = direct_validator_for_addresses(assigned_validators).as_deref()
2176 == Some(self.address().as_str());
2177 let contribution = self
2178 .execute_monitor_confirmation_contribution(
2179 chain_id,
2180 monitor,
2181 slot_key,
2182 assigned_validator_count,
2183 direct_probe,
2184 )
2185 .await?;
2186 if let Some(receipt) = contribution.validator_receipt {
2187 validator_receipts.push(receipt);
2188 delegated_receipts.extend(contribution.delegated_receipts);
2189 }
2190 }
2191 let remote_validators = assigned_validators
2192 .iter()
2193 .filter(|validator| *validator != &self.address())
2194 .cloned()
2195 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2196 let futures = remote_validators.iter().filter_map(|validator| {
2197 let peer = peer_directory.get(validator)?.clone();
2198 Some(async move {
2199 let url = format!("{}/v1/internal/monitor/confirm", peer.trim_end_matches('/'));
2200 let mut request = self.http_client.post(url);
2201 if let Some(token) = self.config.gossip_api_token.as_deref() {
2202 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
2203 }
2204 let payload = MonitorConfirmRequest {
2205 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2206 slot_key: slot_key.to_string(),
2207 assigned_validator_count,
2208 direct_probe: direct_validator_for_addresses(assigned_validators).as_deref()
2209 == Some(validator.as_str()),
2210 };
2211 match request.json(&payload).send().await {
2212 Ok(response) if response.status().is_success() => response
2213 .json::<MonitorConfirmationContribution>()
2214 .await
2215 .ok()
2216 .and_then(|contribution| {
2217 let receipt = contribution.validator_receipt.as_ref()?;
2218 if receipt.body.executor != *validator {
2219 return None;
2220 }
2221 if contribution
2222 .delegated_receipts
2223 .iter()
2224 .any(|item| item.body.parent_validator != *validator)
2225 {
2226 return None;
2227 }
2228 Some(contribution)
2229 }),
2230 _ => None,
2231 }
2232 })
2233 });
2234 for contribution in join_all(futures).await.into_iter().flatten() {
2235 if let Some(receipt) = contribution.validator_receipt {
2236 validator_receipts.push(receipt);
2237 delegated_receipts.extend(contribution.delegated_receipts);
2238 }
2239 }
2240 Ok(MonitorConfirmationBatch {
2241 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2242 slot_key: slot_key.to_string(),
2243 validator_receipts,
2244 delegated_receipts,
2245 })
2246 }
2247
2248 async fn execute_monitor_confirmation_contribution(
2249 &self,
2250 chain_id: &str,
2251 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2252 slot_key: &str,
2253 assigned_validator_count: usize,
2254 direct_probe: bool,
2255 ) -> Result<MonitorConfirmationContribution> {
2256 let heartbeat = monitor
2257 .spec
2258 .heartbeat_config()
2259 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2260 let agents = self.configured_probe_agents().await?;
2261 let selected = self.select_local_probe_agents(
2262 chain_id,
2263 monitor,
2264 slot_key,
2265 assigned_validator_count,
2266 direct_probe,
2267 &agents,
2268 )?;
2269 let delegated_receipts = if selected.is_empty() {
2270 Vec::new()
2271 } else {
2272 self.dispatch_probe_agent_leases(chain_id, monitor, slot_key, &selected)
2273 .await?
2274 };
2275 let validator_receipt = if direct_probe {
2276 Some(
2277 self.execute_monitor_confirmation_direct(chain_id, monitor, slot_key)
2278 .await?,
2279 )
2280 } else {
2281 self.summarize_delegated_receipts_as_validator_receipt(
2282 chain_id,
2283 monitor,
2284 slot_key,
2285 assigned_validator_count,
2286 &delegated_receipts,
2287 )?
2288 };
2289 if !direct_probe && validator_receipt.is_none() {
2290 bail!(
2291 "probe agents did not produce a verifiable confirmation result for {}:{}",
2292 monitor.monitor_id,
2293 slot_key
2294 );
2295 }
2296 let delegated_receipts = match heartbeat.miss_policy {
2297 MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents { .. } => delegated_receipts,
2298 MissPolicy::RecordOnly | MissPolicy::ConfirmWithValidators { .. } => Vec::new(),
2299 };
2300 Ok(MonitorConfirmationContribution {
2301 validator_receipt,
2302 delegated_receipts,
2303 })
2304 }
2305
2306 async fn configured_probe_agents(&self) -> Result<Vec<ConfiguredProbeAgent>> {
2307 let Some(path) = self.config.probe_agents_path.as_deref() else {
2308 return Ok(Vec::new());
2309 };
2310 let registry = read_json_optional::<ProbeAgentRegistry>(path)
2311 .await?
2312 .unwrap_or_default();
2313 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
2314 let mut agents = Vec::new();
2315 for agent in registry.agents {
2316 if !agent.enabled {
2317 continue;
2318 }
2319 if agent.public_key.trim().is_empty() {
2320 bail!("probe agent public_key cannot be empty");
2321 }
2322 if agent.endpoint.trim().is_empty() {
2323 bail!("probe agent endpoint cannot be empty");
2324 }
2325 if seen.insert(agent.public_key.clone()) {
2326 agents.push(agent);
2327 }
2328 }
2329 agents.sort_by(|left, right| {
2330 left.public_key
2331 .cmp(&right.public_key)
2332 .then_with(|| left.endpoint.cmp(&right.endpoint))
2333 });
2334 Ok(agents)
2335 }
2336
2337 fn select_local_probe_agents(
2338 &self,
2339 chain_id: &str,
2340 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2341 slot_key: &str,
2342 assigned_validator_count: usize,
2343 direct_probe: bool,
2344 agents: &[ConfiguredProbeAgent],
2345 ) -> Result<Vec<ConfiguredProbeAgent>> {
2346 let heartbeat = monitor
2347 .spec
2348 .heartbeat_config()
2349 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2350 let required = required_confirmation_execution_agents(
2351 heartbeat.miss_policy,
2352 assigned_validator_count,
2353 agents.len(),
2354 direct_probe,
2355 );
2356 let epoch_nonce = format!(
2357 "agent-confirm:{}:{}:{}",
2358 monitor.monitor_id, slot_key, assigned_validator_count
2359 );
2360 let task_key = format!("{}:{slot_key}:{}", monitor.monitor_id, self.address());
2361 self.select_round_robin_agents(chain_id, &epoch_nonce, &task_key, required, agents)
2362 }
2363
2364 fn select_round_robin_agents(
2365 &self,
2366 chain_id: &str,
2367 epoch_nonce: &str,
2368 task_key: &str,
2369 required: usize,
2370 agents: &[ConfiguredProbeAgent],
2371 ) -> Result<Vec<ConfiguredProbeAgent>> {
2372 if required == 0 || agents.is_empty() {
2373 return Ok(Vec::new());
2374 }
2375 let providers = agents
2376 .iter()
2377 .map(|agent| agent.public_key.clone())
2378 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2379 let task_keys = vec![task_key.to_string()];
2380 let plan = RoundRobinPlan::build(
2381 RoundRobinDomain::MonitorConfirmation,
2382 chain_id,
2383 epoch_nonce,
2384 &providers,
2385 &task_keys,
2386 required,
2387 false,
2388 )?;
2389 let agent_directory = agents
2390 .iter()
2391 .map(|agent| (agent.public_key.clone(), agent.clone()))
2392 .collect::<BTreeMap<_, _>>();
2393 let mut selected = Vec::new();
2394 let mut selected_keys = BTreeSet::new();
2395 let mut seen_regions = BTreeSet::new();
2396
2397 for public_key in &plan.providers {
2398 if selected.len() >= required {
2399 break;
2400 }
2401 let Some(agent) = agent_directory.get(public_key) else {
2402 continue;
2403 };
2404 let Some(region) = agent.region.as_deref().map(str::trim) else {
2405 continue;
2406 };
2407 if region.is_empty() || !seen_regions.insert(region.to_string()) {
2408 continue;
2409 }
2410 if selected_keys.insert(agent.public_key.clone()) {
2411 selected.push(agent.clone());
2412 }
2413 }
2414 for public_key in &plan.providers {
2415 if selected.len() >= required {
2416 break;
2417 }
2418 let Some(agent) = agent_directory.get(public_key) else {
2419 continue;
2420 };
2421 if selected_keys.insert(agent.public_key.clone()) {
2422 selected.push(agent.clone());
2423 }
2424 }
2425 Ok(selected)
2426 }
2427
2428 async fn execute_health_check_with_probe_agent(
2429 &self,
2430 chain_id: &str,
2431 tx_hash: &str,
2432 spec: &HealthCheckSpec,
2433 agent: &ConfiguredProbeAgent,
2434 ) -> Result<SignedHealthReceipt> {
2435 let issued_at = Utc::now();
2436 let expires_at = issued_at
2437 + chrono::Duration::milliseconds(spec.timeout_ms.saturating_add(2_000) as i64);
2438 let monitor_id = format!("health-check:{tx_hash}");
2439 let slot_key = "adhoc".to_string();
2440 let lease_id = compute_hash(&(
2441 chain_id.to_string(),
2442 tx_hash.to_string(),
2443 spec.request_id.clone(),
2444 self.address(),
2445 agent.public_key.clone(),
2446 "health-check-agent",
2447 ))?;
2448 let lease = self.wallet.sign_probe_agent_lease(SignedProbeAgentLease {
2449 id: String::new(),
2450 body: ProbeAgentLeaseBody {
2451 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
2452 lease_id,
2453 parent_validator: String::new(),
2454 agent_public_key: agent.public_key.clone(),
2455 monitor_id: monitor_id.clone(),
2456 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
2457 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
2458 spec: spec.clone(),
2459 issued_at,
2460 expires_at,
2461 audit: false,
2462 },
2463 signature: String::new(),
2464 })?;
2465 let url = format!(
2466 "{}/v1/internal/agent/confirm",
2467 agent.endpoint.trim_end_matches('/')
2468 );
2469 let mut request = self
2470 .http_client
2471 .post(url)
2472 .timeout(Duration::from_millis(spec.timeout_ms.saturating_add(2_000)));
2473 if let Some(token) = agent.api_token.as_deref() {
2474 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
2475 }
2476 let response = request.json(&lease).send().await?;
2477 if !response.status().is_success() {
2478 bail!("probe agent {} rejected lease", agent.public_key);
2479 }
2480 let payload = response.json::<AgentConfirmationResponse>().await?;
2481 let receipt = payload.delegated_receipt;
2482 verify_delegated_probe_receipt(&receipt)?;
2483 if receipt.body.chain_id != chain_id {
2484 bail!("probe agent receipt chain_id mismatch");
2485 }
2486 if receipt.body.monitor_id != monitor_id || receipt.body.slot_key != slot_key {
2487 bail!("probe agent receipt slot mismatch");
2488 }
2489 if receipt.body.parent_validator != self.address() {
2490 bail!("probe agent receipt parent validator mismatch");
2491 }
2492 if receipt.body.agent_public_key != agent.public_key {
2493 bail!("probe agent receipt agent_public_key mismatch");
2494 }
2495 if receipt.body.request_id.as_deref() != Some(spec.request_id.as_str()) {
2496 bail!("probe agent receipt request_id mismatch");
2497 }
2498 if receipt.body.lease_id.as_deref() != Some(lease.id.as_str()) {
2499 bail!("probe agent receipt lease_id mismatch");
2500 }
2501 self.sign_health_receipt_from_probe_result(
2502 chain_id,
2503 tx_hash,
2504 &spec.request_id,
2505 receipt.body.observed_at,
2506 HealthExecution {
2507 response_status: receipt.body.response_status,
2508 latency_ms: receipt.body.latency_ms,
2509 success: receipt.body.success,
2510 assertion_results: receipt.body.assertion_results,
2511 response_headers: receipt.body.response_headers,
2512 response_body_sample: receipt.body.response_body_sample,
2513 error: receipt.body.error,
2514 },
2515 )
2516 }
2517
2518 fn sign_health_receipt_from_probe_result(
2519 &self,
2520 chain_id: &str,
2521 tx_hash: &str,
2522 request_id: &str,
2523 observed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
2524 outcome: HealthExecution,
2525 ) -> Result<SignedHealthReceipt> {
2526 self.wallet.sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
2527 id: String::new(),
2528 body: HealthReceiptBody {
2529 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
2530 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
2531 request_id: request_id.to_string(),
2532 executor: String::new(),
2533 observed_at,
2534 response_status: outcome.response_status,
2535 latency_ms: outcome.latency_ms,
2536 success: outcome.success,
2537 assertion_results: outcome.assertion_results,
2538 response_headers: outcome.response_headers,
2539 response_body_sample: outcome.response_body_sample,
2540 error: outcome.error,
2541 },
2542 signature: String::new(),
2543 })
2544 }
2545
2546 async fn dispatch_probe_agent_leases(
2547 &self,
2548 chain_id: &str,
2549 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2550 slot_key: &str,
2551 agents: &[ConfiguredProbeAgent],
2552 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt>> {
2553 let heartbeat = monitor
2554 .spec
2555 .heartbeat_config()
2556 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2557 let mut spec = heartbeat
2558 .confirmation_probe
2559 .cloned()
2560 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor is missing confirmation_probe"))?;
2561 let request_id = monitor_confirmation_request_id(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key);
2562 spec.request_id = request_id.clone();
2563 let issued_at = Utc::now();
2564 let expires_at = issued_at
2565 + chrono::Duration::milliseconds(spec.timeout_ms.saturating_add(2_000) as i64);
2566 let futures = agents.iter().enumerate().map(|(index, agent)| {
2567 let mut spec = spec.clone();
2568 let chain_id = chain_id.to_string();
2569 let monitor_id = monitor.monitor_id.clone();
2570 let slot_key = slot_key.to_string();
2571 let request_id = request_id.clone();
2572 let agent = agent.clone();
2573 async move {
2574 spec.request_id = request_id.clone();
2575 let lease_id = compute_hash(&(
2576 chain_id.clone(),
2577 monitor_id.clone(),
2578 slot_key.clone(),
2579 request_id.clone(),
2580 self.address(),
2581 agent.public_key.clone(),
2582 index,
2583 ))?;
2584 let lease = self.wallet.sign_probe_agent_lease(SignedProbeAgentLease {
2585 id: String::new(),
2586 body: ProbeAgentLeaseBody {
2587 chain_id: chain_id.clone(),
2588 lease_id: lease_id.clone(),
2589 parent_validator: String::new(),
2590 agent_public_key: agent.public_key.clone(),
2591 monitor_id: monitor_id.clone(),
2592 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
2593 request_id: request_id.clone(),
2594 spec,
2595 issued_at,
2596 expires_at,
2597 audit: false,
2598 },
2599 signature: String::new(),
2600 })?;
2601 let url = format!(
2602 "{}/v1/internal/agent/confirm",
2603 agent.endpoint.trim_end_matches('/')
2604 );
2605 let mut request = self.http_client.post(url).timeout(Duration::from_millis(
2606 lease.body.spec.timeout_ms.saturating_add(2_000),
2607 ));
2608 if let Some(token) = agent.api_token.as_deref() {
2609 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
2610 }
2611 let response = request.json(&lease).send().await?;
2612 if !response.status().is_success() {
2613 bail!("probe agent {} rejected lease", agent.public_key);
2614 }
2615 let payload = response.json::<AgentConfirmationResponse>().await?;
2616 let receipt = payload.delegated_receipt;
2617 verify_delegated_probe_receipt(&receipt)?;
2618 if receipt.body.chain_id != chain_id {
2619 bail!("probe agent receipt chain_id mismatch");
2620 }
2621 if receipt.body.monitor_id != monitor_id || receipt.body.slot_key != slot_key {
2622 bail!("probe agent receipt slot mismatch");
2623 }
2624 if receipt.body.parent_validator != self.address() {
2625 bail!("probe agent receipt parent validator mismatch");
2626 }
2627 if receipt.body.agent_public_key != agent.public_key {
2628 bail!("probe agent receipt agent_public_key mismatch");
2629 }
2630 if receipt.body.lease_id.as_deref() != Some(lease.id.as_str()) {
2631 bail!("probe agent receipt lease_id mismatch");
2632 }
2633 if receipt.body.request_id.as_deref() != Some(request_id.as_str()) {
2634 bail!("probe agent receipt request_id mismatch");
2635 }
2636 Ok::<_, anyhow::Error>(receipt)
2637 }
2638 });
2639
2640 let mut receipts = Vec::new();
2641 for receipt in join_all(futures).await.into_iter().flatten() {
2642 receipts.push(receipt);
2643 }
2644 Ok(receipts)
2645 }
2646
2647 fn summarize_delegated_receipts_as_validator_receipt(
2648 &self,
2649 chain_id: &str,
2650 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2651 slot_key: &str,
2652 assigned_validator_count: usize,
2653 delegated_receipts: &[SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt],
2654 ) -> Result<Option<SignedHealthReceipt>> {
2655 let heartbeat = monitor
2656 .spec
2657 .heartbeat_config()
2658 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2659 let mut unique = Vec::new();
2660 let mut seen_agents = BTreeSet::new();
2661 let synthetic_request_id = monitor_confirmation_request_id(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key);
2662 for receipt in delegated_receipts {
2663 verify_delegated_probe_receipt(receipt)?;
2664 if receipt.body.chain_id != chain_id {
2665 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt is for a different chain");
2666 }
2667 if receipt.body.monitor_id != monitor.monitor_id || receipt.body.slot_key != slot_key {
2668 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt slot mismatch");
2669 }
2670 if receipt.body.parent_validator != self.address() {
2671 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt parent validator mismatch");
2672 }
2673 if receipt.body.request_id.as_deref() != Some(synthetic_request_id.as_str()) {
2674 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt request_id mismatch");
2675 }
2676 if receipt
2677 .body
2678 .lease_id
2679 .as_deref()
2680 .map(str::trim)
2681 .unwrap_or_default()
2682 .is_empty()
2683 {
2684 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt lease_id cannot be empty");
2685 }
2686 if seen_agents.insert(receipt.body.agent_public_key.clone()) {
2687 unique.push(receipt.clone());
2688 }
2689 }
2690 let required = required_local_agent_receipts(
2691 heartbeat.miss_policy,
2692 assigned_validator_count,
2693 unique.len(),
2694 );
2695 if required > 0 && unique.len() < required {
2696 return Ok(None);
2697 }
2698 let mut clusters = BTreeMap::<String, Vec<SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt>>::new();
2699 for receipt in &unique {
2700 let outcome_key = delegated_receipt_outcome_key(receipt)?;
2701 clusters
2702 .entry(outcome_key)
2703 .or_default()
2704 .push(receipt.clone());
2705 }
2706 let mut best_key = None;
2707 let mut best_len = 0usize;
2708 let mut tied = false;
2709 for (key, cluster) in &clusters {
2710 if cluster.len() > best_len {
2711 best_key = Some(key.clone());
2712 best_len = cluster.len();
2713 tied = false;
2714 } else if cluster.len() == best_len {
2715 tied = true;
2716 }
2717 }
2718 let Some(best_key) = best_key else {
2719 return Ok(None);
2720 };
2721 if tied {
2722 return Ok(None);
2723 }
2724 let winning_cluster = clusters.remove(&best_key).unwrap_or_default();
2725 if winning_cluster.len() * 2 <= unique.len() {
2726 return Ok(None);
2727 }
2728 let representative = winning_cluster
2729 .first()
2730 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("missing delegated confirmation representative"))?;
2731 Ok(Some(self.wallet.sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
2732 id: String::new(),
2733 body: HealthReceiptBody {
2734 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
2735 tx_hash: monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key)?,
2736 request_id: synthetic_request_id,
2737 executor: String::new(),
2738 observed_at: representative.body.observed_at,
2739 response_status: representative.body.response_status,
2740 latency_ms: representative.body.latency_ms,
2741 success: representative.body.success,
2742 assertion_results: representative.body.assertion_results.clone(),
2743 response_headers: representative.body.response_headers.clone(),
2744 response_body_sample: representative.body.response_body_sample.clone(),
2745 error: representative.body.error.clone(),
2746 },
2747 signature: String::new(),
2748 })?))
2749 }
2750
2751 async fn execute_monitor_confirmation_direct(
2752 &self,
2753 chain_id: &str,
2754 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2755 slot_key: &str,
2756 ) -> Result<SignedHealthReceipt> {
2757 let heartbeat = monitor
2758 .spec
2759 .heartbeat_config()
2760 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2761 let mut spec = heartbeat
2762 .confirmation_probe
2763 .cloned()
2764 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("monitor is missing confirmation_probe"))?;
2765 spec.request_id = monitor_confirmation_request_id(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key);
2766 let tx_hash = monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key)?;
2767 let outcome = execute_health_check(&spec).await;
2768 self.wallet.sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
2769 id: String::new(),
2770 body: HealthReceiptBody {
2771 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
2772 tx_hash,
2773 request_id: spec.request_id,
2774 executor: String::new(),
2775 observed_at: Utc::now(),
2776 response_status: outcome.response_status,
2777 latency_ms: outcome.latency_ms,
2778 success: outcome.success,
2779 assertion_results: outcome.assertion_results,
2780 response_headers: outcome.response_headers,
2781 response_body_sample: outcome.response_body_sample,
2782 error: outcome.error,
2783 },
2784 signature: String::new(),
2785 })
2786 }
2787
2788 async fn spawn_health_execution(&self, tx: SignedTransaction) {
2789 let runtime = Arc::new(self.clone());
2790 tokio::spawn(async move {
2791 let has_probe_agents = runtime
2792 .configured_probe_agents()
2793 .await
2794 .map(|agents| !agents.is_empty())
2795 .unwrap_or(false);
2796 let execution_mode = {
2797 let state = runtime.state.read().await;
2798 let already_executed = state
2799 .receipts
2800 .get(&tx.hash)
2801 .map(|receipts| {
2802 receipts
2803 .iter()
2804 .any(|receipt| receipt.body.executor == runtime.address())
2805 })
2806 .unwrap_or(false);
2807 if state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&tx.hash)
2808 || already_executed
