2809 || !state.chain.validators.contains(&runtime.address())
2810 {
2811 None
2812 } else if !has_probe_agents {
2813 Some(true)
2814 } else if let Ok(Some((plan, index_by_tx_hash))) =
2815 runtime.pending_check_plan(&state.chain, &state.mempool)
2816 {
2817 index_by_tx_hash.get(&tx.hash).and_then(|task_index| {
2818 let assignment = plan.assignment_for_task(*task_index)?;
2819 if !plan.provider_should_execute(&runtime.address(), *task_index) {
2820 return None;
2821 }
2822 Some(validator_should_run_direct_probe(
2823 &runtime.address(),
2824 &assignment,
2825 ))
2826 })
2827 } else {
2828 Some(true)
2829 }
2830 };
2831 let Some(direct_probe) = execution_mode else {
2832 return;
2833 };
2834
2835 let TransactionKind::HealthCheck { spec } = tx.body.kind.clone() else {
2836 return;
2837 };
2838
2839 match runtime
2840 .execute_health_check_receipt(&tx.body.chain_id, &tx.hash, &spec, direct_probe)
2841 .await
2842 {
2843 Ok(receipt) => {
2844 if let Err(error) = runtime.accept_receipt(receipt, true).await {
2845 warn!(?error, tx_hash = %tx.hash, "failed to submit health receipt");
2846 }
2847 }
2848 Err(error) => warn!(?error, tx_hash = %tx.hash, "failed to create health receipt"),
2849 }
2850 });
2851 }
2852
2853 async fn execute_health_check_receipt(
2854 &self,
2855 chain_id: &str,
2856 tx_hash: &str,
2857 spec: &HealthCheckSpec,
2858 direct_probe: bool,
2859 ) -> Result<SignedHealthReceipt> {
2860 if direct_probe {
2861 let outcome = execute_health_check(spec).await;
2862 return self.sign_health_receipt_from_probe_result(
2863 chain_id,
2864 tx_hash,
2865 &spec.request_id,
2866 Utc::now(),
2867 outcome,
2868 );
2869 }
2870 let agents = self.configured_probe_agents().await?;
2871 let selected = self.select_round_robin_agents(
2872 chain_id,
2873 &format!("health-check-agent:{tx_hash}:{}", spec.request_id),
2874 &format!("{tx_hash}:{}", spec.request_id),
2875 1,
2876 &agents,
2877 )?;
2878 let Some(agent) = selected.first() else {
2879 let outcome = execute_health_check(spec).await;
2880 return self.sign_health_receipt_from_probe_result(
2881 chain_id,
2882 tx_hash,
2883 &spec.request_id,
2884 Utc::now(),
2885 outcome,
2886 );
2887 };
2888 self.execute_health_check_with_probe_agent(chain_id, tx_hash, spec, agent)
2889 .await
2890 }
2891
2892 async fn spawn_browser_execution(&self, tx: SignedTransaction) {
2893 let runtime = Arc::new(self.clone());
2894 tokio::spawn(async move {
2895 let has_probe_agents = runtime
2896 .configured_probe_agents()
2897 .await
2898 .map(|agents| !agents.is_empty())
2899 .unwrap_or(false);
2900 let execution_mode = {
2901 let state = runtime.state.read().await;
2902 let already_executed = state
2903 .browser_receipts
2904 .get(&tx.hash)
2905 .map(|receipts| {
2906 receipts
2907 .iter()
2908 .any(|receipt| receipt.body.executor == runtime.address())
2909 })
2910 .unwrap_or(false);
2911 if state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&tx.hash)
2912 || already_executed
2913 || !state.chain.validators.contains(&runtime.address())
2914 {
2915 None
2916 } else if !has_probe_agents {
2917 Some(true)
2918 } else if let Ok(Some((plan, index_by_tx_hash))) =
2919 runtime.pending_check_plan(&state.chain, &state.mempool)
2920 {
2921 index_by_tx_hash.get(&tx.hash).and_then(|task_index| {
2922 let assignment = plan.assignment_for_task(*task_index)?;
2923 if !plan.provider_should_execute(&runtime.address(), *task_index) {
2924 return None;
2925 }
2926 Some(validator_should_run_direct_probe(
2927 &runtime.address(),
2928 &assignment,
2929 ))
2930 })
2931 } else {
2932 Some(true)
2933 }
2934 };
2935 let Some(direct_probe) = execution_mode else {
2936 return;
2937 };
2938
2939 let TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { spec } = tx.body.kind.clone() else {
2940 return;
2941 };
2942
2943 match runtime
2944 .execute_browser_check_receipt(
2945 &tx.body.chain_id,
2946 &tx.hash,
2947 &spec,
2948 None,
2949 direct_probe,
2950 )
2951 .await
2952 {
2953 Ok(receipt) => {
2954 if let Err(error) = runtime.accept_browser_receipt(receipt, true).await {
2955 warn!(?error, tx_hash = %tx.hash, "failed to submit browser receipt");
2956 }
2957 }
2958 Err(error) => {
2959 warn!(?error, tx_hash = %tx.hash, "failed to create browser receipt");
2960 }
2961 }
2962 });
2963 }
2964
2965 async fn spawn_compute_execution(&self, tx: SignedTransaction) {
2966 let runtime = Arc::new(self.clone());
2967 tokio::spawn(async move {
2968 let should_execute = {
2969 let state = runtime.state.read().await;
2970 state.chain.validators.contains(&runtime.address())
2971 && !state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&tx.hash)
2972 && !state
2973 .compute_receipts
2974 .get(&tx.hash)
2975 .map(|receipts| {
2976 receipts
2977 .iter()
2978 .any(|receipt| receipt.body.executor == runtime.address())
2979 })
2980 .unwrap_or(false)
2981 };
2982 if !should_execute {
2983 return;
2984 }
2985 let TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec } = tx.body.kind.clone() else {
2986 return;
2987 };
2988 match runtime
2989 .execute_compute_job_receipt(&tx.body.chain_id, &tx.hash, &spec)
2990 .await
2991 {
2992 Ok(receipt) => {
2993 if let Err(error) = runtime.accept_compute_receipt(receipt, true).await {
2994 warn!(?error, tx_hash = %tx.hash, "failed to submit compute receipt");
2995 }
2996 }
2997 Err(error) => {
2998 warn!(?error, tx_hash = %tx.hash, "failed to create compute receipt");
2999 }
3000 }
3001 });
3002 }
3003
3004 async fn execute_compute_job_receipt(
3005 &self,
3006 chain_id: &str,
3007 tx_hash: &str,
3008 spec: &ComputeJobSpec,
3009 ) -> Result<SignedComputeReceipt> {
3010 let started = std::time::Instant::now();
3011 let job_hash = compute_job_hash(spec)?;
3012 let agents = self.configured_probe_agents().await?;
3013 let task_keys = spec
3014 .shards
3015 .iter()
3016 .map(|shard| shard.shard_id.clone())
3017 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
3018 let providers = agents
3019 .iter()
3020 .map(|agent| agent.public_key.clone())
3021 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
3022 let plan = RoundRobinPlan::build(
3023 RoundRobinDomain::Compute,
3024 chain_id,
3025 &format!("compute:{tx_hash}:{}", spec.request_id),
3026 &providers,
3027 &task_keys,
3028 1,
3029 false,
3030 )?;
3031 let agent_directory = agents
3032 .iter()
3033 .map(|agent| (agent.public_key.clone(), agent.clone()))
3034 .collect::<BTreeMap<_, _>>();
3035 let mut outputs = Vec::with_capacity(spec.shards.len());
3036 let mut assigned_agents = BTreeMap::new();
3037 for (index, shard) in spec.shards.iter().enumerate() {
3038 let selected_agent = plan
3039 .assignment_for_task(index)
3040 .and_then(|assignment| assignment.mandatory_providers.first().cloned())
3041 .and_then(|public_key| agent_directory.get(&public_key).cloned());
3042 let output = if let Some(agent) = selected_agent {
3043 assigned_agents.insert(shard.shard_id.clone(), agent.public_key.clone());
3044 match self
3045 .execute_compute_shard_with_agent(
3046 chain_id, tx_hash, spec, shard, &job_hash, &agent,
3047 )
3048 .await
3049 {
3050 Ok(output) => output,
3051 Err(error) => {
3052 warn!(
3053 ?error,
3054 tx_hash,
3055 shard_id = %shard.shard_id,
3056 agent = %agent.public_key,
3057 "compute agent failed shard; falling back to validator execution"
3058 );
3059 self.execute_compute_shard_locally(tx_hash, spec, shard)
3060 .await?
3061 }
3062 }
3063 } else {
3064 self.execute_compute_shard_locally(tx_hash, spec, shard)
3065 .await?
3066 };
3067 outputs.push(output);
3068 }
3069 let reduction = reduce_compute_outputs(spec, &outputs);
3070 let success = reduction.is_ok() && outputs.iter().all(|output| output.success);
3071 let (reduced_output, error) = match reduction {
3072 Ok(value) => (Some(value), None),
3073 Err(error) => (None, Some(error.to_string())),
3074 };
3075 let latency_ms = started.elapsed().as_millis().min(u128::from(u64::MAX)) as u64;
3076 self.wallet.sign_compute_receipt(SignedComputeReceipt {
3077 id: String::new(),
3078 body: ComputeReceiptBody {
3079 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
3080 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
3081 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3082 executor: String::new(),
3083 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3084 job_hash,
3085 assigned_agents,
3086 shard_outputs: outputs,
3087 reduced_output,
3088 latency_ms,
3089 success,
3090 error,
3091 },
3092 signature: String::new(),
3093 })
3094 }
3095
3096 async fn execute_compute_shard_with_agent(
3097 &self,
3098 chain_id: &str,
3099 tx_hash: &str,
3100 spec: &ComputeJobSpec,
3101 shard: &crate::compute::ComputeShardSpec,
3102 job_hash: &str,
3103 agent: &ConfiguredProbeAgent,
3104 ) -> Result<crate::compute::ComputeShardOutput> {
3105 let issued_at = Utc::now();
3106 let expires_at = issued_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(spec.max_runtime_secs as i64 + 5);
3107 let lease_id = compute_hash(&(
3108 chain_id.to_string(),
3109 tx_hash.to_string(),
3110 spec.request_id.clone(),
3111 shard.shard_id.clone(),
3112 self.address(),
3113 agent.public_key.clone(),
3114 "compute-shard-agent",
3115 ))?;
3116 let lease = self
3117 .wallet
3118 .sign_compute_shard_lease(SignedComputeShardLease {
3119 id: String::new(),
3120 body: ComputeShardLeaseBody {
3121 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
3122 lease_id,
3123 parent_validator: String::new(),
3124 agent_public_key: agent.public_key.clone(),
3125 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
3126 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3127 job_hash: job_hash.to_string(),
3128 workload: spec.workload.clone(),
3129 reducer: spec.reducer.clone(),
3130 max_runtime_secs: spec.max_runtime_secs,
3131 sandbox: spec.sandbox.clone(),
3132 artifact_policy: spec.artifact_policy.clone(),
3133 shard: shard.clone(),
3134 issued_at,
3135 expires_at,
3136 audit: false,
3137 },
3138 signature: String::new(),
3139 })?;
3140 verify_compute_shard_lease(&lease)?;
3141 let url = format!(
3142 "{}/v1/internal/agent/compute-shard",
3143 agent.endpoint.trim_end_matches('/')
3144 );
3145 let mut request = self
3146 .http_client
3147 .post(url)
3148 .timeout(Duration::from_secs(spec.max_runtime_secs + 5));
3149 if let Some(token) = agent.api_token.as_deref() {
3150 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
3151 }
3152 let response = request.json(&lease).send().await?;
3153 if !response.status().is_success() {
3154 bail!("compute agent {} rejected shard lease", agent.public_key);
3155 }
3156 let payload = response.json::<AgentComputeResponse>().await?;
3157 let receipt = payload.delegated_receipt;
3158 verify_delegated_compute_shard_receipt(&receipt)?;
3159 if receipt.body.chain_id != chain_id {
3160 bail!("compute agent receipt chain_id mismatch");
3161 }
3162 if receipt.body.tx_hash != tx_hash {
3163 bail!("compute agent receipt tx_hash mismatch");
3164 }
3165 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
3166 bail!("compute agent receipt request_id mismatch");
3167 }
3168 if receipt.body.job_hash != job_hash {
3169 bail!("compute agent receipt job_hash mismatch");
3170 }
3171 if receipt.body.parent_validator != self.address() {
3172 bail!("compute agent receipt parent validator mismatch");
3173 }
3174 if receipt.body.agent_public_key != agent.public_key {
3175 bail!("compute agent receipt agent_public_key mismatch");
3176 }
3177 if receipt.body.lease_id != lease.id {
3178 bail!("compute agent receipt lease_id mismatch");
3179 }
3180 if receipt.body.shard_output.shard_id != shard.shard_id {
3181 bail!("compute agent receipt shard_id mismatch");
3182 }
3183 let mut output = receipt.body.shard_output;
3184 self.mirror_compute_artifacts_from_agent(tx_hash, &mut output, agent)
3185 .await?;
3186 Ok(output)
3187 }
3188
3189 async fn execute_compute_shard_locally(
3190 &self,
3191 tx_hash: &str,
3192 spec: &ComputeJobSpec,
3193 shard: &crate::compute::ComputeShardSpec,
3194 ) -> Result<crate::compute::ComputeShardOutput> {
3195 execute_compute_shard_isolated(
3196 spec,
3197 shard,
3198 tx_hash,
3199 &self.address(),
3200 &compute_sandbox_dir(&self.config.state_dir),
3201 &compute_artifact_dir(&self.config.state_dir),
3202 )
3203 .await
3204 }
3205
3206 async fn mirror_compute_artifacts_from_agent(
3207 &self,
3208 tx_hash: &str,
3209 output: &mut crate::compute::ComputeShardOutput,
3210 agent: &ConfiguredProbeAgent,
3211 ) -> Result<()> {
3212 if output.artifacts.is_empty() {
3213 return Ok(());
3214 }
3215 let shard_id = output.shard_id.clone();
3216 for artifact in &mut output.artifacts {
3217 if artifact.provider != agent.public_key {
3218 bail!("compute agent artifact provider mismatch");
3219 }
3220 let url = format!(
3221 "{}/v1/internal/agent/compute-artifacts/{}/{}/{}",
3222 agent.endpoint.trim_end_matches('/'),
3223 tx_hash,
3224 shard_id,
3225 artifact.path
3226 );
3227 let mut request = self.http_client.get(url).timeout(Duration::from_secs(30));
3228 if let Some(token) = agent.api_token.as_deref() {
3229 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
3230 }
3231 let response = request.send().await?;
3232 if !response.status().is_success() {
3233 bail!("compute agent {} did not return artifact", agent.public_key);
3234 }
3235 let bytes = response.bytes().await?;
3236 if bytes.len() as u64 != artifact.size_bytes {
3237 bail!("compute agent artifact size mismatch");
3238 }
3239 let mut hasher = Sha256::new();
3240 hasher.update(&bytes);
3241 if hex::encode(hasher.finalize()) != artifact.sha256 {
3242 bail!("compute agent artifact hash mismatch");
3243 }
3244 let local_path = compute_artifact_path(
3245 &compute_artifact_dir(&self.config.state_dir),
3246 tx_hash,
3247 &shard_id,
3248 &artifact.path,
3249 )?;
3250 if let Some(parent) = local_path.parent() {
3251 fs::create_dir_all(parent).await?;
3252 }
3253 fs::write(&local_path, &bytes).await?;
3254 artifact.provider = self.address();
3255 }
3256 Ok(())
3257 }
3258
3259 async fn spawn_monitor_browser_execution(&self, task: ScheduledBrowserTask) {
3260 let runtime = Arc::new(self.clone());
3261 tokio::spawn(async move {
3262 let Some((chain_id, tx_hash, spec, monitor_id, slot_key, direct_probe)) = ({
3263 let state = runtime.state.read().await;
3264 let monitor = match state.chain.monitors.get(&task.monitor.monitor_id).cloned() {
3265 Some(monitor) => monitor,
3266 None => return,
3267 };
3268 let package = match monitor.spec.browser_package().cloned() {
3269 Some(package) => package,
3270 None => return,
3271 };
3272 let tx_hash = match monitor_browser_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, &task.slot_key) {
3273 Ok(hash) => hash,
3274 Err(_) => return,
3275 };
3276 let slot_status = state
3277 .chain
3278 .monitor_slot_history
3279 .get(&monitor.monitor_id)
3280 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&task.slot_key))
3281 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
3282 let terminal = matches!(
3283 slot_status,
3284 Some(
3285 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
3286 | MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
3287 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
3288 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
3289 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
3290 | MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds
3291 )
3292 );
3293 let already_executed = state
3294 .browser_receipts
3295 .get(&tx_hash)
3296 .map(|receipts| {
3297 receipts
3298 .iter()
3299 .any(|receipt| receipt.body.executor == runtime.address())
3300 })
3301 .unwrap_or(false);
3302 let cost = match monitor_browser_slot_cost(&package) {
3303 Ok(cost) => cost,
3304 Err(_) => return,
3305 };
3306 if monitor.paused || terminal || already_executed || monitor.budget_balance < cost {
3307 None
3308 } else {
3309 let tasks = match pending_monitor_browser_tasks(&state.chain, Utc::now()) {
3310 Ok(tasks) => tasks,
3311 Err(_) => return,
3312 };
3313 let task_key = format!("{}:{}", monitor.monitor_id, task.slot_key);
3314 let execution_mode = match runtime
3315 .pending_monitor_browser_plan(&state.chain, &tasks)
3316 {
3317 Ok(Some((plan, index_by_task))) => {
3318 index_by_task.get(&task_key).and_then(|task_index| {
3319 let assignment = plan.assignment_for_task(*task_index)?;
3320 if !plan.provider_should_execute(&runtime.address(), *task_index) {
3321 return None;
3322 }
3323 Some(validator_should_run_direct_probe(
3324 &runtime.address(),
3325 &assignment,
3326 ))
3327 })
3328 }
3329 Ok(None) => None,
3330 Err(_) => return,
3331 };
3332 execution_mode.map(|direct_probe| {
3333 (
3334 state.chain.chain_id.clone(),
3335 tx_hash,
3336 BrowserCheckSpec {
3337 request_id: monitor_browser_request_id(
3338 &monitor.monitor_id,
3339 &task.slot_key,
3340 ),
3341 package,
3342 },
3343 monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
3344 task.slot_key.clone(),
3345 direct_probe,
3346 )
3347 })
3348 }
3349 }) else {
3350 return;
3351 };
3352
3353 match runtime
3354 .execute_browser_check_receipt(
3355 &chain_id,
3356 &tx_hash,
3357 &spec,
3358 Some((&monitor_id, &slot_key)),
3359 direct_probe,
3360 )
3361 .await
3362 {
3363 Ok(receipt) => {
3364 if let Err(error) = runtime.accept_browser_receipt(receipt, true).await {
3365 warn!(
3366 ?error,
3367 monitor_id = %monitor_id,
3368 slot_key = %slot_key,
3369 "failed to submit scheduled browser receipt"
3370 );
3371 }
3372 }
3373 Err(error) => {
3374 warn!(
3375 ?error,
3376 monitor_id = %monitor_id,
3377 slot_key = %slot_key,
3378 "failed to create scheduled browser receipt"
3379 );
3380 }
3381 }
3382 });
3383 }
3384
3385 async fn execute_browser_check_receipt(
3386 &self,
3387 chain_id: &str,
3388 tx_hash: &str,
3389 spec: &BrowserCheckSpec,
3390 monitor_context: Option<(&str, &str)>,
3391 direct_probe: bool,
3392 ) -> Result<SignedBrowserReceipt> {
3393 if direct_probe {
3394 let execution =
3395 execute_browser_check(spec, tx_hash, &self.browser_runner_config()).await?;
3396 return self.wallet.sign_browser_receipt(SignedBrowserReceipt {
3397 id: String::new(),
3398 body: BrowserReceiptBody {
3399 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
3400 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
3401 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3402 monitor_id: monitor_context.map(|(monitor_id, _)| monitor_id.to_string()),
3403 slot_key: monitor_context.map(|(_, slot_key)| slot_key.to_string()),
3404 executor: String::new(),
3405 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3406 package_hash: crate::browser::browser_package_hash(&spec.package)?,
3407 runtime_hash: crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&spec.package.runtime)?,
3408 latency_ms: execution.latency_ms,
3409 success: execution.success,
3410 failed_step_index: execution.failed_step_index,
3411 final_url: execution.final_url,
3412 outcome_class: execution.outcome_class,
3413 console_error_count: execution.console_error_count,
3414 network_error_count: execution.network_error_count,
3415 screenshot_artifact: execution.screenshot_artifact,
3416 trace_artifact: execution.trace_artifact,
3417 video_artifact: execution.video_artifact,
3418 error: execution.error,
3419 },
3420 signature: String::new(),
3421 });
3422 }
3423 let agents = self.configured_probe_agents().await?;
3424 let task_key = match monitor_context {
3425 Some((monitor_id, slot_key)) => {
3426 format!(
3427 "browser-monitor:{monitor_id}:{slot_key}:{}",
3428 spec.request_id
3429 )
3430 }
3431 None => format!("browser-check:{tx_hash}:{}", spec.request_id),
3432 };
3433 let selected = self.select_round_robin_agents(
3434 chain_id,
3435 &format!("browser-agent:{task_key}"),
3436 &task_key,
3437 1,
3438 &agents,
3439 )?;
3440 let Some(agent) = selected.first() else {
3441 let execution =
3442 execute_browser_check(spec, tx_hash, &self.browser_runner_config()).await?;
3443 return self.wallet.sign_browser_receipt(SignedBrowserReceipt {
3444 id: String::new(),
3445 body: BrowserReceiptBody {
3446 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
3447 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
3448 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3449 monitor_id: monitor_context.map(|(monitor_id, _)| monitor_id.to_string()),
3450 slot_key: monitor_context.map(|(_, slot_key)| slot_key.to_string()),
3451 executor: String::new(),
3452 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3453 package_hash: crate::browser::browser_package_hash(&spec.package)?,
3454 runtime_hash: crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&spec.package.runtime)?,
3455 latency_ms: execution.latency_ms,
3456 success: execution.success,
3457 failed_step_index: execution.failed_step_index,
3458 final_url: execution.final_url,
3459 outcome_class: execution.outcome_class,
3460 console_error_count: execution.console_error_count,
3461 network_error_count: execution.network_error_count,
3462 screenshot_artifact: execution.screenshot_artifact,
3463 trace_artifact: execution.trace_artifact,
3464 video_artifact: execution.video_artifact,
3465 error: execution.error,
3466 },
3467 signature: String::new(),
3468 });
3469 };
3470 self.execute_browser_check_with_probe_agent(chain_id, tx_hash, spec, agent, monitor_context)
3471 .await
3472 }
3473
3474 fn browser_runner_config(&self) -> BrowserRunnerConfig {
3475 BrowserRunnerConfig {
3476 program: self.config.browser_runner_program.clone(),
3477 args: self.config.browser_runner_args.clone(),
3478 cache_dir: self
3479 .config
3480 .browser_cache_dir
3481 .clone()
3482 .unwrap_or_else(|| self.config.state_dir.join("browser_cache")),
3483 artifact_root: browser_artifact_dir(&self.config.state_dir),
3484 secret_store_path: self.config.browser_secret_store_path.clone(),
3485 }
3486 }
3487
3488 async fn execute_browser_check_with_probe_agent(
3489 &self,
3490 chain_id: &str,
3491 tx_hash: &str,
3492 spec: &BrowserCheckSpec,
3493 agent: &ConfiguredProbeAgent,
3494 monitor_context: Option<(&str, &str)>,
3495 ) -> Result<SignedBrowserReceipt> {
3496 let issued_at = Utc::now();
3497 let expires_at =
3498 issued_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(spec.package.journey.max_runtime_secs as i64 + 5);
3499 let lease_id = compute_hash(&(
3500 chain_id.to_string(),
3501 tx_hash.to_string(),
3502 spec.request_id.clone(),
3503 self.address(),
3504 agent.public_key.clone(),
3505 monitor_context
3506 .map(|(monitor_id, slot_key)| format!("{monitor_id}:{slot_key}"))
3507 .unwrap_or_else(|| "adhoc".into()),
3508 "browser-agent",
3509 ))?;
3510 let lease = self
3511 .wallet
3512 .sign_browser_agent_lease(SignedBrowserAgentLease {
3513 id: String::new(),
3514 body: BrowserAgentLeaseBody {
3515 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
3516 lease_id,
3517 parent_validator: String::new(),
3518 agent_public_key: agent.public_key.clone(),
3519 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
3520 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3521 monitor_id: monitor_context.map(|(monitor_id, _)| monitor_id.to_string()),
3522 slot_key: monitor_context.map(|(_, slot_key)| slot_key.to_string()),
3523 spec: spec.clone(),
3524 issued_at,
3525 expires_at,
3526 audit: false,
3527 },
3528 signature: String::new(),
3529 })?;
3530 verify_browser_agent_lease(&lease)?;
3531 let url = format!(
3532 "{}/v1/internal/agent/browser",
3533 agent.endpoint.trim_end_matches('/')
3534 );
3535 let mut request = self.http_client.post(url).timeout(Duration::from_secs(
3536 spec.package.journey.max_runtime_secs + 5,
3537 ));
3538 if let Some(token) = agent.api_token.as_deref() {
3539 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
3540 }
3541 let response = request.json(&lease).send().await?;
3542 if !response.status().is_success() {
3543 bail!("probe agent {} rejected browser lease", agent.public_key);
3544 }
3545 let payload = response.json::<AgentBrowserResponse>().await?;
3546 let delegated_receipt = payload.delegated_receipt;
3547 verify_delegated_browser_receipt(&delegated_receipt)?;
3548 validate_delegated_browser_receipt(
3549 &delegated_receipt,
3550 chain_id,
3551 tx_hash,
3552 spec,
3553 &self.address(),
3554 &agent.public_key,
3555 &lease.id,
3556 monitor_context,
3557 )?;
3558 self.sign_browser_receipt_from_agent_result(chain_id, tx_hash, &delegated_receipt)
3559 }
3560
3561 fn sign_browser_receipt_from_agent_result(
3562 &self,
3563 chain_id: &str,
3564 tx_hash: &str,
3565 delegated_receipt: &SignedDelegatedBrowserReceipt,
3566 ) -> Result<SignedBrowserReceipt> {
3567 self.wallet.sign_browser_receipt(SignedBrowserReceipt {
3568 id: String::new(),
3569 body: BrowserReceiptBody {
3570 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
3571 tx_hash: tx_hash.to_string(),
3572 request_id: delegated_receipt.body.request_id.clone(),
3573 monitor_id: delegated_receipt.body.monitor_id.clone(),
3574 slot_key: delegated_receipt.body.slot_key.clone(),
3575 executor: String::new(),
3576 observed_at: delegated_receipt.body.observed_at,
3577 package_hash: delegated_receipt.body.package_hash.clone(),
3578 runtime_hash: delegated_receipt.body.runtime_hash.clone(),
3579 latency_ms: delegated_receipt.body.latency_ms,
3580 success: delegated_receipt.body.success,
3581 failed_step_index: delegated_receipt.body.failed_step_index,
3582 final_url: delegated_receipt.body.final_url.clone(),
3583 outcome_class: delegated_receipt.body.outcome_class.clone(),
3584 console_error_count: delegated_receipt.body.console_error_count,
3585 network_error_count: delegated_receipt.body.network_error_count,
3586 screenshot_artifact: delegated_receipt.body.screenshot_artifact.clone(),
3587 trace_artifact: delegated_receipt.body.trace_artifact.clone(),
3588 video_artifact: delegated_receipt.body.video_artifact.clone(),
3589 error: delegated_receipt.body.error.clone(),
3590 },
3591 signature: String::new(),
3592 })
3593 }
3594
3595 async fn replay_journal_events(&self, events: Vec<PersistedJournalEvent>) -> Result<()> {
3596 for event in events {
3597 match event {
3598 PersistedJournalEvent::TransactionAccepted { tx } => {
3599 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3600 let _ = apply_transaction_to_state(&mut state, &self.address(), tx)?;
3601 }
3602 PersistedJournalEvent::ReceiptAccepted { receipt } => {
3603 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3604 let _ = apply_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt)?;
3605 }
3606 PersistedJournalEvent::BrowserReceiptAccepted { receipt } => {
3607 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3608 let _ = apply_browser_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt)?;
3609 }
3610 PersistedJournalEvent::ComputeReceiptAccepted { receipt } => {
3611 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3612 let _ = apply_compute_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt)?;
3613 }
3614 PersistedJournalEvent::StorageProofReceiptAccepted { receipt } => {
3615 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3616 let _ = apply_storage_proof_receipt_to_state(&mut state, receipt)?;
3617 }
3618 PersistedJournalEvent::HeartbeatObservationAccepted { observation } => {
3619 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3620 let _ = apply_heartbeat_observation_to_state(&mut state, observation)?;
3621 }
3622 PersistedJournalEvent::ApprovalStored { approval } => {
3623 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3624 let _ = apply_block_approval_to_state(&mut state, approval)?;
3625 }
3626 PersistedJournalEvent::ViewAdvanced {
3627 active_view,
3628 view_started_at,
3629 } => {
3630 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3631 apply_view_advance_to_state(&mut state, active_view, view_started_at);
3632 }
3633 PersistedJournalEvent::BlockAccepted { block } => {
3634 let finalized_records = {
3635 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
3636 apply_block_to_state(&mut state, block.clone())?
3637 };
3638 if let Some((
3639 finalized_health_records,
3640 finalized_browser_records,
3641 finalized_compute_records,
3642 )) = finalized_records
3643 {
3644 archive_block(&self.config.state_dir, &block).await?;
3645 for record in &finalized_health_records {
3646 archive_finalized_health_check(&self.config.state_dir, record).await?;
3647 }
3648 for record in &finalized_browser_records {
3649 archive_finalized_browser_check(&self.config.state_dir, record).await?;
3650 }
3651 for record in &finalized_compute_records {
3652 archive_finalized_compute_job(&self.config.state_dir, record).await?;
3653 }
3654 }
3655 }
3656 }
3657 }
3658 Ok(())
3659 }
3660
3661 async fn append_journal_event_locked(&self, event: &PersistedJournalEvent) -> Result<()> {
3662 append_journal_event(&self.config.state_dir, event).await
3663 }
3664
3665 async fn persist_state_locked(&self) -> Result<()> {
3666 let state = self.state.read().await;
3667 let persisted = PersistedNodeState {
3668 chain: state.chain.clone(),
3669 finalized_blocks: BTreeMap::new(),
3670 mempool: state.mempool.clone(),
3671 receipts: state.receipts.clone(),
3672 browser_receipts: state.browser_receipts.clone(),
3673 compute_receipts: state.compute_receipts.clone(),
3674 storage_proof_receipts: state.storage_proof_receipts.clone(),
3675 heartbeat_observations: state.heartbeat_observations.clone(),
3676 heartbeat_client_nonces: state.heartbeat_client_nonces.clone(),
3677 block_approvals: state.block_approvals.clone(),
3678 delivered_alerts: state.delivered_alerts.clone(),
3679 active_view: state.active_view,
3680 view_started_at: state.view_started_at,
3681 };
3682 write_json_atomic(&self.config.state_dir.join("state.json"), &persisted).await?;
3683 Ok(())
3684 }
3685
3686 async fn snapshot_and_compact_journal(&self) -> Result<()> {
3687 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
3688 self.snapshot_and_compact_journal_locked().await
3689 }
3690
3691 async fn snapshot_and_compact_journal_locked(&self) -> Result<()> {
3692 self.persist_state_locked().await?;
3693 clear_journal_events(&self.config.state_dir).await
3694 }
3695
3696 async fn broadcast<T: Serialize>(&self, path: &str, payload: &T) {
3697 let futures = self.config.peers.iter().map(|peer| async move {
3698 let url = format!("{}{}", peer.trim_end_matches('/'), path);
3699 let mut request = self.http_client.post(url);
3700 if let Some(token) = self.config.gossip_api_token.as_deref() {
3701 request = request.header(AUTHORIZATION, bearer_token_value(token));
3702 }
3703 match request.json(payload).send().await {
3704 Ok(response) if response.status().is_success() => {}
3705 Ok(response) => {
3706 warn!(status = ?response.status(), peer, "peer rejected gossip");
3707 }
3708 Err(error) => {
3709 warn!(?error, peer, "failed to gossip to peer");
3710 }
3711 }
3712 });
3713 let _ = join_all(futures).await;
3714 }
3715
3716 async fn quote_and_plan(&self, request: SwapQuoteRequest) -> Result<SwapExecutionPlan> {
3717 let state = self.state.read().await;
3718 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&self.address()) {
3719 bail!("only validator nodes may issue signed swap quotes");
3720 }
3721 let treasury_has_inventory =
3722 state.chain.spendable_balance(&state.chain.treasury) >= request.token_amount;
3723 match request.side {
3724 crate::protocol::SwapSide::Buy => {}
3725 crate::protocol::SwapSide::Sell => {
3726 if state.chain.spendable_balance(&request.wallet) < request.token_amount {
3727 bail!("quoted wallet has insufficient spendable HT for this sell quote");
3728 }
3729 }
3730 }
3731 let mut quote = self.swap_registry.quote(&request).await?;
3732 quote.chain_id = state.chain.chain_id.clone();
3733 if request.side == crate::protocol::SwapSide::Buy && !treasury_has_inventory {
3734 quote.notes.push(
3735 "Treasury inventory is not currently reserved on-chain for this buy quote; treat it as an indicative OTC hand-off until inventory is provisioned."
3736 .into(),
3737 );
3738 }
3739 drop(state);
3740
3741 let signed_quote = self.wallet.sign_swap_quote(SignedSwapQuote {
3742 quote,
3743 quoted_by: String::new(),
3744 quoted_at: Utc::now(),
3745 signature: String::new(),
3746 })?;
3747 self.swap_registry.execution_plan(&signed_quote).await
3748 }
3749
3750 async fn record_secret_ping(
3751 &self,
3752 monitor_id: String,
3753 token: String,
3754 signal: HeartbeatSignal,
3755 body: Bytes,
3756 ) -> Result<PingAcceptedResponse> {
3757 let monitor = {
3758 let state = self.state.read().await;
3759 state
3760 .chain
3761 .monitors
3762 .get(&monitor_id)
3763 .cloned()
3764 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?
3765 };
3766 if monitor.paused {
3767 bail!("paused monitors do not accept heartbeat pings");
3768 }
3769 let heartbeat = monitor
3770 .spec
3771 .heartbeat_config()
3772 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
3773 if !signal_allowed(heartbeat.signal_policy, signal) {
3774 bail!("monitor does not accept this signal type");
3775 }
3776 let expected_hash = match heartbeat.ping_auth {
3777 HeartbeatAuth::SecretUrl { token_hash } => token_hash,
3778 HeartbeatAuth::Dual { token_hash, .. } => token_hash,
3779 HeartbeatAuth::DelegatedKey { .. } => {
3780 bail!("monitor requires delegated heartbeat signatures");
3781 }
3782 };
3783 if hash_secret_token(&token)? != *expected_hash {
3784 bail!("invalid heartbeat token");
3785 }
3786
3787 self.record_heartbeat_observation(
3788 &monitor,
3789 signal,
3790 HeartbeatAuthMode::SecretUrl,
3791 body,
3792 None,
3793 None,
3794 None,
3795 None,
3796 )
3797 .await
3798 }
3799
3800 async fn record_signed_ping(
3801 &self,
3802 monitor_id: String,
3803 signal: HeartbeatSignal,
3804 headers: &HeaderMap,
3805 body: Bytes,
3806 ) -> Result<PingAcceptedResponse> {
3807 let monitor = {
3808 let state = self.state.read().await;
3809 state
3810 .chain
3811 .monitors
3812 .get(&monitor_id)
3813 .cloned()
3814 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?
3815 };
3816 if monitor.paused {
3817 bail!("paused monitors do not accept heartbeat pings");
3818 }
3819 let heartbeat = monitor
3820 .spec
3821 .heartbeat_config()
3822 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
3823 if !signal_allowed(heartbeat.signal_policy, signal) {
3824 bail!("monitor does not accept this signal type");
3825 }
3826
3827 let (expected_key_id, expected_public_key) = match heartbeat.ping_auth {
3828 HeartbeatAuth::DelegatedKey { key_id, public_key }
3829 | HeartbeatAuth::Dual {
3830 key_id, public_key, ..
3831 } => (key_id.as_str(), public_key.as_str()),
3832 HeartbeatAuth::SecretUrl { .. } => {
3833 bail!("monitor only supports secret-url heartbeat ingress");
3834 }
3835 };
3836 let key_id = required_header(headers, "x-ht-key-id")?;
3837 let signature = required_header(headers, "x-ht-signature")?;
3838 let nonce = required_header(headers, "x-ht-nonce")?;
3839 if nonce.len() > MAX_HEARTBEAT_NONCE_BYTES {
3840 bail!("heartbeat nonce exceeds maximum length");
3841 }
3842 if key_id != expected_key_id {
3843 bail!("heartbeat key id does not match this monitor");
3844 }
3845 let client_timestamp = parse_client_timestamp(required_header(headers, "x-ht-timestamp")?)?;
3846 let now = Utc::now();
3847 let skew = (now - client_timestamp).num_seconds().abs();
3848 if skew > MAX_CLIENT_CLOCK_SKEW_SECS {
3849 bail!("heartbeat timestamp is outside the accepted skew window");
3850 }
3851 let nonce_key = heartbeat_client_nonce_key(&monitor_id, nonce);
3852 {
3853 let state = self.state.read().await;
3854 if state.heartbeat_client_nonces.contains_key(&nonce_key) {
3855 bail!("heartbeat nonce has already been used for this monitor");
3856 }
3857 }
3858
3859 let body_sha256 = digest_bytes_hex(&body);
3860 let message = canonical_heartbeat_client_message(
3861 &monitor_id,
3862 signal,
3863 client_timestamp,
3864 nonce,
3865 body_sha256.as_deref(),
3866 )?;
3867 verify_client_signature(expected_public_key, &message, signature)?;
3868
3869 self.record_heartbeat_observation(
3870 &monitor,
3871 signal,
3872 HeartbeatAuthMode::DelegatedKey,
3873 body,
3874 Some(signature.to_string()),
3875 Some(key_id.to_string()),
3876 Some(client_timestamp),
3877 Some(nonce.to_string()),
3878 )
3879 .await
3880 }
3881
3882 #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
3883 async fn record_heartbeat_observation(
3884 &self,
3885 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
3886 signal: HeartbeatSignal,
3887 auth_mode: HeartbeatAuthMode,
3888 body: Bytes,
3889 client_signature: Option<String>,
3890 client_key_id: Option<String>,
3891 client_timestamp: Option<DateTime<Utc>>,
3892 client_nonce: Option<String>,
3893 ) -> Result<PingAcceptedResponse> {
3894 let observed_at = Utc::now();
3895 let slot_key =
3896 schedule_current_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, observed_at)?.to_rfc3339();
3897 let body_sha256 = digest_bytes_hex(&body);
3898 let body_sample = capture_body_sample(&monitor.spec.log_capture, &body);
3899 let observation = self
3900 .wallet
3901 .sign_heartbeat_observation(SignedHeartbeatObservation {
3902 id: String::new(),
3903 body: HeartbeatObservationBody {
3904 chain_id: {
3905 let state = self.state.read().await;
3906 state.chain.chain_id.clone()
3907 },
3908 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
3909 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
3910 signal,
3911 observed_at,
3912 observed_by: String::new(),
3913 body_sha256,
3914 body_sample,
3915 auth_mode,
3916 client_signature,
3917 client_key_id,
3918 client_timestamp,
3919 client_nonce,
3920 },
3921 signature: String::new(),
3922 })?;
3923 let accepted = self
3924 .accept_heartbeat_observation(observation.clone(), true)
3925 .await?;
3926 Ok(PingAcceptedResponse {
3927 accepted,
3928 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
3929 slot_key,
3930 observation_id: observation.id,
3931 })
3932 }
3933
3934 async fn account_response(&self, address: String) -> AccountResponse {
3935 let state = self.state.read().await;
3936 let account = state.chain.account(&address);
3937 AccountResponse {
3938 address,
3939 balance: account.balance,
3940 balance_display: crate::protocol::format_amount(account.balance),
3941 storage_balance: account.storage_balance,
3942 storage_balance_display: crate::protocol::format_amount(account.storage_balance),
3943 compute_balance: account.compute_balance,
3944 compute_balance_display: crate::protocol::format_amount(account.compute_balance),
3945 dns_balance: account.dns_balance,
3946 dns_balance_display: crate::protocol::format_amount(account.dns_balance),
3947 nonce: account.nonce,
3948 locked_balance: account.locked_balance,
3949 }
3950 }
3951
3952 async fn ledger_snapshot(&self) -> LedgerSnapshot {
3953 let state = self.state.read().await;
3954 state.chain.snapshot()
3955 }
3956
3957 async fn job_response(&self, tx_hash: String) -> JobResponse {
3958 let state = self.state.read().await;
3959 let finalized_health_record = state.chain.finalized_health_checks.get(&tx_hash).cloned();
3960 let finalized_browser_record = state.chain.finalized_browser_checks.get(&tx_hash).cloned();
3961 let finalized_compute_record = state.chain.finalized_compute_jobs.get(&tx_hash).cloned();
3962 let pending_health_receipts = state.receipts.get(&tx_hash).map(Vec::len).unwrap_or(0);
3963 let pending_browser_receipts = state
3964 .browser_receipts
3965 .get(&tx_hash)
3966 .map(Vec::len)
3967 .unwrap_or(0);
3968 let pending_compute_receipts = state
3969 .compute_receipts
3970 .get(&tx_hash)
3971 .map(Vec::len)
3972 .unwrap_or(0);
3973 let should_load_archived_health = finalized_health_record.is_none()
3974 && state.chain.finalized_health_check_ids.contains(&tx_hash);
3975 let should_load_archived_browser = finalized_browser_record.is_none()
3976 && state.chain.finalized_browser_check_ids.contains(&tx_hash);
3977 let should_load_archived_compute = finalized_compute_record.is_none()
3978 && state.chain.finalized_compute_job_ids.contains(&tx_hash);
3979 drop(state);
3980 let finalized_health_record = if should_load_archived_health {
3981 load_archived_finalized_health_check(&self.config.state_dir, &tx_hash)
3982 .await
3983 .ok()
3984 .flatten()
3985 } else {
3986 finalized_health_record
3987 };
3988 let finalized_browser_record = if should_load_archived_browser {
3989 load_archived_finalized_browser_check(&self.config.state_dir, &tx_hash)
3990 .await
3991 .ok()
3992 .flatten()
3993 } else {
3994 finalized_browser_record
3995 };
3996 let finalized_compute_record = if should_load_archived_compute {
3997 load_archived_finalized_compute_job(&self.config.state_dir, &tx_hash)
3998 .await
3999 .ok()
4000 .flatten()
4001 } else {
4002 finalized_compute_record
4003 };
4004 JobResponse {
4005 tx_hash,
4006 finalized: finalized_health_record.is_some()
4007 || finalized_browser_record.is_some()
4008 || finalized_compute_record.is_some(),
4009 finalized_record: finalized_health_record.clone(),
4010 finalized_health_record,
4011 finalized_browser_record,
4012 finalized_compute_record,
4013 pending_health_receipts,
4014 pending_browser_receipts,
4015 pending_compute_receipts,
4016 }
4017 }
4018
4019 async fn swap_lock_response(&self, quote_id: String) -> SwapLockResponse {
4020 let state = self.state.read().await;
4021 let record = state.chain.pending_swap_locks.get(&quote_id).cloned();
4022 SwapLockResponse {
4023 quote_id,
4024 pending: record.is_some(),
4025 record,
4026 }
4027 }
4028
4029 async fn storage_contract_response(
4030 &self,
4031 contract_id: String,
4032 ) -> Result<StorageContractResponse> {
4033 let state = self.state.read().await;
4034 let contract = state
4035 .chain
4036 .storage_contracts
4037 .get(&contract_id)
4038 .cloned()
4039 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {contract_id}"))?;
4040 Ok(StorageContractResponse { contract })
4041 }
4042
4043 async fn compute_artifact_content_type(
4044 &self,
4045 tx_hash: &str,
4046 shard_id: &str,
4047 artifact_path: &str,
4048 ) -> Result<String> {
4049 let record = {
4050 let state = self.state.read().await;
4051 if let Some(record) = state.chain.finalized_compute_jobs.get(tx_hash) {
4052 Some(record.clone())
4053 } else if state.chain.finalized_compute_job_ids.contains(tx_hash) {
4054 None
4055 } else {
4056 bail!("unknown finalized compute job");
4057 }
4058 };
4059 let record = match record {
4060 Some(record) => record,
4061 None => load_archived_finalized_compute_job(&self.config.state_dir, tx_hash)
4062 .await?
4063 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("archived compute job is missing"))?,
4064 };
4065 let local_provider = self.address();
4066 record
4067 .rewarded_receipts
4068 .iter()
4069 .flat_map(|receipt| receipt.body.shard_outputs.iter())
4070 .filter(|output| output.shard_id == shard_id)
4071 .flat_map(|output| output.artifacts.iter())
4072 .find(|artifact| artifact.path == artifact_path && artifact.provider == local_provider)
4073 .map(|artifact| {
4074 artifact
4075 .content_type
4076 .clone()
4077 .unwrap_or_else(|| "application/octet-stream".to_string())
4078 })
4079 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("compute artifact is not available on this node"))
4080 }
4081
4082 async fn domain_route_response(&self, host: String) -> Result<DomainRouteResponse> {
4083 let host = normalize_route_host(&host)?;
4084 let state = self.state.read().await;
4085 let now = Utc::now();
4086 let lease = state
4087 .chain
4088 .domain_leases
4089 .values()
4090 .find(|lease| {
4091 lease.fqdn == host
4092 && matches!(lease.status, crate::protocol::DomainLeaseStatus::Active)
4093 && lease.prepaid_balance > 0
4094 && lease.expires_at > now
4095 })
4096 .cloned()
4097 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown active domain route {host}"))?;
4098 let offering = state
4099 .chain
4100 .domain_offerings
4101 .get(&lease.offering_id)
4102 .cloned()
4103 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain offering {}", lease.offering_id))?;
4104 if !matches!(
4105 offering.status,
4106 crate::protocol::DomainOfferingStatus::Active
4107 ) {
4108 bail!("domain offering is not active");
4109 }
4110 let contract = state
4111 .chain
4112 .storage_contracts
4113 .get(&lease.target_contract_id)
4114 .cloned()
4115 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {}", lease.target_contract_id))?;
4116 if !matches!(
4117 contract.spec.mode,
4118 crate::protocol::StorageMode::PublicRaw { .. }
4119 ) {
4120 bail!("domain route target is not public raw storage");
4121 }
4122 Ok(DomainRouteResponse {
4123 chain_id: state.chain.chain_id.clone(),
4124 offering,
4125 lease,
4126 contract,
4127 })
4128 }
4129
4130 async fn status_response(&self) -> NodeStatusResponse {
4131 let state = self.state.read().await;
4132 NodeStatusResponse {
4133 version: env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION").to_string(),
4134 node_address: self.address(),
4135 chain_id: state.chain.chain_id.clone(),
4136 height: state.chain.height,
4137 last_block_hash: state.chain.last_block_hash.clone(),
4138 validator: state.chain.validators.contains(&self.address()),
4139 validator_count: state.chain.validators.len(),
4140 active_view: state.active_view,
4141 min_health_receipts: state.chain.min_health_receipts,
4142 block_approval_quorum: state.chain.required_block_approvals(),
4143 max_block_transactions: MAX_BLOCK_TRANSACTIONS,
4144 block_time_secs: state.chain.block_time_secs,
4145 mempool_size: state.mempool.len(),
4146 pending_receipt_count: state.receipts.values().map(Vec::len).sum::<usize>()
4147 + state.browser_receipts.values().map(Vec::len).sum::<usize>()
4148 + state.compute_receipts.values().map(Vec::len).sum::<usize>()
4149 + state
4150 .heartbeat_observations
4151 .values()
4152 .map(Vec::len)
4153 .sum::<usize>(),
4154 pending_swap_locks: state.chain.pending_swap_locks.len(),
4155 storage_contracts: state.chain.storage_contracts.len(),
4156 domain_offerings: state.chain.domain_offerings.len(),
4157 domain_leases: state.chain.domain_leases.len(),
4158 pending_storage_proof_receipts: state
4159 .storage_proof_receipts
4160 .values()
4161 .map(Vec::len)
4162 .sum(),
4163 finalized_health_checks: state.chain.finalized_health_check_count(),
4164 finalized_browser_checks: state.chain.finalized_browser_check_ids.len(),
4165 finalized_compute_jobs: state.chain.finalized_compute_job_ids.len(),
4166 control_api_auth_enabled: self.config.control_api_token.is_some(),
4167 gossip_api_auth_enabled: self.config.gossip_api_token.is_some(),
4168 peers: self.config.peers.clone(),
4169 }
4170 }
4171
4172 async fn list_monitors_response(&self) -> MonitorListResponse {
4173 let state = self.state.read().await;
4174 MonitorListResponse {
4175 monitors: state.chain.monitors.values().cloned().collect(),
4176 }
4177 }
4178
4179 async fn monitor_response(&self, monitor_id: String) -> Result<MonitorResponse> {
4180 let state = self.state.read().await;
4181 let monitor = state
4182 .chain
4183 .monitors
4184 .get(&monitor_id)
4185 .cloned()
4186 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
4187 Ok(MonitorResponse { monitor })
4188 }
4189
4190 async fn monitor_slots_response(&self, monitor_id: String) -> Result<MonitorSlotsResponse> {
4191 let state = self.state.read().await;
4192 let slots = state
4193 .chain
4194 .monitor_slot_history
4195 .get(&monitor_id)
4196 .map(|items| items.values().cloned().collect())
4197 .unwrap_or_default();
4198 Ok(MonitorSlotsResponse { monitor_id, slots })
4199 }
4200
4201 async fn monitor_alerts_response(&self, monitor_id: String) -> Result<MonitorAlertsResponse> {
4202 let state = self.state.read().await;
4203 let alerts = state
4204 .chain
4205 .alert_facts
4206 .values()
4207 .filter(|fact| fact.monitor_id == monitor_id)
4208 .cloned()
4209 .collect();
4210 Ok(MonitorAlertsResponse { monitor_id, alerts })
4211 }
4212
4213 async fn finalized_block_at_height(&self, height: u64) -> Option<SignedBlock> {
4214 load_archived_block(&self.config.state_dir, height)
4215 .await
4216 .ok()
4217 .flatten()
4218 }
4219
4220 async fn spawn_alert_delivery(&self, block: SignedBlock) {
4221 let runtime = Arc::new(self.clone());
4222 tokio::spawn(async move {
4223 let alerts = runtime.alert_facts_for_block(&block).await;
4224 if alerts.is_empty() {
4225 return;
4226 }
4227 if let Err(error) = runtime.deliver_alerts(alerts).await {
4228 warn!(?error, block_hash = %block.hash, "failed to deliver monitor alerts");
4229 }
4230 });
4231 }
4232
4233 async fn alert_facts_for_block(&self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Vec<AlertFact> {
4234 let mut impacted_slots = BTreeSet::new();
4235 for observation in &block.body.heartbeat_observations {
4236 impacted_slots.insert((
4237 observation.body.monitor_id.clone(),
4238 observation.body.slot_key.clone(),
4239 ));
4240 }
4241 for evaluation in &block.body.monitor_evaluations {
4242 impacted_slots.insert((evaluation.monitor_id.clone(), evaluation.slot_key.clone()));
4243 }
4244 if impacted_slots.is_empty() {
4245 return Vec::new();
4246 }
4247
4248 let state = self.state.read().await;
4249 state
4250 .chain
4251 .alert_facts
4252 .values()
4253 .filter(|fact| fact.created_at == block.body.proposed_at)
4254 .filter(|fact| {
4255 impacted_slots.contains(&(fact.monitor_id.clone(), fact.slot_key.clone()))
4256 })
4257 .cloned()
4258 .collect()
4259 }
4260
4261 async fn deliver_alerts(&self, alerts: Vec<AlertFact>) -> Result<()> {
4262 let policies = self.load_notification_policies().await?;
4263 for alert in alerts {
4264 let Some(policy_id) = alert.notification_policy_id.clone() else {
4265 continue;
4266 };
4267 let Some(policy) = policies.policies.get(&policy_id) else {
4268 continue;
4269 };
4270 if policy.webhooks.is_empty() {
4271 continue;
4272 }
4273
4274 let (chain_id, monitor, slot_record) = {
4275 let state = self.state.read().await;
4276 (
4277 state.chain.chain_id.clone(),
4278 state.chain.monitors.get(&alert.monitor_id).cloned(),
4279 state
4280 .chain
4281 .monitor_slot_history
4282 .get(&alert.monitor_id)
4283 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&alert.slot_key))
4284 .cloned(),
4285 )
4286 };
4287 let payload = json!({
4288 "chain_id": chain_id,
4289 "alert": alert,
4290 "monitor": monitor,
4291 "slot": slot_record,
4292 });
4293
4294 for webhook in &policy.webhooks {
4295 let delivery_key = alert_delivery_key(&alert.id, webhook)?;
4296 let already_delivered = {
4297 let state = self.state.read().await;
4298 state.delivered_alerts.contains_key(&delivery_key)
4299 };
4300 if already_delivered {
4301 continue;
4302 }
4303
4304 let mut request = self.http_client.post(&webhook.url);
4305 for (name, value) in &webhook.headers {
4306 request = request.header(name, value);
4307 }
4308 request = request
4309 .header("x-gossip-protocol-alert-id", &alert.id)
4310 .header("x-gossip-protocol-policy-id", &policy_id);
4311
4312 match request.json(&payload).send().await {
4313 Ok(response) if response.status().is_success() => {
4314 self.mark_alert_delivered(delivery_key).await?;
4315 }
4316 Ok(response) => {
4317 warn!(
4318 status = ?response.status(),
4319 alert_id = %alert.id,
4320 policy_id,
4321 url = webhook.url,
4322 "webhook delivery was rejected"
4323 );
4324 }
4325 Err(error) => {
4326 warn!(
4327 ?error,
4328 alert_id = %alert.id,
4329 policy_id,
4330 url = webhook.url,
4331 "webhook delivery failed"
4332 );
4333 }
4334 }
4335 }
4336 }
4337 Ok(())
4338 }
4339
4340 async fn load_notification_policies(&self) -> Result<NotificationPolicyStore> {
4341 let path = self
4342 .config
4343 .notification_policies_path
4344 .clone()
4345 .unwrap_or_else(|| self.config.state_dir.join("notification_policies.json"));
4346 Ok(read_json_optional(&path).await?.unwrap_or_default())
4347 }
4348
4349 async fn mark_alert_delivered(&self, delivery_key: String) -> Result<()> {
4350 let _persist_guard = self.persist_lock.lock().await;
4351 {
4352 let mut state = self.state.write().await;
4353 state.delivered_alerts.insert(delivery_key, Utc::now());
4354 }
4355 self.persist_state_locked().await
4356 }
4357 }
4358
4359 fn required_header<'a>(headers: &'a HeaderMap, name: &str) -> Result<&'a str> {
4360 headers
4361 .get(name)
4362 .and_then(|value| value.to_str().ok())
4363 .map(str::trim)
4364 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
4365 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("missing required header {name}"))
4366 }
4367
4368 fn parse_client_timestamp(input: &str) -> Result<DateTime<Utc>> {
4369 DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(input)
4370 .map(|value| value.with_timezone(&Utc))
4371 .map_err(|error| anyhow!("invalid heartbeat timestamp: {error}"))
4372 }
4373
4374 fn parse_heartbeat_signal(
4375 signal: Option<&str>,
4376 headers: &HeaderMap,
4377 ) -> std::result::Result<HeartbeatSignal, (StatusCode, String)> {
4378 let raw = signal
4379 .or_else(|| {
4380 headers
4381 .get("x-ht-signal")
4382 .and_then(|value| value.to_str().ok())
4383 })
4384 .unwrap_or("success");
4385 match raw.trim().to_ascii_lowercase().as_str() {
4386 "success" => Ok(HeartbeatSignal::Success),
4387 "start" => Ok(HeartbeatSignal::Start),
4388 "fail" => Ok(HeartbeatSignal::Fail),
4389 _ => Err((
4390 StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,
4391 format!("unsupported heartbeat signal {raw}"),
4392 )),
4393 }
4394 }
4395
4396 fn capture_body_sample(policy: &LogCapturePolicy, body: &Bytes) -> Option<String> {
4397 if body.is_empty() {
4398 return None;
4399 }
4400 match policy {
4401 LogCapturePolicy::None => None,
4402 LogCapturePolicy::CaptureText { max_bytes } => Some(truncate_capture(
4403 &String::from_utf8_lossy(body),
4404 (*max_bytes as usize).min(crate::protocol::MAX_PING_BODY_SAMPLE_BYTES),
4405 )),
4406 }
4407 }
4408
4409 fn digest_bytes_hex(body: &[u8]) -> Option<String> {
4410 if body.is_empty() {
4411 return None;
4412 }
4413 let mut hasher = Sha256::new();
4414 hasher.update(body);
4415 Some(hex::encode(hasher.finalize()))
4416 }
4417
4418 fn signal_allowed(policy: &SignalPolicy, signal: HeartbeatSignal) -> bool {
4419 match policy {
4420 SignalPolicy::SuccessOnly => signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success,
4421 SignalPolicy::StartAndSuccess { .. } => {
4422 matches!(signal, HeartbeatSignal::Start | HeartbeatSignal::Success)
4423 }
4424 SignalPolicy::StartSuccessFail { .. } => true,
4425 }
4426 }
4427
4428 fn expected_run_timeout_secs(policy: &SignalPolicy) -> Option<u64> {
4429 match policy {
4430 SignalPolicy::SuccessOnly => None,
4431 SignalPolicy::StartAndSuccess { run_timeout_secs }
4432 | SignalPolicy::StartSuccessFail { run_timeout_secs } => Some(*run_timeout_secs),
4433 }
4434 }
4435
4436 fn validate_monitor_heartbeat_observation(
4437 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
4438 observation: &SignedHeartbeatObservation,
4439 ) -> Result<()> {
4440 let heartbeat = monitor
4441 .spec
4442 .heartbeat_config()
4443 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
4444 if !signal_allowed(heartbeat.signal_policy, observation.body.signal) {
4445 bail!("heartbeat observation uses a signal not enabled for the monitor");
4446 }
4447 match (heartbeat.ping_auth, observation.body.auth_mode) {
4448 (HeartbeatAuth::SecretUrl { .. }, HeartbeatAuthMode::SecretUrl) => {}
4449 (HeartbeatAuth::DelegatedKey { key_id, public_key }, HeartbeatAuthMode::DelegatedKey)
4450 | (
4451 HeartbeatAuth::Dual {
4452 key_id, public_key, ..
4453 },
4454 HeartbeatAuthMode::DelegatedKey,
4455 ) => {
4456 let client_signature = observation
4457 .body
4458 .client_signature
4459 .as_deref()
4460 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_signature"))?;
4461 let client_timestamp = observation
4462 .body
4463 .client_timestamp
4464 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_timestamp"))?;
4465 let client_nonce = observation
4466 .body
4467 .client_nonce
4468 .as_deref()
4469 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_nonce"))?;
4470 let client_key_id = observation
4471 .body
4472 .client_key_id
4473 .as_deref()
4474 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_key_id"))?;
4475 if client_key_id != key_id {
4476 bail!("delegated heartbeat key_id mismatch");
4477 }
4478 let message = canonical_heartbeat_client_message(
4479 &observation.body.monitor_id,
4480 observation.body.signal,
4481 client_timestamp,
4482 client_nonce,
4483 observation.body.body_sha256.as_deref(),
4484 )?;
4485 verify_client_signature(public_key, &message, client_signature)?;
4486 }
4487 (HeartbeatAuth::Dual { .. }, HeartbeatAuthMode::SecretUrl) => {}
4488 _ => bail!("heartbeat auth mode does not match the monitor"),
4489 }
4490 Ok(())
4491 }
4492
4493 fn verify_client_signature(
4494 public_key_base58: &str,
4495 message: &[u8],
4496 signature_base58: &str,
4497 ) -> Result<()> {
4498 let public_key_bytes = bs58::decode(public_key_base58)
4499 .into_vec()
4500 .context("failed to decode heartbeat public key")?;
4501 let public_key_bytes: [u8; 32] = public_key_bytes
4502 .try_into()
4503 .map_err(|_| anyhow!("heartbeat public key must decode to 32 bytes"))?;
4504 let verifying_key = VerifyingKey::from_bytes(&public_key_bytes)?;
4505
4506 let signature_bytes = bs58::decode(signature_base58)
4507 .into_vec()
4508 .context("failed to decode heartbeat signature")?;
4509 let signature_bytes: [u8; 64] = signature_bytes
4510 .try_into()
4511 .map_err(|_| anyhow!("heartbeat signature must decode to 64 bytes"))?;
4512 let signature = Signature::from_bytes(&signature_bytes);
4513 verifying_key.verify(message, &signature)?;
4514 Ok(())
4515 }
4516
4517 fn monitor_effective_deadline(
4518 chain: &ChainState,
4519 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
4520 slot_started_at: DateTime<Utc>,
4521 pending_observations: Option<&[SignedHeartbeatObservation]>,
4522 ) -> Result<DateTime<Utc>> {
4523 let heartbeat = monitor
4524 .spec
4525 .heartbeat_config()
4526 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
4527 let slot_key = slot_started_at.to_rfc3339();
4528 let mut deadline = chain
4529 .monitor_slot_history
4530 .get(&monitor.monitor_id)
4531 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_key))
4532 .map(|slot| slot.deadline_at)
4533 .unwrap_or_else(|| slot_deadline(slot_started_at, monitor.spec.grace_secs));
4534
4535 if let Some(run_timeout_secs) = expected_run_timeout_secs(heartbeat.signal_policy)
4536 && let Some(started_at) = pending_observations.and_then(|items| {
4537 items
4538 .iter()
4539 .filter(|item| item.body.signal == HeartbeatSignal::Start)
4540 .map(|item| item.body.observed_at)
4541 .max()
4542 })
4543 {
4544 let extended = started_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(run_timeout_secs as i64);
4545 if extended > deadline {
4546 deadline = extended;
4547 }
4548 }
4549
4550 Ok(deadline)
4551 }
4552
4553 fn due_monitor_slot_starts(
4554 _chain: &ChainState,
4555 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
4556 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
4557 ) -> Result<Vec<DateTime<Utc>>> {
4558 let Some(next_slot_hint) = monitor.next_slot_hint.as_deref() else {
4559 return Ok(Vec::new());
4560 };
4561 let next_slot = DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(next_slot_hint)
4562 .map_err(|error| anyhow!("invalid next_slot_hint for {}: {error}", monitor.monitor_id))?
4563 .with_timezone(&Utc);
4564 let current_slot = schedule_current_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, proposed_at)?;
4565 if next_slot > current_slot {
4566 return Ok(Vec::new());
4567 }
4568
4569 let mut due = Vec::new();
4570 let mut cursor = next_slot;
4571 while cursor <= current_slot && due.len() < crate::protocol::MAX_CONFIRMATION_BATCHES {
4572 due.push(cursor);
4573 cursor = schedule_next_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, cursor)?;
4574 }
4575 Ok(due)
4576 }
4577
4578 fn pending_monitor_browser_tasks(
4579 chain: &ChainState,
4580 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
4581 ) -> Result<Vec<ScheduledBrowserTask>> {
4582 let mut tasks = Vec::new();
4583 for monitor in chain.monitors.values() {
4584 if !monitor.spec.is_browser() || monitor.paused {
4585 continue;
4586 }
4587 let minimum_balance = monitor_minimum_slot_balance(&monitor.spec)?;
4588 if monitor.budget_balance < minimum_balance {
4589 continue;
4590 }
4591 for slot_started_at in due_monitor_slot_starts(chain, monitor, proposed_at)? {
4592 let slot_key = slot_started_at.to_rfc3339();
4593 let existing_status = chain
4594 .monitor_slot_history
4595 .get(&monitor.monitor_id)
4596 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_key))
4597 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
4598 let terminal = matches!(
4599 existing_status,
4600 Some(
4601 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
4602 | MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
4603 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
4604 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
4605 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
4606 | MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds
4607 )
4608 );
4609 if terminal {
4610 continue;
4611 }
4612 tasks.push(ScheduledBrowserTask {
4613 monitor: monitor.clone(),
4614 slot_key,
4615 });
4616 }
4617 }
4618 tasks.sort_by(|left, right| {
4619 left.slot_key
4620 .cmp(&right.slot_key)
4621 .then_with(|| left.monitor.monitor_id.cmp(&right.monitor.monitor_id))
4622 });
4623 Ok(tasks)
4624 }
4625
4626 fn monitor_due_work_exists(
4627 chain: &ChainState,
4628 pending_browser_receipts: &BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>>,
4629 pending_observations: &BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>>,
4630 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
4631 ) -> Result<bool> {
4632 if pending_observations.values().any(|items| !items.is_empty()) {
4633 return Ok(true);
4634 }
4635 for monitor in chain.monitors.values() {
4636 let minimum_balance = monitor_minimum_slot_balance(&monitor.spec)?;
4637 for slot_started_at in due_monitor_slot_starts(chain, monitor, proposed_at)? {
4638 let slot_key = slot_started_at.to_rfc3339();
4639 let existing_status = chain
4640 .monitor_slot_history
4641 .get(&monitor.monitor_id)
4642 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_key))
4643 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
4644 let terminal = matches!(
4645 existing_status,
4646 Some(
4647 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
4648 | MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
4649 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
4650 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
4651 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
4652 | MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds
4653 )
4654 );
4655 if monitor.spec.is_browser() {
4656 let synthetic_tx_hash = monitor_browser_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, &slot_key)?;
4657 let deadline = slot_deadline(slot_started_at, monitor.spec.grace_secs);
4658 let has_receipts = pending_browser_receipts
4659 .get(&synthetic_tx_hash)
4660 .map(|items| !items.is_empty())
4661 .unwrap_or(false);
4662 if !monitor.paused && !terminal && (has_receipts || proposed_at > deadline) {
4663 return Ok(true);
4664 }
4665 } else {
4666 let pending_key = heartbeat_slot_key(&monitor.monitor_id, &slot_key);
4667 let slot_pending = pending_observations.get(&pending_key);
4668 let deadline = monitor_effective_deadline(
4669 chain,
4670 monitor,
4671 slot_started_at,
4672 slot_pending.map(Vec::as_slice),
4673 )?;
4674 let has_success = slot_pending
4675 .map(|items| {
4676 items
4677 .iter()
4678 .any(|item| item.body.signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success)
4679 })
4680 .unwrap_or(false);
4681 if !monitor.paused && !terminal && !has_success && proposed_at > deadline {
4682 return Ok(true);
4683 }
4684 }
4685 }
4686 if !monitor.paused && monitor.budget_balance < minimum_balance {
4687 return Ok(true);
4688 }
4689 }
4690 Ok(false)
4691 }
4692
4693 fn heartbeat_client_nonce_key(monitor_id: &str, nonce: &str) -> String {
4694 format!("{monitor_id}:{nonce}")
4695 }
4696
4697 fn prune_client_nonces(state: &mut RuntimeState, now: DateTime<Utc>) {
4698 let cutoff = now - chrono::Duration::seconds(CLIENT_NONCE_RETENTION_SECS);
4699 state
4700 .heartbeat_client_nonces
4701 .retain(|_, timestamp| *timestamp >= cutoff);
4702 }
4703
4704 fn alert_delivery_key(alert_id: &str, webhook: &WebhookDestination) -> Result<String> {
4705 let destination_id = webhook
4706 .id
4707 .clone()
4708 .unwrap_or(crate::protocol::compute_hash(&(
4709 webhook.url.clone(),
4710 webhook.kind.clone(),
4711 ))?);
4712 Ok(format!("{alert_id}:{destination_id}"))
4713 }
4714
4715 fn monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(monitor_id: &str, slot_key: &str) -> Result<String> {
4716 crate::protocol::compute_hash(&(monitor_id.to_string(), slot_key.to_string(), "confirmation"))
4717 }
4718
4719 fn monitor_confirmation_request_id(monitor_id: &str, slot_key: &str) -> String {
4720 format!("monitor-confirmation:{monitor_id}:{slot_key}")
4721 }
4722
4723 fn direct_validator_for_addresses(addresses: &[Address]) -> Option<Address> {
4724 addresses.iter().min().cloned()
4725 }
4726
4727 fn direct_probe_executor_for_assignment(
4728 assignment: &crate::scheduler::TaskAssignment,
4729 ) -> Option<&str> {
4730 assignment.audit_provider.as_deref().or_else(|| {
4731 assignment
4732 .mandatory_providers
4733 .iter()
4734 .min()
4735 .map(String::as_str)
4736 })
4737 }
4738
4739 fn validator_should_run_direct_probe(
4740 validator: &str,
4741 assignment: &crate::scheduler::TaskAssignment,
4742 ) -> bool {
4743 direct_probe_executor_for_assignment(assignment) == Some(validator)
4744 }
4745
4746 fn required_confirmation_execution_agents(
4747 policy: &MissPolicy,
4748 assigned_validator_count: usize,
4749 available_agents: usize,
4750 direct_probe: bool,
4751 ) -> usize {
4752 if available_agents == 0 || assigned_validator_count == 0 {
4753 return 0;
4754 }
4755 match policy {
4756 MissPolicy::RecordOnly => 0,
4757 MissPolicy::ConfirmWithValidators { .. } => {
4758 if direct_probe {
4759 0
4760 } else {
4761 1.min(available_agents)
4762 }
4763 }
4764 MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents { .. } => {
4765 required_local_agent_receipts(policy, assigned_validator_count, available_agents)
4766 .max(1)
4767 .min(available_agents)
4768 }
4769 }
4770 }
4771
4772 #[derive(Serialize)]
4773 struct DelegatedConsensusAssertionView<'a> {
4774 assertion: &'a crate::protocol::ResponseAssertion,
4775 passed: bool,
4776 }
4777
4778 #[derive(Serialize)]
4779 struct DelegatedConsensusReceiptView<'a> {
4780 success: bool,
4781 response_status: Option<u16>,
4782 error: Option<String>,
4783 assertion_results: Vec<DelegatedConsensusAssertionView<'a>>,
4784 }
4785
4786 fn delegated_receipt_outcome_key(receipt: &SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt) -> Result<String> {
4787 let assertion_results = receipt
4788 .body
4789 .assertion_results
4790 .iter()
4791 .map(|result| DelegatedConsensusAssertionView {
4792 assertion: &result.assertion,
4793 passed: result.passed,
4794 })
4795 .collect();
4796 compute_hash(&DelegatedConsensusReceiptView {
4797 success: receipt.body.success,
4798 response_status: receipt.body.response_status,
4799 error: normalize_confirmation_error(receipt.body.error.as_deref()),
4800 assertion_results,
4801 })
4802 }
4803
4804 #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
4805 fn validate_delegated_browser_receipt(
4806 receipt: &SignedDelegatedBrowserReceipt,
4807 chain_id: &str,
4808 tx_hash: &str,
4809 spec: &BrowserCheckSpec,
4810 parent_validator: &str,
4811 agent_public_key: &str,
4812 lease_id: &str,
4813 monitor_context: Option<(&str, &str)>,
4814 ) -> Result<()> {
4815 if receipt.body.chain_id != chain_id {
4816 bail!("delegated browser receipt chain_id mismatch");
4817 }
4818 if receipt.body.tx_hash != tx_hash {
4819 bail!("delegated browser receipt tx_hash mismatch");
4820 }
4821 if receipt.body.parent_validator != parent_validator {
4822 bail!("delegated browser receipt parent validator mismatch");
4823 }
4824 if receipt.body.agent_public_key != agent_public_key {
4825 bail!("delegated browser receipt agent_public_key mismatch");
4826 }
4827 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
4828 bail!("delegated browser receipt request_id mismatch");
4829 }
4830 if receipt.body.lease_id.as_deref() != Some(lease_id) {
4831 bail!("delegated browser receipt lease_id mismatch");
4832 }
4833 if receipt.body.package_hash != crate::browser::browser_package_hash(&spec.package)? {
4834 bail!("delegated browser receipt package_hash mismatch");
4835 }
4836 if receipt.body.runtime_hash != crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&spec.package.runtime)? {
4837 bail!("delegated browser receipt runtime_hash mismatch");
4838 }
4839 match monitor_context {
4840 Some((monitor_id, slot_key)) => {
4841 if receipt.body.monitor_id.as_deref() != Some(monitor_id) {
4842 bail!("delegated browser receipt monitor_id mismatch");
4843 }
4844 if receipt.body.slot_key.as_deref() != Some(slot_key) {
4845 bail!("delegated browser receipt slot_key mismatch");
4846 }
4847 }
4848 None => {
4849 if receipt.body.monitor_id.is_some() || receipt.body.slot_key.is_some() {
4850 bail!("delegated browser receipt monitor metadata is unexpected");
4851 }
4852 }
4853 }
4854 Ok(())
4855 }
4856
4857 fn normalize_confirmation_error(error: Option<&str>) -> Option<String> {
4858 let text = error?.trim().to_ascii_lowercase();
4859 if text.contains("timed out") || text.contains("timeout") {
4860 Some("timeout".into())
4861 } else if text.contains("dns") || text.contains("resolve") {
4862 Some("dns".into())
4863 } else if text.contains("connection") || text.contains("connect") {
4864 Some("connection".into())
4865 } else {
4866 Some(text)
4867 }
4868 }
4869
4870 fn default_true() -> bool {
4871 true
4872 }
4873
4874 fn apply_transaction_to_state(
4875 state: &mut RuntimeState,
4876 local_address: &str,
4877 tx: SignedTransaction,
4878 ) -> Result<ApplyTransactionResult> {
4879 let was_empty = state.mempool.is_empty()
4880 && state.storage_proof_receipts.is_empty()
4881 && state.compute_receipts.is_empty()
4882 && state.heartbeat_observations.is_empty();
4883 if state.seen_txs.contains(&tx.hash)
4884 || state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&tx.hash)
4885 || state.mempool.contains_key(&tx.hash)
4886 {
4887 return Ok(ApplyTransactionResult {
4888 accepted: false,
4889 should_execute: false,
4890 });
4891 }
4892 state.chain.validate_transaction_basic(&tx)?;
4893 if state
4894 .mempool
4895 .values()
4896 .any(|existing| existing.signer == tx.signer && existing.body.nonce == tx.body.nonce)
4897 {
4898 bail!("another pending transaction already uses this signer nonce");
4899 }
4900 state.seen_txs.insert(tx.hash.clone());
4901 state.mempool.insert(tx.hash.clone(), tx.clone());
4902 if was_empty {
4903 state.active_view = 0;
4904 state.view_started_at = Utc::now();
4905 }
4906 Ok(ApplyTransactionResult {
4907 accepted: true,
4908 should_execute: matches!(
4909 tx.body.kind,
4910 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. }
4911 | TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. }
4912 | TransactionKind::ComputeJob { .. }
4913 ) && state
4914 .chain
4915 .validators
4916 .iter()
4917 .any(|validator| validator == local_address),
4918 })
4919 }
4920
4921 fn apply_receipt_to_state(state: &mut RuntimeState, receipt: SignedHealthReceipt) -> Result<bool> {
4922 if state.seen_receipts.contains(&receipt.id)
4923 || state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&receipt.body.tx_hash)
4924 {
4925 return Ok(false);
4926 }
4927 if receipt.body.chain_id != state.chain.chain_id {
4928 bail!("receipt is for a different chain");
4929 }
4930 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
4931 bail!("receipt signer is not a validator");
4932 }
4933 crate::wallet::verify_receipt(&receipt)?;
4934 if let Some(tx) = state.mempool.get(&receipt.body.tx_hash) {
4935 match &tx.body.kind {
4936 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { spec } => {
4937 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
4938 bail!("receipt request_id does not match the pending health check");
4939 }
4940 }
4941 TransactionKind::Transfer { .. }
4942 | TransactionKind::StorageTransfer { .. }
4943 | TransactionKind::ComputeTransfer { .. }
4944 | TransactionKind::DnsTransfer { .. }
4945 | TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. }
4946 | TransactionKind::ComputeJob { .. }
4947 | TransactionKind::SwapLock { .. }
4948 | TransactionKind::SwapCancel { .. }
4949 | TransactionKind::SwapSettle { .. }
4950 | TransactionKind::MonitorCreate { .. }
4951 | TransactionKind::MonitorUpdate { .. }
4952 | TransactionKind::MonitorPause { .. }
4953 | TransactionKind::MonitorResume { .. }
4954 | TransactionKind::MonitorTopUp { .. }
4955 | TransactionKind::MonitorDelete { .. }
4956 | TransactionKind::StorageCreate { .. }
4957 | TransactionKind::StorageTopUp { .. }
4958 | TransactionKind::StorageCancel { .. }
4959 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingCreate { .. }
4960 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingPause { .. }
4961 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingResume { .. }
4962 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingRetire { .. }
4963 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCreate { .. }
4964 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseRenew { .. }
4965 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseBind { .. }
4966 | TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCancel { .. } => {
4967 bail!("receipts are only valid for health check transactions");
4968 }
4969 }
4970 }
4971
4972 let already_seen_executor = state
4973 .receipts
4974 .get(&receipt.body.tx_hash)
4975 .map(|receipts| {
4976 receipts
4977 .iter()
4978 .any(|existing| existing.body.executor == receipt.body.executor)
4979 })
4980 .unwrap_or(false);
4981 if already_seen_executor {
4982 return Ok(false);
4983 }
4984
4985 state.seen_receipts.insert(receipt.id.clone());
4986 state
4987 .receipts
4988 .entry(receipt.body.tx_hash.clone())
4989 .or_default()
4990 .push(receipt);
4991 Ok(true)
4992 }
4993
4994 fn apply_browser_receipt_to_state(
4995 state: &mut RuntimeState,
4996 receipt: SignedBrowserReceipt,
4997 ) -> Result<bool> {
4998 if state.seen_browser_receipts.contains(&receipt.id)
4999 || state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&receipt.body.tx_hash)
5000 {
5001 return Ok(false);
5002 }
5003 if receipt.body.chain_id != state.chain.chain_id {
5004 bail!("browser receipt is for a different chain");
5005 }
5006 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
5007 bail!("browser receipt signer is not a validator");
5008 }
5009 crate::wallet::verify_browser_receipt(&receipt)?;
5010 if let Some(tx) = state.mempool.get(&receipt.body.tx_hash) {
5011 match &tx.body.kind {
5012 TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { spec } => {
5013 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
5014 bail!("browser receipt request_id does not match the pending browser check");
5015 }
5016 if receipt.body.package_hash != crate::browser::browser_package_hash(&spec.package)?
5017 {
5018 bail!("browser receipt package_hash does not match the pending browser check");
5019 }
5020 if receipt.body.runtime_hash
5021 != crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&spec.package.runtime)?
5022 {
5023 bail!("browser receipt runtime_hash does not match the pending browser check");
5024 }
5025 if receipt.body.monitor_id.is_some() || receipt.body.slot_key.is_some() {
5026 bail!("ad hoc browser receipts may not include monitor metadata");
5027 }
5028 }
5029 _ => {
5030 bail!("browser receipts are only valid for browser check transactions");
5031 }
5032 }
5033 } else if let (Some(monitor_id), Some(slot_key)) = (
5034 receipt.body.monitor_id.as_deref(),
5035 receipt.body.slot_key.as_deref(),
5036 ) {
5037 let monitor = state
5038 .chain
5039 .monitors
5040 .get(monitor_id)
5041 .cloned()
5042 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("browser receipt references an unknown monitor"))?;
5043 let package = monitor
5044 .spec
5045 .browser_package()
5046 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("browser receipt monitor is not a browser monitor"))?;
5047 if receipt.body.tx_hash != monitor_browser_tx_hash(monitor_id, slot_key)? {
5048 bail!("browser receipt tx_hash does not match the monitor slot");
5049 }
5050 if receipt.body.request_id != monitor_browser_request_id(monitor_id, slot_key) {
5051 bail!("browser receipt request_id does not match the monitor slot");
5052 }
5053 if receipt.body.package_hash != crate::browser::browser_package_hash(package)? {
5054 bail!("browser receipt package_hash does not match the browser monitor");
5055 }
5056 if receipt.body.runtime_hash != crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&package.runtime)? {
5057 bail!("browser receipt runtime_hash does not match the browser monitor");
5058 }
5059 let existing_status = state
5060 .chain
5061 .monitor_slot_history
5062 .get(monitor_id)
5063 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(slot_key))
5064 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
5065 if matches!(
5066 existing_status,
5067 Some(
5068 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
5069 | MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
5070 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
5071 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
5072 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
5073 | MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds
5074 )
5075 ) {
5076 return Ok(false);
5077 }
5078 } else {
5079 bail!("browser receipt does not reference a pending browser transaction or monitor slot");
5080 }
5081
5082 let already_seen_executor = state
5083 .browser_receipts
5084 .get(&receipt.body.tx_hash)
5085 .map(|receipts| {
5086 receipts
5087 .iter()
5088 .any(|existing| existing.body.executor == receipt.body.executor)
5089 })
5090 .unwrap_or(false);
5091 if already_seen_executor {
5092 return Ok(false);
5093 }
5094
5095 state.seen_browser_receipts.insert(receipt.id.clone());
5096 state
5097 .browser_receipts
5098 .entry(receipt.body.tx_hash.clone())
5099 .or_default()
5100 .push(receipt);
5101 Ok(true)
5102 }
5103
5104 fn apply_compute_receipt_to_state(
5105 state: &mut RuntimeState,
5106 receipt: SignedComputeReceipt,
5107 ) -> Result<bool> {
5108 if state.seen_compute_receipts.contains(&receipt.id)
5109 || state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&receipt.body.tx_hash)
5110 {
5111 return Ok(false);
5112 }
5113 if receipt.body.chain_id != state.chain.chain_id {
5114 bail!("compute receipt is for a different chain");
5115 }
5116 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
5117 bail!("compute receipt signer is not a validator");
5118 }
5119 crate::wallet::verify_compute_receipt(&receipt)?;
5120 if let Some(tx) = state.mempool.get(&receipt.body.tx_hash) {
5121 let TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec } = &tx.body.kind else {
5122 bail!("compute receipts are only valid for compute job transactions");
5123 };
5124 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
5125 bail!("compute receipt request_id does not match the pending compute job");
5126 }
5127 if receipt.body.job_hash != compute_job_hash(spec)? {
5128 bail!("compute receipt job_hash does not match the pending compute job");
5129 }
5130 } else {
5131 bail!("compute receipt does not reference a pending compute transaction");
5132 }
5133
5134 let already_seen_executor = state
5135 .compute_receipts
5136 .get(&receipt.body.tx_hash)
5137 .map(|receipts| {
5138 receipts
5139 .iter()
5140 .any(|existing| existing.body.executor == receipt.body.executor)
5141 })
5142 .unwrap_or(false);
5143 if already_seen_executor {
5144 return Ok(false);
5145 }
5146
5147 state.seen_compute_receipts.insert(receipt.id.clone());
5148 state
5149 .compute_receipts
5150 .entry(receipt.body.tx_hash.clone())
5151 .or_default()
5152 .push(receipt);
5153 Ok(true)
5154 }
5155
5156 fn apply_storage_proof_receipt_to_state(
5157 state: &mut RuntimeState,
5158 receipt: SignedStorageProofReceipt,
5159 ) -> Result<bool> {
5160 let was_empty = state.mempool.is_empty()
5161 && state.storage_proof_receipts.is_empty()
5162 && state.heartbeat_observations.is_empty();
5163 if state.seen_storage_proof_receipts.contains(&receipt.id) {
5164 return Ok(false);
5165 }
5166 if receipt.body.chain_id != state.chain.chain_id {
5167 bail!("storage proof receipt is for a different chain");
5168 }
5169 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&receipt.body.validator) {
5170 bail!("storage proof receipt signer is not a validator");
5171 }
5172 crate::wallet::verify_storage_proof_receipt(&receipt)?;
5173 let contract = state
5174 .chain
5175 .storage_contracts
5176 .get(&receipt.body.contract_id)
5177 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("storage proof references an unknown contract"))?;
5178 if !matches!(
5179 contract.status,
5180 crate::protocol::StorageContractStatus::Active
5181 ) {
5182 bail!("storage proof references an inactive contract");
5183 }
5184 if receipt.body.host != contract.host {
5185 bail!("storage proof host does not match the contract");
5186 }
5187 if receipt.body.window_start != contract.last_proven_at {
5188 bail!("storage proof window_start does not match the contract");
5189 }
5190 if receipt.body.window_end <= receipt.body.window_start {
5191 bail!("storage proof window is invalid");
5192 }
5193 if receipt.body.window_end > Utc::now() {
5194 bail!("storage proof receipt is from the future");
5195 }
5196
5197 let key = storage_proof_window_key(
5198 &receipt.body.contract_id,
5199 receipt.body.window_start,
5200 receipt.body.window_end,
5201 );
5202 let already_seen_validator = state
5203 .storage_proof_receipts
5204 .get(&key)
5205 .map(|receipts| {
5206 receipts
5207 .iter()
5208 .any(|existing| existing.body.validator == receipt.body.validator)
5209 })
5210 .unwrap_or(false);
5211 if already_seen_validator {
5212 return Ok(false);
5213 }
5214
5215 state.seen_storage_proof_receipts.insert(receipt.id.clone());
5216 state
5217 .storage_proof_receipts
5218 .entry(key)
5219 .or_default()
5220 .push(receipt);
5221 if was_empty {
5222 state.active_view = 0;
5223 state.view_started_at = Utc::now();
5224 }
5225 Ok(true)
5226 }
5227
5228 fn apply_heartbeat_observation_to_state(
5229 state: &mut RuntimeState,
5230 observation: SignedHeartbeatObservation,
5231 ) -> Result<bool> {
5232 if state.seen_heartbeat_observations.contains(&observation.id) {
5233 return Ok(false);
5234 }
5235 if observation.body.chain_id != state.chain.chain_id {
5236 bail!("heartbeat observation is for a different chain");
5237 }
5238 verify_heartbeat_observation(&observation)?;
