5239 let monitor = state
5240 .chain
5241 .monitors
5242 .get(&observation.body.monitor_id)
5243 .cloned()
5244 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("heartbeat observation references an unknown monitor"))?;
5245 validate_monitor_heartbeat_observation(&monitor, &observation)?;
5246 if monitor.paused {
5247 bail!("paused monitors do not accept heartbeat pings");
5248 }
5249 if let Some(nonce) = observation.body.client_nonce.as_deref() {
5250 let key = heartbeat_client_nonce_key(&observation.body.monitor_id, nonce);
5251 if state.heartbeat_client_nonces.contains_key(&key) {
5252 bail!("heartbeat nonce has already been used for this monitor");
5253 }
5254 let timestamp = observation
5255 .body
5256 .client_timestamp
5257 .unwrap_or(observation.body.observed_at);
5258 state.heartbeat_client_nonces.insert(key, timestamp);
5259 }
5260 let key = heartbeat_slot_key(&observation.body.monitor_id, &observation.body.slot_key);
5261 if let Some(slot_record) = state
5262 .chain
5263 .monitor_slot_history
5264 .get(&observation.body.monitor_id)
5265 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&observation.body.slot_key))
5266 && matches!(
5267 (slot_record.status.clone(), observation.body.signal),
5268 (MonitorSlotStatus::Ok, HeartbeatSignal::Success)
5269 | (MonitorSlotStatus::Running, HeartbeatSignal::Start)
5270 | (MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate, HeartbeatSignal::Success)
5271 | (MonitorSlotStatus::FailedExplicit, HeartbeatSignal::Fail)
5272 )
5273 {
5274 return Ok(false);
5275 }
5276 if state
5277 .heartbeat_observations
5278 .get(&key)
5279 .map(|items| {
5280 items
5281 .iter()
5282 .any(|item| item.body.signal == observation.body.signal)
5283 })
5284 .unwrap_or(false)
5285 {
5286 return Ok(false);
5287 }
5288 state
5289 .seen_heartbeat_observations
5290 .insert(observation.id.clone());
5291 state
5292 .heartbeat_observations
5293 .entry(key)
5294 .or_default()
5295 .push(observation);
5296 Ok(true)
5297 }
5298
5299 fn apply_block_to_state(
5300 state: &mut RuntimeState,
5301 block: SignedBlock,
5302 ) -> Result<Option<FinalizedRecords>> {
5303 let mut finalized_health_records = Vec::new();
5304 let mut finalized_browser_records = Vec::new();
5305 let mut finalized_compute_records = Vec::new();
5306 if state.seen_blocks.contains(&block.hash) || block.body.height <= state.chain.height {
5307 return Ok(None);
5308 }
5309 state.chain.apply_block(&block)?;
5310 for tx in &block.body.transactions {
5311 if matches!(tx.body.kind, TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. })
5312 && let Some(record) = state.chain.finalized_health_checks.get(&tx.hash)
5313 {
5314 finalized_health_records.push(record.clone());
5315 }
5316 if matches!(tx.body.kind, TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { .. })
5317 && let Some(record) = state.chain.finalized_browser_checks.get(&tx.hash)
5318 {
5319 finalized_browser_records.push(record.clone());
5320 }
5321 if matches!(tx.body.kind, TransactionKind::ComputeJob { .. })
5322 && let Some(record) = state.chain.finalized_compute_jobs.get(&tx.hash)
5323 {
5324 finalized_compute_records.push(record.clone());
5325 }
5326 }
5327 state.seen_blocks.insert(block.hash.clone());
5328 for tx in &block.body.transactions {
5329 state.mempool.remove(&tx.hash);
5330 state.receipts.remove(&tx.hash);
5331 state.browser_receipts.remove(&tx.hash);
5332 state.compute_receipts.remove(&tx.hash);
5333 }
5334 for batch in &block.body.monitor_browser_batches {
5335 if let Ok(tx_hash) = monitor_browser_tx_hash(&batch.monitor_id, &batch.slot_key) {
5336 state.browser_receipts.remove(&tx_hash);
5337 }
5338 }
5339 for batch in &block.body.storage_proof_batches {
5340 if let Some(first) = batch.receipts.first() {
5341 let key = storage_proof_window_key(
5342 &first.body.contract_id,
5343 first.body.window_start,
5344 first.body.window_end,
5345 );
5346 state.storage_proof_receipts.remove(&key);
5347 }
5348 }
5349 for observation in &block.body.heartbeat_observations {
5350 let key = heartbeat_slot_key(&observation.body.monitor_id, &observation.body.slot_key);
5351 if let Some(items) = state.heartbeat_observations.get_mut(&key) {
5352 items.retain(|item| item.id != observation.id);
5353 if items.is_empty() {
5354 state.heartbeat_observations.remove(&key);
5355 }
5356 }
5357 }
5358 state.active_view = 0;
5359 state.view_started_at = Utc::now();
5360 prune_pending_state(state);
5361 Ok(Some((
5362 finalized_health_records,
5363 finalized_browser_records,
5364 finalized_compute_records,
5365 )))
5366 }
5367
5368 fn apply_block_approval_to_state(
5369 state: &mut RuntimeState,
5370 approval: SignedBlockApproval,
5371 ) -> Result<bool> {
5372 if approval.body.chain_id != state.chain.chain_id {
5373 bail!("block approval is for a different chain");
5374 }
5375 if !state.chain.validators.contains(&approval.body.approver) {
5376 bail!("block approval signer is not a validator");
5377 }
5378 crate::wallet::verify_block_approval(&approval)?;
5379 let slot_key = block_approval_slot_key(
5380 approval.body.height,
5381 approval.body.view,
5382 &approval.body.previous_hash,
5383 );
5384 if let Some(existing) = state.block_approvals.get(&slot_key) {
5385 if existing.body.block_hash != approval.body.block_hash {
5386 bail!("validator already approved a different block for this height and view");
5387 }
5388 return Ok(false);
5389 }
5390 state.block_approvals.insert(slot_key, approval);
5391 Ok(true)
5392 }
5393
5394 fn apply_view_advance_to_state(
5395 state: &mut RuntimeState,
5396 active_view: u64,
5397 view_started_at: DateTime<Utc>,
5398 ) {
5399 state.active_view = active_view;
5400 state.view_started_at = view_started_at;
5401 retain_current_block_approval_slot(state);
5402 }
5403
5404 fn prune_pending_state(state: &mut RuntimeState) {
5405 let mut ordered: Vec<SignedTransaction> = state.mempool.values().cloned().collect();
5406 ordered.sort_by(|left, right| {
5407 left.body
5408 .created_at
5409 .cmp(&right.body.created_at)
5410 .then_with(|| left.body.nonce.cmp(&right.body.nonce))
5411 .then_with(|| left.hash.cmp(&right.hash))
5412 });
5413
5414 let mut retained = BTreeMap::new();
5415 let mut seen_nonces = BTreeSet::new();
5416 for tx in ordered {
5417 if state.chain.is_finalized_health_check(&tx.hash) {
5418 continue;
5419 }
5420 if state.chain.validate_transaction_basic(&tx).is_err() {
5421 continue;
5422 }
5423 if !seen_nonces.insert((tx.signer.clone(), tx.body.nonce)) {
5424 continue;
5425 }
5426 retained.insert(tx.hash.clone(), tx);
5427 }
5428
5429 let retained_hashes: BTreeSet<String> = retained.keys().cloned().collect();
5430 state.mempool = retained;
5431 state
5432 .receipts
5433 .retain(|tx_hash, _| retained_hashes.contains(tx_hash));
5434 state
5435 .compute_receipts
5436 .retain(|tx_hash, _| retained_hashes.contains(tx_hash));
5437 state.browser_receipts.retain(|tx_hash, receipts| {
5438 if retained_hashes.contains(tx_hash) {
5439 return true;
5440 }
5441 receipts
5442 .first()
5443 .and_then(|receipt| {
5444 let monitor_id = receipt.body.monitor_id.as_deref()?;
5445 let slot_key = receipt.body.slot_key.as_deref()?;
5446 let monitor = state.chain.monitors.get(monitor_id)?;
5447 if !monitor.spec.is_browser() {
5448 return None;
5449 }
5450 let status = state
5451 .chain
5452 .monitor_slot_history
5453 .get(monitor_id)
5454 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(slot_key))
5455 .map(|slot| slot.status.clone());
5456 Some(!matches!(
5457 status,
5458 Some(
5459 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
5460 | MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
5461 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
5462 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
5463 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
5464 | MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds
5465 )
5466 ))
5467 })
5468 .unwrap_or(false)
5469 });
5470 state.storage_proof_receipts.retain(|_, receipts| {
5471 receipts
5472 .first()
5473 .and_then(|receipt| {
5474 let contract = state
5475 .chain
5476 .storage_contracts
5477 .get(&receipt.body.contract_id)?;
5478 Some(
5479 matches!(
5480 contract.status,
5481 crate::protocol::StorageContractStatus::Active
5482 ) && receipt.body.window_start == contract.last_proven_at
5483 && receipt.body.window_end <= Utc::now(),
5484 )
5485 })
5486 .unwrap_or(false)
5487 });
5488 state
5489 .heartbeat_observations
5490 .retain(|_, items| !items.is_empty());
5491 prune_client_nonces(state, Utc::now());
5492 state.seen_txs = state
5493 .chain
5494 .finalized_health_check_ids
5495 .iter()
5496 .cloned()
5497 .chain(state.chain.finalized_compute_job_ids.iter().cloned())
5498 .chain(state.mempool.keys().cloned())
5499 .collect();
5500 state.seen_receipts = state
5501 .receipts
5502 .values()
5503 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
5504 .collect();
5505 state.seen_browser_receipts = state
5506 .browser_receipts
5507 .values()
5508 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
5509 .collect();
5510 state.seen_compute_receipts = state
5511 .compute_receipts
5512 .values()
5513 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
5514 .collect();
5515 state.seen_storage_proof_receipts = state
5516 .storage_proof_receipts
5517 .values()
5518 .flat_map(|receipts| receipts.iter().map(|receipt| receipt.id.clone()))
5519 .collect();
5520 state.seen_heartbeat_observations = state
5521 .heartbeat_observations
5522 .values()
5523 .flat_map(|items| items.iter().map(|item| item.id.clone()))
5524 .collect();
5525 if state.mempool.is_empty()
5526 && state.storage_proof_receipts.is_empty()
5527 && state.compute_receipts.is_empty()
5528 {
5529 state.active_view = 0;
5530 state.view_started_at = Utc::now();
5531 }
5532 retain_current_block_approval_slot(state);
5533 }
5534
5535 fn block_approval_slot_key(height: u64, view: u64, previous_hash: &str) -> String {
5536 format!("{height}:{view}:{previous_hash}")
5537 }
5538
5539 fn heartbeat_slot_key(monitor_id: &str, slot_key: &str) -> String {
5540 format!("{monitor_id}:{slot_key}")
5541 }
5542
5543 fn storage_proof_window_key(
5544 contract_id: &str,
5545 window_start: DateTime<Utc>,
5546 window_end: DateTime<Utc>,
5547 ) -> String {
5548 format!(
5549 "{}:{}:{}",
5550 contract_id,
5551 window_start.to_rfc3339(),
5552 window_end.to_rfc3339()
5553 )
5554 }
5555
5556 fn normalize_route_host(host: &str) -> Result<String> {
5557 let host = host
5558 .trim()
5559 .trim_end_matches('.')
5560 .split(':')
5561 .next()
5562 .unwrap_or_default()
5563 .to_ascii_lowercase();
5564 if host.is_empty() || host.contains('/') || host.contains('\\') {
5565 bail!("domain route host is invalid");
5566 }
5567 Ok(host)
5568 }
5569
5570 fn retain_current_block_approval_slot(state: &mut RuntimeState) {
5571 let current_slot = block_approval_slot_key(
5572 state.chain.height + 1,
5573 state.active_view,
5574 &state.chain.last_block_hash,
5575 );
5576 state
5577 .block_approvals
5578 .retain(|slot, _| slot == &current_slot);
5579 }
5580
5581 fn default_view_started_at() -> DateTime<Utc> {
5582 Utc::now()
5583 }
5584
5585 #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
5586 fn candidate_block_fits_limits(
5587 chain_id: &str,
5588 height: u64,
5589 view: u64,
5590 previous_hash: &str,
5591 proposer: &str,
5592 transactions: &[SignedTransaction],
5593 health_batches: &[crate::protocol::BlockHealthBatch],
5594 browser_batches: &[BlockBrowserBatch],
5595 compute_batches: &[BlockComputeBatch],
5596 monitor_browser_batches: &[MonitorBrowserBatch],
5597 heartbeat_observations: &[SignedHeartbeatObservation],
5598 monitor_evaluations: &[MonitorEvaluation],
5599 confirmation_batches: &[MonitorConfirmationBatch],
5600 storage_proof_batches: &[StorageProofBatch],
5601 ) -> Result<bool> {
5602 let body = BlockBody {
5603 chain_id: chain_id.to_string(),
5604 height,
5605 view,
5606 previous_hash: previous_hash.to_string(),
5607 proposer: proposer.to_string(),
5608 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
5609 transactions: transactions.to_vec(),
5610 health_batches: health_batches.to_vec(),
5611 browser_batches: browser_batches.to_vec(),
5612 compute_batches: compute_batches.to_vec(),
5613 monitor_browser_batches: monitor_browser_batches.to_vec(),
5614 heartbeat_observations: heartbeat_observations.to_vec(),
5615 monitor_evaluations: monitor_evaluations.to_vec(),
5616 confirmation_batches: confirmation_batches.to_vec(),
5617 storage_proof_batches: storage_proof_batches.to_vec(),
5618 };
5619 Ok(validate_block_body_limits(&body).is_ok())
5620 }
5621
5622 fn block_archive_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5623 state_dir.join("blocks")
5624 }
5625
5626 fn journal_path(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5627 state_dir.join("state.wal")
5628 }
5629
5630 fn block_archive_path(state_dir: &Path, height: u64) -> PathBuf {
5631 block_archive_dir(state_dir).join(format!("{height:020}.json"))
5632 }
5633
5634 fn health_check_archive_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5635 state_dir.join("health_checks")
5636 }
5637
5638 fn health_check_archive_path(state_dir: &Path, tx_hash: &str) -> PathBuf {
5639 health_check_archive_dir(state_dir).join(format!("{tx_hash}.json"))
5640 }
5641
5642 fn browser_check_archive_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5643 state_dir.join("browser_checks")
5644 }
5645
5646 fn browser_check_archive_path(state_dir: &Path, tx_hash: &str) -> PathBuf {
5647 browser_check_archive_dir(state_dir).join(format!("{tx_hash}.json"))
5648 }
5649
5650 fn compute_job_archive_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5651 state_dir.join("compute_jobs")
5652 }
5653
5654 fn compute_job_archive_path(state_dir: &Path, tx_hash: &str) -> PathBuf {
5655 compute_job_archive_dir(state_dir).join(format!("{tx_hash}.json"))
5656 }
5657
5658 fn compute_artifact_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5659 state_dir.join("compute_artifacts")
5660 }
5661
5662 fn compute_sandbox_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5663 state_dir.join("compute_sandbox")
5664 }
5665
5666 fn browser_artifact_dir(state_dir: &Path) -> PathBuf {
5667 state_dir.join("browser_artifacts")
5668 }
5669
5670 async fn write_json_atomic<T: Serialize>(path: &Path, value: &T) -> Result<()> {
5671 let payload = serde_json::to_vec(value)?;
5672 let temp_path = path.with_extension("tmp");
5673 if let Some(parent) = path.parent() {
5674 fs::create_dir_all(parent).await?;
5675 }
5676 fs::write(&temp_path, payload).await?;
5677 fs::rename(&temp_path, path).await?;
5678 Ok(())
5679 }
5680
5681 async fn append_journal_event(state_dir: &Path, event: &PersistedJournalEvent) -> Result<()> {
5682 let path = journal_path(state_dir);
5683 if let Some(parent) = path.parent() {
5684 fs::create_dir_all(parent).await?;
5685 }
5686 let payload = serde_json::to_vec(event)?;
5687 let mut file = fs::OpenOptions::new()
5688 .create(true)
5689 .append(true)
5690 .open(&path)
5691 .await?;
5692 file.write_all(&payload).await?;
5693 file.write_all(b"\n").await?;
5694 file.flush().await?;
5695 Ok(())
5696 }
5697
5698 async fn clear_journal_events(state_dir: &Path) -> Result<()> {
5699 fs::write(journal_path(state_dir), b"").await?;
5700 Ok(())
5701 }
5702
5703 async fn load_journal_events(state_dir: &Path) -> Result<Vec<PersistedJournalEvent>> {
5704 let path = journal_path(state_dir);
5705 if !fs::try_exists(&path).await? {
5706 return Ok(Vec::new());
5707 }
5708 let payload = fs::read_to_string(path).await?;
5709 payload
5710 .lines()
5711 .map(str::trim)
5712 .filter(|line| !line.is_empty())
5713 .map(serde_json::from_str)
5714 .collect::<std::result::Result<Vec<_>, _>>()
5715 .map_err(Into::into)
5716 }
5717
5718 async fn read_json_optional<T: DeserializeOwned>(path: &Path) -> Result<Option<T>> {
5719 if !fs::try_exists(path).await? {
5720 return Ok(None);
5721 }
5722 let payload = fs::read(path).await?;
5723 Ok(Some(serde_json::from_slice(&payload)?))
5724 }
5725
5726 async fn archive_block(state_dir: &Path, block: &SignedBlock) -> Result<()> {
5727 write_json_atomic(&block_archive_path(state_dir, block.body.height), block).await
5728 }
5729
5730 async fn load_archived_block(state_dir: &Path, height: u64) -> Result<Option<SignedBlock>> {
5731 read_json_optional(&block_archive_path(state_dir, height)).await
5732 }
5733
5734 async fn archive_finalized_health_check(
5735 state_dir: &Path,
5736 record: &FinalizedHealthCheck,
5737 ) -> Result<()> {
5738 write_json_atomic(
5739 &health_check_archive_path(state_dir, &record.tx_hash),
5740 record,
5741 )
5742 .await
5743 }
5744
5745 async fn load_archived_finalized_health_check(
5746 state_dir: &Path,
5747 tx_hash: &str,
5748 ) -> Result<Option<FinalizedHealthCheck>> {
5749 read_json_optional(&health_check_archive_path(state_dir, tx_hash)).await
5750 }
5751
5752 async fn archive_finalized_browser_check(
5753 state_dir: &Path,
5754 record: &FinalizedBrowserCheck,
5755 ) -> Result<()> {
5756 write_json_atomic(
5757 &browser_check_archive_path(state_dir, &record.tx_hash),
5758 record,
5759 )
5760 .await
5761 }
5762
5763 async fn load_archived_finalized_browser_check(
5764 state_dir: &Path,
5765 tx_hash: &str,
5766 ) -> Result<Option<FinalizedBrowserCheck>> {
5767 read_json_optional(&browser_check_archive_path(state_dir, tx_hash)).await
5768 }
5769
5770 async fn archive_finalized_compute_job(
5771 state_dir: &Path,
5772 record: &FinalizedComputeJob,
5773 ) -> Result<()> {
5774 write_json_atomic(
5775 &compute_job_archive_path(state_dir, &record.tx_hash),
5776 record,
5777 )
5778 .await
5779 }
5780
5781 async fn load_archived_finalized_compute_job(
5782 state_dir: &Path,
5783 tx_hash: &str,
5784 ) -> Result<Option<FinalizedComputeJob>> {
5785 read_json_optional(&compute_job_archive_path(state_dir, tx_hash)).await
5786 }
5787
5788 async fn migrate_legacy_archives(
5789 state_dir: &Path,
5790 finalized_blocks: &BTreeMap<u64, SignedBlock>,
5791 finalized_health_checks: &BTreeMap<String, FinalizedHealthCheck>,
5792 finalized_browser_checks: &BTreeMap<String, FinalizedBrowserCheck>,
5793 finalized_compute_jobs: &BTreeMap<String, FinalizedComputeJob>,
5794 ) -> Result<()> {
5795 for (height, block) in finalized_blocks {
5796 let path = block_archive_path(state_dir, *height);
5797 if !fs::try_exists(&path).await? {
5798 write_json_atomic(&path, block).await?;
5799 }
5800 }
5801 for (tx_hash, record) in finalized_health_checks {
5802 let path = health_check_archive_path(state_dir, tx_hash);
5803 if !fs::try_exists(&path).await? {
5804 write_json_atomic(&path, record).await?;
5805 }
5806 }
5807 for (tx_hash, record) in finalized_browser_checks {
5808 let path = browser_check_archive_path(state_dir, tx_hash);
5809 if !fs::try_exists(&path).await? {
5810 write_json_atomic(&path, record).await?;
5811 }
5812 }
5813 for (tx_hash, record) in finalized_compute_jobs {
5814 let path = compute_job_archive_path(state_dir, tx_hash);
5815 if !fs::try_exists(&path).await? {
5816 write_json_atomic(&path, record).await?;
5817 }
5818 }
5819 Ok(())
5820 }
5821
5822 async fn load_genesis(path: &Path) -> Result<crate::protocol::GenesisConfig> {
5823 let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)
5824 .await
5825 .with_context(|| format!("failed to read genesis {}", path.display()))?;
5826 Ok(serde_json::from_str(&contents)?)
5827 }
5828
5829 async fn load_state(
5830 path: PathBuf,
5831 genesis: &crate::protocol::GenesisConfig,
5832 ) -> Result<PersistedNodeState> {
5833 let chain = ChainState::from_genesis(genesis)?;
5834 if !fs::try_exists(&path).await? {
5835 return Ok(PersistedNodeState {
5836 chain,
5837 finalized_blocks: BTreeMap::new(),
5838 mempool: BTreeMap::new(),
5839 receipts: BTreeMap::new(),
5840 browser_receipts: BTreeMap::new(),
5841 compute_receipts: BTreeMap::new(),
5842 storage_proof_receipts: BTreeMap::new(),
5843 heartbeat_observations: BTreeMap::new(),
5844 heartbeat_client_nonces: BTreeMap::new(),
5845 block_approvals: BTreeMap::new(),
5846 delivered_alerts: BTreeMap::new(),
5847 active_view: 0,
5848 view_started_at: Utc::now(),
5849 });
5850 }
5851
5852 let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path).await?;
5853 let mut persisted: PersistedNodeState = serde_json::from_str(&contents)?;
5854 if persisted.chain.chain_id != chain.chain_id {
5855 bail!("persisted state chain_id does not match the supplied genesis");
5856 }
5857 if persisted.chain.validators != chain.validators {
5858 bail!("persisted validator set does not match the supplied genesis");
5859 }
5860 if persisted.chain.treasury != chain.treasury {
5861 bail!("persisted treasury does not match the supplied genesis");
5862 }
5863 if persisted.chain.finalized_health_check_ids.is_empty()
5864 && !persisted.chain.finalized_health_checks.is_empty()
5865 {
5866 persisted.chain.finalized_health_check_ids = persisted
5867 .chain
5868 .finalized_health_checks
5869 .keys()
5870 .cloned()
5871 .collect();
5872 }
5873 if persisted.chain.finalized_browser_check_ids.is_empty()
5874 && !persisted.chain.finalized_browser_checks.is_empty()
5875 {
5876 persisted.chain.finalized_browser_check_ids = persisted
5877 .chain
5878 .finalized_browser_checks
5879 .keys()
5880 .cloned()
5881 .collect();
5882 }
5883 if persisted.chain.finalized_compute_job_ids.is_empty()
5884 && !persisted.chain.finalized_compute_jobs.is_empty()
5885 {
5886 persisted.chain.finalized_compute_job_ids = persisted
5887 .chain
5888 .finalized_compute_jobs
5889 .keys()
5890 .cloned()
5891 .collect();
5892 }
5893 if persisted.chain.block_history.is_empty() {
5894 persisted
5895 .chain
5896 .block_history
5897 .push(persisted.chain.last_block_hash.clone());
5898 }
5899 Ok(persisted)
5900 }
5901
5902 type ApiResult<T> = std::result::Result<Json<T>, (StatusCode, String)>;
5903 type AcceptedApiResult<T> = std::result::Result<(StatusCode, Json<T>), (StatusCode, String)>;
5904
5905 async fn get_account(
5906 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5907 AxumPath(address): AxumPath<String>,
5908 ) -> ApiResult<AccountResponse> {
5909 Ok(Json(runtime.account_response(address).await))
5910 }
5911
5912 async fn get_status(State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>) -> ApiResult<NodeStatusResponse> {
5913 Ok(Json(runtime.status_response().await))
5914 }
5915
5916 async fn get_internal_block(
5917 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5918 headers: HeaderMap,
5919 AxumPath(height): AxumPath<u64>,
5920 ) -> ApiResult<SignedBlock> {
5921 runtime.require_gossip_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
5922 let block = runtime
5923 .finalized_block_at_height(height)
5924 .await
5925 .ok_or_else(|| (StatusCode::NOT_FOUND, format!("block {height} not found")))?;
5926 Ok(Json(block))
5927 }
5928
5929 async fn get_ledger(State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>) -> ApiResult<LedgerSnapshot> {
5930 Ok(Json(runtime.ledger_snapshot().await))
5931 }
5932
5933 async fn get_job(
5934 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5935 AxumPath(tx_hash): AxumPath<String>,
5936 ) -> ApiResult<JobResponse> {
5937 Ok(Json(runtime.job_response(tx_hash).await))
5938 }
5939
5940 async fn get_swap_lock(
5941 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5942 AxumPath(quote_id): AxumPath<String>,
5943 ) -> ApiResult<SwapLockResponse> {
5944 Ok(Json(runtime.swap_lock_response(quote_id).await))
5945 }
5946
5947 async fn get_storage_contract(
5948 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5949 AxumPath(contract_id): AxumPath<String>,
5950 ) -> ApiResult<StorageContractResponse> {
5951 Ok(Json(
5952 runtime
5953 .storage_contract_response(contract_id)
5954 .await
5955 .map_err(internal_error)?,
5956 ))
5957 }
5958
5959 async fn get_compute_artifact(
5960 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5961 headers: HeaderMap,
5962 AxumPath((tx_hash, shard_id, path)): AxumPath<(String, String, String)>,
5963 ) -> std::result::Result<Response, (StatusCode, String)> {
5964 runtime.require_control_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
5965 let content_type = runtime
5966 .compute_artifact_content_type(&tx_hash, &shard_id, &path)
5967 .await
5968 .map_err(internal_error)?;
5969 let artifact_path = compute_artifact_path(
5970 &compute_artifact_dir(&runtime.config.state_dir),
5971 &tx_hash,
5972 &shard_id,
5973 &path,
5974 )
5975 .map_err(internal_error)?;
5976 let bytes = fs::read(&artifact_path).await.map_err(|_| {
5977 (
5978 StatusCode::NOT_FOUND,
5979 "compute artifact not found".to_string(),
5980 )
5981 })?;
5982 let mut headers = HeaderMap::new();
5983 headers.insert(
5984 CONTENT_TYPE,
5985 HeaderValue::from_str(&content_type)
5986 .unwrap_or_else(|_| HeaderValue::from_static("application/octet-stream")),
5987 );
5988 Ok((headers, Body::from(bytes)).into_response())
5989 }
5990
5991 async fn get_domain_route(
5992 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
5993 AxumPath(host): AxumPath<String>,
5994 ) -> ApiResult<DomainRouteResponse> {
5995 Ok(Json(
5996 runtime
5997 .domain_route_response(host)
5998 .await
5999 .map_err(internal_error)?,
6000 ))
6001 }
6002
6003 async fn get_adapters(State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>) -> ApiResult<AdaptersResponse> {
6004 Ok(Json(AdaptersResponse {
6005 adapters: runtime.swap_registry.adapter_ids(),
6006 }))
6007 }
6008
6009 async fn submit_transaction(
6010 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6011 headers: HeaderMap,
6012 Json(tx): Json<SignedTransaction>,
6013 ) -> ApiResult<SubmittedResponse> {
6014 runtime.require_control_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6015 let accepted = runtime
6016 .accept_transaction(tx.clone(), true)
6017 .await
6018 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6019 Ok(Json(SubmittedResponse {
6020 accepted,
6021 id: tx.hash,
6022 }))
6023 }
6024
6025 async fn quote_swap(
6026 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6027 headers: HeaderMap,
6028 Json(request): Json<SwapQuoteRequest>,
6029 ) -> ApiResult<SwapExecutionPlan> {
6030 runtime.require_control_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6031 let plan = runtime
6032 .quote_and_plan(request)
6033 .await
6034 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6035 Ok(Json(plan))
6036 }
6037
6038 async fn create_monitor(
6039 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6040 headers: HeaderMap,
6041 Json(tx): Json<SignedTransaction>,
6042 ) -> ApiResult<SubmittedResponse> {
6043 runtime.require_control_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6044 match tx.body.kind {
6045 TransactionKind::MonitorCreate { .. } => {}
6046 _ => {
6047 return Err((
6048 StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,
6049 "monitor create endpoint requires a monitor_create transaction".into(),
6050 ));
6051 }
6052 }
6053 let accepted = runtime
6054 .accept_transaction(tx.clone(), true)
6055 .await
6056 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6057 Ok(Json(SubmittedResponse {
6058 accepted,
6059 id: tx.hash,
6060 }))
6061 }
6062
6063 async fn update_monitor(
6064 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6065 headers: HeaderMap,
6066 AxumPath(monitor_id): AxumPath<String>,
6067 Json(tx): Json<SignedTransaction>,
6068 ) -> ApiResult<SubmittedResponse> {
6069 runtime.require_control_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6070 match &tx.body.kind {
6071 TransactionKind::MonitorUpdate {
6072 monitor_id: tx_monitor_id,
6073 ..
6074 } if tx_monitor_id == &monitor_id => {}
6075 _ => {
6076 return Err((
6077 StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,
6078 "monitor update endpoint requires a matching monitor_update transaction".into(),
6079 ));
6080 }
6081 }
6082 let accepted = runtime
6083 .accept_transaction(tx.clone(), true)
6084 .await
6085 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6086 Ok(Json(SubmittedResponse {
6087 accepted,
6088 id: tx.hash,
6089 }))
6090 }
6091
6092 async fn delete_monitor(
6093 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6094 headers: HeaderMap,
6095 AxumPath(monitor_id): AxumPath<String>,
6096 Json(tx): Json<SignedTransaction>,
6097 ) -> ApiResult<SubmittedResponse> {
6098 runtime.require_control_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6099 match &tx.body.kind {
6100 TransactionKind::MonitorDelete {
6101 monitor_id: tx_monitor_id,
6102 } if tx_monitor_id == &monitor_id => {}
6103 _ => {
6104 return Err((
6105 StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,
6106 "monitor delete endpoint requires a matching monitor_delete transaction".into(),
6107 ));
6108 }
6109 }
6110 let accepted = runtime
6111 .accept_transaction(tx.clone(), true)
6112 .await
6113 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6114 Ok(Json(SubmittedResponse {
6115 accepted,
6116 id: tx.hash,
6117 }))
6118 }
6119

6274 async fn ping_success_get(
6275 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6276 AxumPath((monitor_id, token)): AxumPath<(String, String)>,
6277 ) -> AcceptedApiResult<PingAcceptedResponse> {
6278 accept_secret_ping(
6279 runtime,
6280 monitor_id,
6281 token,
6282 HeartbeatSignal::Success,
6283 Bytes::new(),
6284 )
6285 .await
6286 }
6287

6290 AxumPath((monitor_id, token)): AxumPath<(String, String)>,
6291 body: Bytes,
6292 ) -> AcceptedApiResult<PingAcceptedResponse> {
6293 accept_secret_ping(runtime, monitor_id, token, HeartbeatSignal::Success, body).await
6294 }

6340 async fn ping_signed_post(
6341 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6342 AxumPath(monitor_id): AxumPath<String>,
6343 Query(query): Query<PingSignalQuery>,
6344 headers: HeaderMap,
6345 body: Bytes,
6346 ) -> AcceptedApiResult<PingAcceptedResponse> {
6347 let signal = parse_heartbeat_signal(query.signal.as_deref(), &headers)?;
6348 accept_signed_ping(runtime, monitor_id, signal, headers, body).await
6349 }

6357 let accepted = runtime
6358 .accept_transaction(tx.clone(), false)
6359 .await
6360 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6361 Ok(Json(SubmittedResponse {
6362 accepted,
6363 id: tx.hash,
6364 }))
6365 }

6432 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6433 headers: HeaderMap,
6434 Json(observation): Json<SignedHeartbeatObservation>,

6437 let accepted = runtime

6446
6447 async fn run_monitor_confirmation(
6448 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6449 headers: HeaderMap,
6450 Json(request): Json<MonitorConfirmRequest>,
6451 ) -> ApiResult<MonitorConfirmationContribution> {
6452 runtime.require_gossip_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6453 let (chain_id, monitor) = {
6454 let state = runtime.state.read().await;
6455 let monitor = state
6456 .chain
6457 .monitors
6458 .get(&request.monitor_id)
6459 .cloned()
6460 .ok_or_else(|| {
6461 (
6462 StatusCode::NOT_FOUND,
6463 format!("unknown monitor {}", request.monitor_id),
6464 )
6465 })?;
6466 (state.chain.chain_id.clone(), monitor)
6467 };
6468 let contribution = runtime
6469 .execute_monitor_confirmation_contribution(
6470 &chain_id,
6471 &monitor,
6472 &request.slot_key,
6473 request.assigned_validator_count,
6474 request.direct_probe,
6475 )
6476 .await
6477 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6478 Ok(Json(contribution))
6479 }
6480
6481 async fn gossip_block(
6482 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6483 headers: HeaderMap,

6489 .await

6491 Ok(Json(SubmittedResponse {
6492 accepted,
6493 id: block.hash,
6494 }))
6495 }
6496
6497 async fn approve_block(
6498 State(runtime): State<Arc<NodeRuntime>>,
6499 headers: HeaderMap,
6500 Json(block): Json<SignedBlock>,
6501 ) -> ApiResult<SignedBlockApproval> {
6502 runtime.require_gossip_auth(&headers).map_err(auth_error)?;
6503 let approval = runtime
6504 .approve_block_proposal(&block)
6505 .await
6506 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6507 Ok(Json(approval))
6508 }
6509
6510 async fn accept_secret_ping(
6511 runtime: Arc<NodeRuntime>,
6512 monitor_id: String,
6513 token: String,
6514 signal: HeartbeatSignal,
6515 body: Bytes,
6516 ) -> AcceptedApiResult<PingAcceptedResponse> {
6517 let response = runtime
6518 .record_secret_ping(monitor_id, token, signal, body)
6519 .await
6520 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6521 Ok((StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response)))
6522 }
6523
6524 async fn accept_signed_ping(
6525 runtime: Arc<NodeRuntime>,
6526 monitor_id: String,
6527 signal: HeartbeatSignal,
6528 headers: HeaderMap,
6529 body: Bytes,
6530 ) -> AcceptedApiResult<PingAcceptedResponse> {
6531 let response = runtime
6532 .record_signed_ping(monitor_id, signal, &headers, body)
6533 .await
6534 .map_err(internal_error)?;
6535 Ok((StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response)))
6536 }
6537
6538 fn internal_error(error: anyhow::Error) -> (StatusCode, String) {
6539 (StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST, error.to_string())
6540 }
6541
6542 fn auth_error(error: anyhow::Error) -> (StatusCode, String) {
6543 (StatusCode::UNAUTHORIZED, error.to_string())
6544 }
6545
6546 fn require_bearer_token(headers: &HeaderMap, expected: Option<&str>, scope: &str) -> Result<()> {
6547 let Some(expected) = expected else {
6548 return Ok(());
6549 };
6550 let supplied = headers
6551 .get(AUTHORIZATION)
6552 .and_then(|value| value.to_str().ok())
6553 .and_then(|value| value.strip_prefix("Bearer "))
6554 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("missing bearer token for {scope}"))?;
6555 if supplied != expected {
6556 bail!("invalid bearer token for {scope}");
6557 }
6558 Ok(())
6559 }
6560
6561 fn bearer_token_value(token: &str) -> String {
6562 format!("Bearer {token}")
6563 }
6564
6565 #[cfg(test)]
6566 mod tests {
6567 use std::{collections::BTreeMap, fs, net::SocketAddr};
6568
6569 use chrono::Duration as ChronoDuration;
6570 use tempfile::tempdir;
6571
6572 use super::*;
6573 use crate::{
6574 protocol::{GenesisConfig, HealthReceiptBody, SignedTransaction, TransactionBody},
6575 wallet::Wallet,
6576 };
6577
6578 fn test_genesis(
6579 validators: &[Address],
6580 treasury: Address,
6581 requester: Address,
6582 ) -> GenesisConfig {
6583 GenesisConfig {
6584 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6585 treasury,
6586 validators: validators.to_vec(),
6587 chain_started_at: Utc::now(),
6588 block_time_secs: 1,
6589 min_health_receipts: 2,
6590 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(requester, 5)]),
6591 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
6592 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
6593 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
6594 }
6595 }
6596
6597 async fn runtime_for_validator(
6598 validator_wallet: &Wallet,
6599 validators: &[Wallet],
6600 requester: &Wallet,
6601 ) -> Result<(NodeRuntime, tempfile::TempDir, NodeConfig)> {
6602 let temp = tempdir()?;
6603 let wallet_path = temp.path().join("validator.json");
6604 validator_wallet.save_insecure_plaintext(&wallet_path)?;
6605
6606 let genesis = test_genesis(
6607 &validators.iter().map(Wallet::address).collect::<Vec<_>>(),
6608 validators[0].address(),
6609 requester.address(),
6610 );
6611 let genesis_path = temp.path().join("genesis.json");
6612 fs::write(&genesis_path, serde_json::to_vec_pretty(&genesis)?)?;
6613
6614 let config = NodeConfig {
6615 bind_addr: "127.0.0.1:0".parse::<SocketAddr>().unwrap(),
6616 wallet_path,
6617 genesis_path,
6618 state_dir: temp.path().join("state"),
6619 peers: Vec::new(),
6620 swap_config_path: None,
6621 notification_policies_path: None,
6622 probe_agents_path: None,
6623 browser_runner_program: None,
6624 browser_runner_args: Vec::new(),
6625 browser_cache_dir: None,
6626 browser_secret_store_path: None,
6627 control_api_token: None,
6628 gossip_api_token: None,
6629 wallet_passphrase: None,
6630 };
6631 let runtime = NodeRuntime::from_config(config.clone()).await?;
6632
6633 Ok((runtime, temp, config))
6634 }
6635
6636 #[tokio::test]
6637 async fn stale_view_rotates_approval_slot_and_allows_reapproval() {
6638 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
6639 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
6640 let validator_c = Wallet::generate();
6641 let requester = Wallet::generate();
6642 let validators = vec![
6643 validator_a.clone(),
6644 validator_b.clone(),
6645 validator_c.clone(),
6646 ];
6647
6648 let (runtime, _temp, _config) =
6649 runtime_for_validator(&validator_b, &validators, &requester)
6650 .await
6651 .unwrap();
6652
6653 let pending_tx = requester
6654 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
6655 hash: String::new(),
6656 signer: String::new(),
6657 body: TransactionBody {
6658 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6659 nonce: 1,
6660 created_at: Utc::now(),
6661 kind: TransactionKind::Transfer {
6662 to: validator_a.address(),
6663 amount: 1,
6664 },
6665 },
6666 signature: String::new(),
6667 })
6668 .unwrap();
6669 runtime.accept_transaction(pending_tx, false).await.unwrap();
6670
6671 let view_zero_block = validator_a
6672 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
6673 hash: String::new(),
6674 body: BlockBody {
6675 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6676 height: 1,
6677 view: 0,
6678 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
6679 proposer: String::new(),
6680 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
6681 transactions: Vec::new(),
6682 health_batches: Vec::new(),
6683 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
6684 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
6685 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
6686 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
6687 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
6688 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
6689 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
6690 },
6691 signature: String::new(),
6692 approvals: Vec::new(),
6693 })
6694 .unwrap();
6695 runtime
6696 .approve_block_proposal(&view_zero_block)
6697 .await
6698 .unwrap();
6699
6700 let competing_view_zero_block = validator_a
6701 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
6702 hash: String::new(),
6703 body: BlockBody {
6704 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6705 height: 1,
6706 view: 0,
6707 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
6708 proposer: String::new(),
6709 proposed_at: Utc::now() + ChronoDuration::seconds(1),
6710 transactions: Vec::new(),
6711 health_batches: Vec::new(),
6712 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
6713 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
6714 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
6715 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
6716 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
6717 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
6718 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
6719 },
6720 signature: String::new(),
6721 approvals: Vec::new(),
6722 })
6723 .unwrap();
6724 assert!(
6725 runtime
6726 .approve_block_proposal(&competing_view_zero_block)
6727 .await
6728 .is_err()
6729 );
6730
6731 {
6732 let mut state = runtime.state.write().await;
6733 state.view_started_at = Utc::now() - ChronoDuration::seconds(2);
6734 }
6735 runtime.advance_view_if_stale().await.unwrap();
6736
6737 {
6738 let state = runtime.state.read().await;
6739 assert_eq!(state.active_view, 1);
6740 assert_eq!(state.block_approvals.len(), 0);
6741 assert_eq!(
6742 state
6743 .chain
6744 .scheduled_proposer_for_view(1, state.active_view),
6745 &validator_b.address()
6746 );
6747 }
6748
6749 let view_one_block = validator_b
6750 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
6751 hash: String::new(),
6752 body: BlockBody {
6753 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6754 height: 1,
6755 view: 1,
6756 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
6757 proposer: String::new(),
6758 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
6759 transactions: Vec::new(),
6760 health_batches: Vec::new(),
6761 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
6762 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
6763 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
6764 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
6765 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
6766 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
6767 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
6768 },
6769 signature: String::new(),
6770 approvals: Vec::new(),
6771 })
6772 .unwrap();
6773 let approval = runtime
6774 .approve_block_proposal(&view_one_block)
6775 .await
6776 .unwrap();
6777 assert_eq!(approval.body.view, 1);
6778 assert_eq!(approval.body.block_hash, view_one_block.hash);
6779 }
6780
6781 #[tokio::test]
6782 async fn startup_replays_pending_journal_before_compacting() {
6783 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
6784 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
6785 let validator_c = Wallet::generate();
6786 let requester = Wallet::generate();
6787 let validators = vec![
6788 validator_a.clone(),
6789 validator_b.clone(),
6790 validator_c.clone(),
6791 ];
6792
6793 let (runtime, _temp, config) = runtime_for_validator(&validator_b, &validators, &requester)
6794 .await
6795 .unwrap();
6796
6797 let request_id = "restart-replay-request".to_string();
6798 let pending_tx = requester
6799 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
6800 hash: String::new(),
6801 signer: String::new(),
6802 body: TransactionBody {
6803 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6804 nonce: 1,
6805 created_at: Utc::now(),
6806 kind: TransactionKind::HealthCheck {
6807 spec: crate::protocol::HealthCheckSpec {
6808 request_id: request_id.clone(),
6809 url: "https://example.com/health".into(),
6810 method: crate::protocol::HealthHttpMethod::Get,
6811 headers: BTreeMap::new(),
6812 query: BTreeMap::new(),
6813 timeout_ms: 1_000,
6814 expected_status: Some(200),
6815 assertions: Vec::new(),
6816 body_json: None,
6817 allow_insecure_http: false,
6818 allow_private_targets: false,
6819 },
6820 },
6821 },
6822 signature: String::new(),
6823 })
6824 .unwrap();
6825 runtime
6826 .accept_transaction(pending_tx.clone(), false)
6827 .await
6828 .unwrap();
6829
6830 let receipt = validator_a
6831 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
6832 id: String::new(),
6833 body: HealthReceiptBody {
6834 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
6835 tx_hash: pending_tx.hash.clone(),
6836 request_id: request_id.clone(),
6837 executor: String::new(),
6838 observed_at: Utc::now(),
6839 response_status: Some(200),
6840 latency_ms: 42,
6841 success: true,
6842 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
6843 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
6844 response_body_sample: Some("{\"ready\":true}".into()),
6845 error: None,
6846 },
6847 signature: String::new(),
6848 })
6849 .unwrap();
6850 runtime.accept_receipt(receipt, false).await.unwrap();
6851
6852 {
6853 let mut state = runtime.state.write().await;
6854 state.view_started_at = Utc::now() - ChronoDuration::seconds(2);
6855 }
6856 runtime.advance_view_if_stale().await.unwrap();
6857
6858 let journal_before_restart =
6859 fs::read_to_string(journal_path(&config.state_dir)).expect("journal should exist");
6860 assert!(journal_before_restart.contains("transaction_accepted"));
6861 assert!(journal_before_restart.contains("receipt_accepted"));
6862 assert!(journal_before_restart.contains("view_advanced"));
6863
6864 drop(runtime);
6865
6866 let restarted = NodeRuntime::from_config(config.clone()).await.unwrap();
6867 let state = restarted.state.read().await;
6868 assert_eq!(state.chain.height, 0);
6869 assert_eq!(state.active_view, 1);
6870 assert!(state.mempool.contains_key(&pending_tx.hash));
6871 assert_eq!(state.receipts.get(&pending_tx.hash).map(Vec::len), Some(1));
6872 drop(state);
6873
6874 let compacted_journal =
6875 fs::read_to_string(journal_path(&config.state_dir)).expect("journal should exist");
6876 assert!(compacted_journal.trim().is_empty());
6877 }
6878 }
Gossip Protocol Peer-witnessed monitoring, compute, storage, DNS, swaps, and publishing.
